data.jd_text:
**Executive Director Operations - DMC (Guest Experience & Destination Operations)**

Large-Scale Destination | Premium Hospitality

We are working with a
**major developer and operator of a large-scale, high-profile destination**
to appoint a DMC
**Executive Director Operations**
to lead all guest-facing operations.

This is a rare opportunity to take full ownership of the
**end-to-end guest journey**
across a complex, multi-asset environment — spanning transport, hospitality, experiences, and service delivery.

**The Role**

You will act as the
**senior operational authority on the ground**
, responsible for delivering a seamless, high-quality guest experience from pre-arrival through to post-departure.

This is a highly visible leadership role requiring
**hands-on operational control, strategic oversight, and cross-functional coordination**
at scale.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Lead and implement the
  **overall operations strategy**
  across guest operations and experience
* Own the
  **full guest journey**
  — arrivals, transfers, accommodation coordination, activities, and service delivery
* Establish and drive
  **KPIs, SOPs, and performance standards**
  across all touchpoints
* Oversee
  **guest experience functions**
  including bookings, concierge-style services, and satisfaction monitoring
* Manage
  **on-ground operations**
  , ensuring rapid resolution of issues and complaints
* Coordinate with
  **transport, hospitality, and service partners**
  to ensure seamless delivery
* Drive
  **continuous improvement**
  through guest feedback and operational data
* Lead
  **budget management and operational reporting**
  to senior leadership

**Leadership & Team**

* Build, lead, and develop a
  **high-performing operations team**
* Drive a culture focused on
  **service excellence and accountability**
* Oversee
  **workforce planning, staffing, and operational readiness**

**Key Requirements**

* 12+ years’ experience in
  **hospitality, tourism, or large-scale guest operations**
* Proven track record in a
  **senior leadership / GM-level role**
* Experience in
  **luxury or premium environments**
  preferred
* Strong capability in
  **multi-stakeholder coordination and operational delivery**
* Demonstrated ability to implement
  **SOPs, frameworks, and performance systems**
* High emotional intelligence with experience managing
  **complex guest scenarios**

**Why This Role?**

* Operate at
  **destination scale**
  — not just a single asset
* Shape the
  **guest experience strategy**
  from the ground up
* Work within a
  **high-investment, high-visibility environment**
* Deliver impact across
  **hospitality, transport, and experience ecosystems**



If you are currently operating at
**Director / GM level within luxury hospitality, integrated resorts, or destination-scale operations**
, this is a standout opportunity to step into a
**truly strategic, end-to-end role**
.

data.title: Executive Director of Enrollment Management | Office of Enrollment Management
data.location: Sharjah, Sharjah Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.raw_snippet:
**The Executive Director of Enrollment Management (EDEM)**
is responsible for developing and implementing strategic initiatives to promote American University of Sharjah (AUS), advance its mission, and position it as a premier institution of choice for qualified local and international students.
data.jd_text:
**The Executive Director of Enrollment Management (EDEM)**
is responsible for developing and implementing strategic initiatives to promote American University of Sharjah (AUS), advance its mission, and position it as a premier institution of choice for qualified local and international students.
  
  
The EDEM provides leadership and oversight for key enrollment functions, including:
  
  

* Undergraduate (UG) and graduate (GR) student recruitment and admissions
* The University Testing Center
* The external sponsorships program
* The Welcome Center
* The Contact Center

Collaborating closely with internal stakeholders, the EDEM ensures alignment with the university’s strategic objectives. This includes conducting periodic assessments, research, and analyses of the higher education landscape to inform data-driven enrollment strategies and meet institutional targets. Additionally, the EDEM prepares annual enrollment projections to support budget planning.
  
  
Externally, the EDEM fosters strategic partnerships with Ministries of Education/Higher Education, government agencies, sponsoring entities, high schools, and higher education institutions within and beyond the UAE to strengthen AUS’s enrollment pipeline and reputation.
  
  
**Job Responsibilities**

* Oversee the development and implementation of the Office of Enrollment Management (OEM) Multi-Year Strategic Plan.
* Track inquiries, leads, yields, and application trends to guide decision-making and improve efficiency.
* Serve on various committees to formulate leveraging strategies, including those related to student success, recruitment and retention, financial grants and scholarships, and a university capacity task force.
* Supervise the planning and execution of the new student orientation program.
* Prepare and maintain the departmental budget, ensuring alignment with institutional strategic enrollment goals and objectives.
* Analyze admission standards and requirements and recommend adjustments for approval by senior leadership.
* Develop print and online informational and promotional materials.
* Serve as the final arbiter on admissions decisions in accordance with established policies.
* Advocate for fair admission policies and ensure equitable treatment of all applicants regardless of background.
* Develop grade concordance tables and matrices for different secondary education systems.
* Establish and monitor the application of academic credential evaluation and assessment standards.
* Monitor the effectiveness of internal admissions processes and policies to ensure they meet key performance indicators.
* Liaise with Ministries of Education and local education councils.
* Develop data-driven, multi-year enrollment projection scenarios to establish capacity parameters and budgetary requirements.
* Monitor and assess the growth of the external student sponsorship program and strengthen relationships with sponsoring organizations.
* Represent the university at media events and on- and off-campus recruitment functions.
* Develop a recruitment and new-student communications plan, guiding prospects from initial inquiry through matriculation.
* Develop and implement, in consultation with the recruitment team, an annual comprehensive recruitment campaign plan.
* Co-manage, with the Strategic Communications and Marketing department, the development of communication plans and the implementation of promotional tools for recruitment campaigns (e.g., social media, advertising).
* Engage colleges/schools, faculty, alumni, and various AUS departments in recruitment efforts to achieve enrollment goals.
* Establish partnership agreements with select high schools locally and internationally to attract highly qualified applicants.
* Lead the integration of automation and artificial intelligence solutions to enhance enrollment operations, improve applicant experience, increase efficiency, and transition key processes from manual to data-driven digital workflows.

**Qualifications And Skills Required**

* Master’s degree or higher in Business Administration, Mass Communication, Public Administration, Higher Education Administration, or a related field from an accredited institution.
* Proficiency in written and spoken Arabic is considered an asset.
* Strong understanding of the higher education landscape, including emerging trends, regulatory frameworks, and best practices in enrollment management.
* Solid background in developing and implementing admissions policies, academic credential evaluation standards, and related governance frameworks.
* Comprehensive knowledge of diverse high school education systems, grading models, student recruitment strategies, and yield management practices.
* Up-to-date expertise in leveraging digital marketing, social media, branding strategies, and evolving demographic trends to support enrollment growth.
* Understanding of the relationship between enrollment strategies and student retention, persistence, and graduation outcomes.
* Demonstrated ability to develop accurate enrollment projections and execute long-term enrollment strategies aligned with institutional goals.
* Strong analytical and data-driven decision-making skills.
* Effective and focused leader with a proven ability to build and motivate high-performing teams.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with strong stakeholder engagement and relationship-building capabilities.
* Proven ability to manage budgets efficiently and optimize resource allocation.
* Proficiency in enrollment management systems, data analytics and visualization tools, and marketing automation platforms.
* Strong crisis management and change management capabilities.
* Visionary, innovative, and adaptable leadership style.
* Persuasive, collaborative, and culturally sensitive.
* Strong problem-solving skills with sound judgment.
* Demonstrates integrity, transparency, fairness, and ethical leadership
* Expert in enrollment data analysis, predictive modeling, CRM tools, and admissions software.

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Minimum of 10 years of experience in Higher Education Administration and Management.

**How To Apply**

* Interested applicants should fill out the form.
* AUS alumni are encouraged to apply. Applicants who do not meet specified requirements will not be shortlisted. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
* AUS is an equal opportunity employer. We adhere to a policy of making employment decisions without regard to race, color, age, gender, religion, national origin, disability or marital status. Opportunities for employment are based solely upon one’s qualifications.

data.title: Head of Product & Delivery
data.raw_snippet: BlackStone eIT is seeking a strategic and results-driven Head of Product & Delivery to lead our product development and delivery teams. This leadership role will be responsible for overseeing the entire product lifecycle, from ideation to launch and ongoing improvement, while ensuring efficient deli
data.jd_text:
BlackStone eIT is seeking a strategic and results-driven Head of Product & Delivery to lead our product development and delivery teams. This leadership role will be responsible for overseeing the entire product lifecycle, from ideation to launch and ongoing improvement, while ensuring efficient delivery and high-quality outcomes. The successful candidate will align product strategy with business goals, foster collaboration across teams, and drive innovation to meet customer needs.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities:**

* Lead and manage the product and delivery teams, providing vision, motivation, and support
* Develop and execute product strategies that align with company objectives and market demands
* Oversee project delivery processes to ensure timely, high-quality product releases
* Collaborate with stakeholders to define product roadmaps, priorities, and success metrics
* Implement best practices in Agile and other delivery methodologies to optimize performance
* Establish and monitor KPIs to assess product and delivery team effectiveness
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance product quality and customer satisfaction
* Manage resource allocation and budgeting to maximize efficiency and outcomes
* Maintain strong communication across departments, fostering a collaborative and innovative culture
* - Programme delivery across all active workstreams: executive portal, data platform, governance, AI agents, crisis management systems
* - Sprint execution: planning, backlog management, Definition of Done, mid-sprint check-ins, sprint reviews with live demos
* - External vendor coordination: tracking classification vendor milestones against your integration needs; tracking agentic platform delivery against your data readiness timeline
* - Stakeholder management: milestone reports to senior leadership, weekly status updates, requirements conversations with internal business owners
* - Scope discipline: deciding what gets cut when time is at risk, deferring gracefully, tracking deferred work
* - Resource management: contractor onboarding, work package definition, daily task allocation, quality review
* - User acceptance testing: designing and facilitating UAT with non-technical end users and senior leadership
* - Delivery risk management: identifying risks before they become blockers, maintaining a cleared backlog that proceeds when external dependencies are slow
* - Office representation: authorized to represent the Data & AI Office at all levels when technical leadership is unavailable

**Requirements**

* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Business, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
* Minimum 10+ years of experience in product management and delivery leadership roles
* Proven track record of successfully managing product portfolios and delivery teams
* Strong knowledge and experience with Agile methodologies and software development lifecycles
* Excellent leadership and people management skills with the ability to build and mentor high-performing teams
* Exceptional strategic thinking, problem-solving, and decision-making abilities
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
* Experience with project management tools and product management platforms
* Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities in a fast-paced environment
* Experience in the technology or software industry is highly preferred
* Required Skills & Experience
* - Has shipped working software to real users under a hard deadline — owned the outcome, not just managed the timeline
* - Agile/sprint delivery in small engineering teams (2-8 people) producing working output, not status updates
* - Technical fluency: can read an OpenAPI spec, evaluate engineering estimates, identify scope creep, and challenge "it's complex" when it's really "I haven't started"
* - Vendor management: has managed external delivery engagements and held vendors accountable to milestones
* - Writing functional requirements with testable acceptance criteria
* - UAT design and facilitation for non-technical executives
* - Risk identification and escalation — knows the difference between a delay and a blocker
* - Stakeholder communication at C-suite level — can write a one-page status note that senior leadership reads and trusts
* - Programme management across multiple concurrent workstreams (3-5 simultaneous)
* - Task tracking tools (GitHub Projects, Linear, Jira)
* - Experience operating as a deputy or chief of staff to a technical executive
* - Experience in government, sovereign, or institutional environments is a strong plus

**Benefits**

* Paid Time Off
* Performance Bonus
* Remote Job

data.title: Senior Contract Management Spec
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
**Job Overview:**
McDermott has an immediate opening in Dubai, UAE for a Senior Contracts Specialist with a background in EPCI projects. The Contracts Specialist will support the Project Contracts Manager in providing the contractual and commercial oversight over the relevant con
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
**Job Overview:**
McDermott has an immediate opening in Dubai, UAE for a Senior Contracts Specialist with a background in EPCI projects. The Contracts Specialist will support the Project Contracts Manager in providing the contractual and commercial oversight over the relevant contractual and commercial project functional groups to ensure contract compliance, overall commercial integrity and timely delivery.
  
  
**Responsibilities**
**Key Tasks and Responsibilities:**

* Provide support to Contracts Manager as the contract and commercial liaison between the functional groups, ensuring arcuate contractual data is used.
* Provide appropriate support and guidance to the Contracts Manager and the project team for the effective management and administration of the Prime Contract and interaction with the Client consistent with McDermott’s practices and procedural guidelines.
* Asist the Contracts Manager to drive the change management process by identifying and pursuing opportunities for positive change to the project
* Reports directly to the Project Contracts Manager who in turn reports to the Project Director who has overall responsibility for delivery of the project within the required cost and schedule constraints.
* The Contracts Specialist will receive functional direction and support from the Director of Contract Management.
* Manage Contracts and commercial aspects of the Project under the direction of the Contract Manager(s) in liaison with the Project Director/Manager
* Work with the Contract Manager on Contract project kick-off activities, including Insurance Certificates, Bank Guarantees, Parent Company Guarantees, Contract document review, preparation of Contract summary, Contract required notices Lists, Deliverables lists, Flow-down Requirements, and Responsibilities Matrix, which are due in the first 30 days of Contract Award
* Assist with Contract Review Kick-off meeting with the Project team to promote contract awareness and interpretation to support project implementation
* Assist Contract Manager(s) with all relevant project management Contractual and Commercial procedures
* Maintain appropriate Contract records
* Work with Contract Manager(s) to prepare Contractual and commercial correspondence
* Assist Contract Manager(s) with participation in Project risk meetings
* Assist the Contract Manager in developing and preparing Project Change/Variation Proposals for the Client
* Ensure that project monthly reports reflect an accurate position on all Contract and Commercial issues
* Assist Contract Manager(s) in contractual and commercial aspects of Project Close-out

**Qualifications**
**Essential Qualifications and Education:**

* Minimum of 5-10 years working experience preferably in Offshore, Subsea, or Onshore Oil and Gas related projects.
* Extensive experience in complex lump sum projects.
* Preferred English speaking and writing fluently.
* Contractual and commercial knowledge to ensure contract compliance, overall commercial integrity and timely delivery
* Foster an environment of teamwork to maintain high group morale and cooperation.
* Excellent Interpersonal, verbal and written communication skills.
* Bachelor's Degree preferred
* 2-3 years working experience, preferably in Contracts/Construction Contracting, similar experience and role
* Good technical background and knowledge of the oil and gas construction industry
* Has experience/background in Contract Management, Legal or Construction Contracting
* Undertakes ad-hoc contractual and commercial assignments and initiatives
* Fluent in the creation and editing of all Microsoft Office Suite documents
* Ability to multi-task, with excellent organizational and time management skills to achieve project goals

**About Us**
Our ingenuity fuels daily life. Together, we’ve forged some of the most trusted partnerships across the energy value chain to make what was once just an idea a reality: laying subsea infrastructure thousands of feet below sea level, installing platforms hundreds of miles from shore, using our expertise to design and build offshore wind infrastructure, and reshaping the onshore landscape to deliver the energy products the world needs safely and sustainably.
  
  
For more than 100 years, we've been making the impossible possible. Today, we're driving the energy transition with more than 30,000 of the brightest minds across 54 countries.

data.title: Design Director

**Job Summary**

We are seeking an experienced and visionary Design Director to lead and oversee the creative direction of high-end design projects. The successful candidate will be responsible for managing the full design process, from concept development to project delivery, ensuring exceptional d
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary**

We are seeking an experienced and visionary Design Director to lead and oversee the creative direction of high-end design projects. The successful candidate will be responsible for managing the full design process, from concept development to project delivery, ensuring exceptional design standards and alignment with the company’s brand vision.

The Design Director will collaborate closely with senior leadership, architects, consultants, and project teams to deliver innovative and high-quality design solutions.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Lead the overall design vision and creative direction across multiple projects.
* Oversee the entire design process, from concept development through detailed design and execution.
* Manage and mentor a team of designers and creative professionals.
* Ensure all design outputs meet high aesthetic, functional, and brand standards.
* Coordinate with architects, consultants, contractors, and project managers to ensure design integrity throughout the project lifecycle.
* Review and approve design concepts, drawings, materials, and presentations.
* Ensure projects are delivered on time, within budget, and in line with project objectives.
* Stay up to date with design trends, materials, technologies, and industry innovations.
* Present design concepts and strategies to senior management and key stakeholders.
* Support the development of the company’s design identity and brand positioning.

**Requirements:**

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Architecture, Interior Design, or a related field.
* 10+ years of experience in design leadership roles.
* Proven experience managing high-end residential, hospitality, or luxury development projects.
* Strong portfolio demonstrating conceptual thinking and high-quality design execution.
* Experience managing multidisciplinary design teams.
* Proficiency in design and visualization tools such as AutoCAD, Revit, SketchUp, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar.
* Strong understanding of project coordination, materials, and construction processes.

data.title: Senior Conflicts Manager (Asia and Middle East)
data.raw_snippet: We are a leading international law and professional services firm providing legal, corporate and fiduciary services to global corporations, financial institutions, capital market participants and investment fund managers. With a global presence spanning the Americas, Europe, the Middle East and Asia
data.jd_text:
We are a leading international law and professional services firm providing legal, corporate and fiduciary services to global corporations, financial institutions, capital market participants and investment fund managers. With a global presence spanning the Americas, Europe, the Middle East and Asia, we advise on the laws of Bermuda, the British Virgin Islands, the Cayman Islands, Guernsey, Ireland and Jersey.

We treat everyone as the intelligent professional they are. Our approach is to trust and empower our people to deliver consistently, and enable them to succeed. Diversity is our secret weapon – it’s the sheer breadth of Walkers people that makes us who we are – gathered from across the globe and fluent in languages, jurisdictions and cultures that help us to mirror our clients and keep our own thinking in tune with the world in which we operate.

**Overview Of Role**

This role will ideally be based in either our Dubai, Hong Kong or Singapore office.

We are keen to hear from qualified candidates in London who are open to relocating to Dubai, Hong Kong or Singapore.

This is an exciting opportunity for an experienced compliance professional with a background in the legal or professional services sector to join a team dealing with conflicts of interest and client confidentiality matters.

Reporting to our Director of Conflicts and joining the OGC team, the successful candidate will assist with the development of a specialised team of conflicts professionals responsible for analysing, advising on and resolving legal and commercial conflicts of interest, information barriers and share dealing requests. This is to ensure we comply with all applicable regulations, professional rules of conduct, contractual terms related to conflicts of interest and client confidentiality, and protect client relationships and our reputation.

Our conflicts analysts assist with the resolution of complex conflicts issues, deal with sensitive confidential matters, and carry out conflict checks associated with share dealing requests and lateral hires into the business.

The Senior Conflicts Manager will work closely with the Director of Conflicts on the ongoing development of our policies, controls and processes as they relate to conflicts of interest, client confidentiality, information barriers, share dealing and Market Abuse Regulations. This will include optimising our use of tech/automation (including
*Intapp*
), standardising and simplifying our policies and processes across the Walkers group, and building an optimal team shape that provides agility, efficiency, consistency and excellent service to the business and our clients.

**Duties, Responsibilities & Person Specification**

* Day-to-day management of conflicts advisors within the relevant time zone (including leading the recruitment of additional conflicts advisors).
* Act as a point of escalation for the team and the business on all legal and commercial conflicts issues, analysing and resolving issues in accordance with applicable regulations, professional rules and Walkers' own policy and procedures.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders across Walkers globally, acting as a point of contact in relation to all conflicts and client confidentiality queries and leading communications across the business in this area.
* Together with other senior team members, lead on internal training as it relates to conflicts of interest, client confidentiality, share dealing and insider lists.
* Identify any weaknesses or areas for potential improvement in our existing client onboarding system (Intapp Intake) and, working with the Director of Conflicts and the Compliance Business Systems team, recommend enhancements that streamline/simplify processes for team and the business, and/or strengthen our controls.
* Working with the Director of Conflicts and key stakeholders from across the business, develop and deliver a phased programme of work that: (i) rapidly enhances our conflicts offering/service delivery to the business (including through improved time zone coverage/capacity, responsiveness, efficiency and expertise); (ii) enables us to provide a fully centralised conflict checking/analysis function within the next two years.
* Support the Director of Conflicts in driving quality, consistency, service excellence, efficiency, proactivity and adaptability across the Conflicts team.
* Assist the Director of Conflicts in developing and leading people initiatives within the Conflicts team to drive development of expertise and skills, attraction and retention, and fostering a high-performing, collaborative and open team culture.
* Input into regular reporting to senior management and/or other stakeholders as required.
* Participate in cross-functional initiatives which impact or relate to conflicts of interest and client confidentiality.
* Keep abreast with developments in regulation, technology and the market which are relevant to conflicts of interest, client confidentiality, market abuse/insider trading, and information barriers.

**Education, Skills & Experience**

* Bachelor's degree in law, business, finance or another relevant field.
* Experience in a compliance or in-house legal role in an international law firm or professional services environment.
* Compliance expert with deep technical and practical knowledge of legal conflicts of interest, commercial conflicts and client confidentiality, with some knowledge of Market Abuse Regs.
* Familiarity with Intapp Intake.
* Experience of policy work.
* Experience of people management, including supervision/management of large teams and experience devising and driving people initiatives (including around recruitment and development).
* Proven track record of delivering change and process improvements.
* Experience working in an offshore environment or with offshore structures would be helpful but not required
* Strategic: ability to work in pursuit of a clear strategic direction, align the team's priorities with those of the wider OGC team and the firm, and proactively identify improvements.
* Leadership: ability to lead and inspire the team, drive collaboration and foster a high-performing team culture.
* Technical: deep knowledge of relevant regulations and professional rules as they relate to conflicts of interest and client confidentiality, and an ability to apply these in practice.
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills: solutions-orientated with the ability to interpret complex fact patterns to reach decisions or develop clear recommendations.
* Quality: strong attention to detail and produces high quality work product.
* Judgement: confident taking decisions, with sound judgement of when to escalate issues or seek further opinions.
* Adaptable: willingness to embrace change and uncertainty and manage competing demands in a dynamic and fast-paced environment; willing to constructively challenge the status quo.
* Communication: strong verbal and written communication skills, ensuring communications are properly targeted, persuasive, accurate and accessible.
* Emotional intelligence: ability to empathise, understand, and manage emotions effectively, fostering a positive and inclusive work environment.
* Collaborative: builds strong and effective relationships with stakeholders and peers; works collaboratively with colleagues across the business. A "one-team" ethos.
* Commercial: sound, commercially driven decision-making. A relentless focus on service excellence.
* Familiarity with Intapp.

**Other**

* Walkers is a global business and this role may therefore require audio or video conferencing outside of normal business hours.
* This role will be based in either our Dubai, Hong Kong or Singapore office. However, our agile working policy does allow some home working each week.
* Some international travel may be required.

Walkers global is an equal opportunity employer. Equality and diversity are key to our global identity and an integral part of our goal to continue being an employer of choice. We are committed to a work environment that supports all individuals irrespective of gender, ethnicity, nationality, race, religion, marital status, age, disability, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity or any other applicable legally protected characteristics. We make every effort to ensure that employment opportunities are open and accessible to all purely on the basis of personal ability.

data.title: Director Public Policy & Government Affairs
data.raw_snippet: talabat is part of the Delivery Hero Group, the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience—fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide. Headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock
data.jd_text:
talabat is part of the Delivery Hero Group, the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience—fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide. Headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index.
  
  
**Job Description**
We are hiring a Director of Public Policy & Government Affairs to lead talabat’s regulatory and government engagement across priority GCC and MENA markets.
  
  
This is a senior leadership role for a policy professional with a proven track record of influencing regulatory outcomes in complex, highly regulated environments. You will work closely with senior leadership to anticipate policy risk, shape government frameworks, and position talabat as a credible, long-term partner to regulators and public institutions.
  
  
The role combines external influence, policy strategy, and internal leadership, with direct exposure to C-suite decision-making.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Lead engagement with government entities, regulators, competition authorities, and public sector stakeholders across the region
* Shape and influence policy and regulatory frameworks impacting:

+ competition and pricing
+ platform regulation
+ labour and workforce models
+ consumer protection
+ digital, data, and sustainability policy

* Develop and execute policy and advocacy strategies aligned with business priorities
* Represent talabat in industry associations, councils, and working groups
* Anticipate regulatory and political risks; advise senior leadership on timing, likelihood, and impact
* Support crisis response and regulatory escalations that affect operations Partner closely with Communications, Legal, Operations, Finance, and Strategy teams
* Act as an internal centre of excellence for government engagement and public policy standards
* Coach and guide market teams on effective and compliant government relations

**Qualifications**
Preferred candidates will be:
  
  

* 10+ years’ experience in public policy, government affairs, regulatory strategy, or public sector leadership
* Demonstrated success influencing policy or regulatory outcomes in the GCC and/or wider MENA region
* Hands-on experience engaging with ministers, regulators, senior civil servants, and competition authorities
* Background in highly regulated sectors (technology platforms, telecoms, mobility, energy, financial services, or similar)
* Strong understanding of how regulation impacts growth, margins, market structure, and investor confidence
* Credible, discreet, and trusted at senior levels, with the judgement to operate in politically sensitive environments
* Executive presence, clear communication style, and the confidence to challenge constructively
* Experience working in or alongside multinational or regional businesses is a strong advantage
* Fluency in verbal and written English and Arabic.

The Project Delivery Manager supports the delivery of Sales & Media initiatives through structured planning, delivery governance, and cross‑functional coordination across Product, Marketing, Commercial, Technology, and Operations. * Ensure clear documentation, action tracking, and follow‑through from governance forums
* Provide concise and transparent delivery updates to senior stakeholders and leadership
* Support post‑launch reviews and continuous improvement of delivery processes

**REQUIREMENTS**

* 5+ years of experience in project or program management roles

* Experience supporting project governance, reporting, and stakeholder communication
* Hands‑on exposure to go‑to‑market or launch coordination activities
* Advanced Microsoft Office skills with the ability to support business cases, proposals, and documentation

data.title: Director, Engineering MEP Support - MEA
data.raw_snippet:
**Position Statement**

As highly established Director of Engineering Support, you will work closely with the Senior Director to develop, to develop, manage and implement sustainable engineering solutions, and drive engineering excellence across all MEP disciplines, as well as fire and life safety s
data.jd_text:
**Position Statement**

As highly established Director of Engineering Support, you will work closely with the Senior Director to develop, to develop, manage and implement sustainable engineering solutions, and drive engineering excellence across all MEP disciplines, as well as fire and life safety standards for all Brands. Your role will support Hilton’s expansion across the MEA region, with a key focus on Egypt and Pakistan. You will provide expert advice to the Hilton project management team, external design consultants, and owners on new developments, Property Improvement Plans, refurbishments, and adaptive reuse projects.

**Position Summary**

This role will consist, but not be limited to assisting the Senior Director of Engineering Support with:

* Supporting Hilton’s growth across the MEA region, maintaining strong knowledge of local codes and effectively implementing and delivering projects in region.
* Developing and implementing engineering and fire life safety standards for all Hilton brands across EMEA, including coordinating with Brand Managers to establish location‑specific requirements and overseeing the creation of tailored Design and Construction Standards in collaboration with Hilton’s regional design and construction teams.
* Maintaining and updating all engineering- and fire-life‑safety‑related Design and Construction Standards annually, ensuring Project Managers have access to the latest versions.
* Reviewing building engineering services drawings for multiple brands and countries to ensure compliance with construction brand standards across new developments, Property Improvement Plans, refurbishments, adaptive reuse initiatives, and Hilton Capex projects.
* Champion the regional sustainability vision by shaping strategic goals and driving impactful environmental initiatives.
* Collaborating with the Area Operations Engineering team to assess the performance of newly opened hotels, using operational feedback to refine and enhance future design schemes.
* Driving technical excellence by applying deep knowledge of Hilton’s engineering design guidelines and identifying opportunities for continuous improvement.
* Ensuring all technical specifications remain current and are clearly reflective of the latest technology and brand standard requirements.
* Maintaining an understanding of brand standards and local code requirements, communicating code variances and their implications to the Senior Director.
* Developing strategies and directions for engineering processes, procedures, and reporting.
* Supporting the execution of strategic plans and internal/external communication of key engineering messages.
* Managing the cross-functional coordination between AD&C and other internal departments to ensure alignment and seamless project delivery.
* Conducting with project designs, construction visits and testing and commissioning witnessing of systems in region.

**What will I be doing?**

**Planning Activities**

* Research Local Codes and help to identify business opportunities for Hilton to support Development pipeline.
* Research new technologies and developing new innovations for the business and presenting quarterly to Senior Director of Engineering.
* Manages objectives for the department, communicating across functions and clearly manages all design reviews for the department, planning project visits and status reporting across all assigned projects
* Travel and site inspections and team meetings.
* Arranging knowledge CPDs for the wider Engineering team.
* Considering the needs of other business functions and planning for changes to Standards / updates to meet these visions.

**Organizing Activities**

* Establishes priorities and supporting the wider Engineering team members ensuring optimum allocation of resources to support projects.
* Works with key stakeholders and departments structuring activities and resources so overall objectives are met.
* Communicates management plans and project activities and ESG goals clearly in reports.
* Evaluates and streamlines business processes to maximize efficiency and effectiveness.
* Manages cross-functional links to other Technical Services (Architecture and Construction) departments.
* Adheres to measurements of engineering performance standards to ensure overall effectiveness.
* Develop plans to implement long term goals for ESG and AD&C department.
* Reviews current external professional teams and looks to enhance the support network across the region, developing organisations that support the department’s needs.

**Directing Activities**

* Implements and manages departmental processes and procedures to ensure strategies and directives are carried out effectively.
* Oversees the development and administration of the agreed engineering standards.
* Communicates important information to team members.
* Influences department members to achieve department objectives.
* Executes organisational directives and encourages achievement of goals through motivation, communication and leadership.
* Manages third parties, identifies vendors and monitors cost and quality of service.
* Leverages effective partnerships with third parties and internal constituents.
* Advises management on progress and advises on key performance issues.
* Conduct detailed design reviews.
* Report on reviews.
* Visit projects and conduct site inspections and issuing detailed reports on quality and progress.
* Witnessing commissioning and undertaking checks for signing off on engineering systems.
* Report writing, Project Overviews and Final Project Sustainability reporting.
* Presenting ESG initiatives and new technologies in an executive format.

**Controlling Activities**

* Oversees proper controls and systems to ensure compliance with the agreed engineering standards.
* Ensures established performance standards are met for department or project.
* Assesses actual performance to ensure success and takes corrective actions.
* Ensures business plan is followed and achieved providing feedback as necessary.
* Enforces policies and procedures to improve overall operations and effectiveness.
* Operates within prescribed budget parameters.

**Other Activities**

* Contribute to multi-skilled projects.
* To be aware of business and commercial opportunities for Hilton.
* To conduct competitor and industry analysis and produce reports and recommendations to enhance Hilton’s design standards.
* To conduct market trends in engineering and analysis new routes forward for Hilton to enhance guest experience, drive energy efficiencies and drive value.
* All other job duties as assigned.

**What are we looking for?**

**To successfully fill this role, you should maintain the attitude, behaviours, skills, and values that follow:**

* Excellent MEP Design knowledge and practice with project management involving witnessing and commissioning on systems.
* Excellent Sustainability knowledge in design.
* Very good understanding of regulations within MEA and infrastructure challenges across the region.
* Excellent communication skills both verbally and in writing reporting to Senior members of the business and to external stakeholders.
* Strong Ability to analyse departmental financial data.
* Excellent interpersonal skills to build trust and confidence to motivate and influence others
* Demonstrates the highest standards of ethical behaviour and absolute discretion with sensitive information.
* Ability to take initiative to identify, prioritise and implement actions required to achieve functional goals
* Very strong problem-solving skills including ability to address any issue in collaboration with others, identify and prevent potential problems and develop problem solving skills in others.
* Ability to work well under pressure and effectively handle multiple and concurrent demands.
* Ability to collaborate with others and act in an objective manner to stay on track to achieve common goals.
* Very strong in design engineering skills and ability to quickly learn new programs and train others.
* Excellent project management skills including ability to manage details through to completion and ensure deadlines are met.
* Capable of conversing with both technical and non-technical parties.
* Experience working in multi-cultural and international settings.
* Experience in dealing with developers, Owners and other corporate clients.
* An understanding of and working knowledge of the Middle East regulations and standards.
* Proficiency with Word, PowerPoint, Excel, AutoCAD.

**Qualifications**

**Required Qualifications**

* University degree in Mechanical and Electrical Engineering or similar Construction related discipline or extensive experience in lieu.
* Recognised professional qualification in Engineering or similar Construction related discipline.
* Substantial work experience in property, engineering design and / or construction related roles including significant experience in related advanced hotel development and construction related experience ideally within an international hotel group.
* Ability to speak, write and communicate fluently in both Arabic and English.

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Advanced degree preferred.
* Substantial experience within the hospitality industry and in a similar role.
* In-depth knowledge of hotel and general leisure engineering systems and design
* Supervisory experience greater than 5 years.
* Project Management experience.
* Excellent understanding of fire, life and safety systems, preferably experience in applying NFPA, main UAE standards and building and Fire Codes.
* An excellent understanding and working knowledge of Middle East standards.
* MEP Design background.
* On site practical experience including testing and commissioning.

**Work Locations**

Hilton - Regional Office - Dubai

**Schedule**

Full-time

**Brand**

Hilton Corporate

**Shift**

Day Job

**Job Level**

Director

**Job**

Engineering, Maintenance and Facilities

data.title: Sr Marketing Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Marketing Operations & Planning**

* Own the annual, quarterly, and monthly marketing calendar, ensuring all activities are synchronized.
* Lead weekly planning and performance meetings to review data and pivot strategies in real-time.
* Translate high-level business priorities into structured cam
data.jd_text:
**Marketing Operations & Planning**

* Own the annual, quarterly, and monthly marketing calendar, ensuring all activities are synchronized.
* Lead weekly planning and performance meetings to review data and pivot strategies in real-time.
* Translate high-level business priorities into structured campaign and launch plans.
* Create clear briefs for the Specialists and maintain full visibility across all timelines, deliverables, and deadlines to ensure flawless execution.

**Strategic Leadership & Budget Management**

* Own the marketing budget, allocation, forecasting, and ROI; forecast growth trajectories and reallocate spending based on performance.
* Develop a holistic strategy that balances aggressive performance marketing with long-term brand building.
* Drive execution across existing and new territories, navigating multi-lingual requirements (Arabic) and territory-specific regulatory awareness.

**Growth, Media Buying & Performance**

* Supervise the execution of PPC, Paid Social, Affiliate, and SEO.
* Direct strategies that lower Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) while increasing Lifetime Value (LTV) through attribution modeling and robust testing.
* Championing a test-and-learn culture across offers audiences, and channels to find new avenues for scale.

**4Brand, PR & Offline Integration**

* Ensure a cohesive narrative across digital ads, website, app, retail environments, and events.
* Lead PR initiatives, media opportunities, and executive thought leadership to build brand authority.
* Manage ATL/BTL activities including print, radio, retail activations, and physical event presence.

**Customer Lifecycle & Retention**

* Oversee the full customer journey from initial awareness to long-term retention.
* Guide CRM, email automation, loyalty initiatives, and subscription growth to drive repeat purchase behavior and maximize customer value.

**Team Leadership & Cross-Functional Collaboration**

* Lead and mentor the two Senior Marketing Specialists, ensuring KPI accountability and supporting their professional development.
* Work closely with Sales, Operations, and Customer Service to ensure marketing initiatives align with inventory levels, delivery capabilities, and customer experience.

**Agency & External Partner Management**

* Manage agencies, freelancers, developers, photographers, and media partners.
* Own all external briefs, timelines, budgets, and the final quality of all outsourced output.

**Collaboration with Creative Director**

* Partner with the Creative Director on brand vision and high-level approvals.
* Take full ownership of execution and delivery so the Creative Director remains in a non-operational, visionary capacity.

Requirements
  
  

* Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Communications, or a related field. An MBA or relevant postgraduate qualification is an advantage.
* 6+ years in a senior marketing role, with proven experience in team management and P&L ownership.
* Ability to think long-term while maintaining a "startup" agility to execute daily.
* Deep understanding of performance marketing stacks, CRM, and analytics platforms.
* Exceptional brief-writing and interpersonal skills to manage both internal teams and external vendors.
* E-commerce experience is essential
* Subscription-based business model is a strong advantage

data.title: Manager – Planning & Business Solutions (Energy & Projects vertical)
data.raw_snippet:
**Introduction**
**Come move the world with us!**
Wake up each day to be part of a
**global movement**
. A movement to make an impact. A movement to go for it! A movement to provide best-in class solutions. A movement to be empowered. A movement to do the right thing.
  
  
Make AIT Worldwide Logist
data.jd_text:
**Introduction**
**Come move the world with us!**
Wake up each day to be part of a
**global movement**
. A movement to make an impact. A movement to go for it! A movement to provide best-in class solutions. A movement to be empowered. A movement to do the right thing.
  
  
Make AIT Worldwide Logistics the next stop on your career journey!
  
  
See what our teammates say about working at AIT Worldwide Logistics .
  
  
**Overview**
Manager – Planning & Business Solutions for Energy & Projects vertical supports the execution and delivery of AIT’s Energy & Projects (E&P) solutions strategy within the IMEA region. The role focuses on commercial execution, customer support, operational coordination, and product deployment, contributing to sustainable and profitable growth in line with regional and corporate objectives.
  
  
The Manager partners closely with the Director – Energy & Projects, regional leadership, and cross‑functional teams to support business development initiatives, ensure operational excellence, and maintain strong relationships with customers and service providers involved in complex Energy and Project logistics solutions.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Lead and coordinate end‑to‑end execution of Energy, Oil & Gas, and Project Cargo movements across India & Middle East region, ensuring safety, regulatory compliance, and on‑time delivery.
* Serve as the operational and technical subject‑matter expert for Energy & Project cargo, including OOG, breakbulk, modules, skids, and engineered movements supporting upstream, midstream, and downstream projects.
* Manage routing, carrier selection, vessel planning, equipment configuration, permits, surveys, and method‑of‑transport execution in alignment with approved SOPs, HSE plans, and EPC requirements.
* Coordinate carriers, heavy‑haul and SPMT providers, ports, terminals, yards, and third‑party service providers to ensure capacity availability, service continuity, and effective risk mitigation in Oil & Gas environments.
* Monitor shipment‑ and project‑level cost performance, supporting margin integrity and compliance with approved commercial frameworks and customer contractual requirements.
* Support tender execution for Energy & Oil & Gas projects through operational feasibility assessments, execution methodology reviews, and pricing inputs within defined authority limits.
* Collaborate with regional pricing and procurement teams to validate rates, equipment availability, and market conditions, sharing intelligence on carrier capacity and cost drivers within the Energy sector.
* Track operational KPIs related to safety, schedule adherence, cost control, and execution quality, implementing corrective actions for deviations.
* Act as a first‑level operational escalation point for complex, high‑risk, or cross‑border Energy & Project shipments, including shutdowns, critical-path cargo, and remote site deliveries.
* Ensure full compliance with HSE, DG, project QA/QC standards, and customer‑specific Oil & Gas and Energy project requirements.
* Collaborate with regional leadership, sales, engineering, and operations teams to improve execution capability, standardization, and delivery performance across Energy & Projects programs.

**Qualifications**

* A team player who works well with others – being respectful to our teammates is a Core Value!
* A strong work ethic with an appreciation for ownership, independence, accountability and autonomy in your role.
* Growth mindset – being passionate about your craft, always looking for ways to improve yourself and the company, being open to change and doing things differently.
* Customer service focus – we serve a wide variety of customers, both internal and external, and building relationships is a part of our culture!

**Other Skills We Hope To See**

* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent professional experience.
* 8–12 years of experience in logistics, freight forwarding, or project cargo, within Energy or Industrial Projects.
* Experience supporting P&L performance, pricing, or commercial activities.
* Exposure to Air, Ocean, and Project logistics operations.
* Experience working across multiple stakeholders and geographies preferred.
* Strong coordination, communication, and problem‑solving skills.
* Process‑oriented with attention to detail and compliance requirements.
* Demonstrate a great deal of initiative and a strong hands-on mentality
* High customer and service orientation
* High ability to work under pressure in a matrix environment and willingness to travel
* Demonstrates sound judgment and the ability to operate effectively in complex, high‑risk environments.

**About AIT Worldwide**
AIT Worldwide Logistics is a global freight forwarder that helps its customers grow by expanding access to markets all over the world where they can sell and/or procure raw materials, components, and finished goods. For more than 40 years, the America’s-based supply chain solutions leader has relied on a consultative approach to build a global network and trusted partnerships in nearly every industry, including aerospace, automotive, consumer retail, food, government, healthcare, high-tech, industrial and life sciences. Backed by scalable, user-friendly technology, AIT’s flexible business model customizes door-to-door deliveries via sea, air, ground, and rail—on time and on budget. With expert teammates staffing more than 100 worldwide locations in Asia, Europe, India, and North America, AIT’s full-service options also include customs clearance, warehouse management and white glove services. Learn more about AIT Worldwide Logistics, our culture and core values in action here .
  
  
**What AIT Can Offer You**
In addition to base compensation, AIT offers a growing suite of competitive benefits to help our teammates realize their full financial, well-being, personal and professional potential.
  
  
**AIT Worldwide Logistics Benefits Available Across All Global Markets**

* Vacation/holiday time
* Global employee support program
* Mindfulness tools
* Professional development
* Company events and gatherings
* Five paid volunteer hours through our AIT Cares program

Our competitive employee benefits packages may vary by region and country.

data.title: Head of IT Delivery & Business Enablement - Corporate and Support
data.raw_snippet:
**MAIN OBJECTIVE OF ROLE**
To manage business relationship with the internal customers at C-level and department heads, align IT with the business strategy, understand and translate customer needs to ensure delivery of all IT products and services to the businesses in a timely and cost-effective man
data.jd_text:
**MAIN OBJECTIVE OF ROLE**
To manage business relationship with the internal customers at C-level and department heads, align IT with the business strategy, understand and translate customer needs to ensure delivery of all IT products and services to the businesses in a timely and cost-effective manner based on defined standards and quality criteria.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Establishes an appropriate and cost-effective IT and application strategy for each business unit to support the business strategy and flydubai growth plans.
* Provides leadership across a cross-functional set of teams consisting of Business and System analysts, Solution Architects, Software Engineers, Application and Business support, and scouts best of breed solutions and be the enabler in providing competitive advantage to the business by early adoption of cutting-edge technologies.
* Develops and maintains working relationships with Chiefs and department heads through regular direct interactions, acting as the single point of contact for all IT related matters to the business, agreeing on action plans to address any concerns and allocate team resources accordingly.
* Provides strategic direction to Business alignment, Software Engineering and Support teams in defining and delivery of annual work programme, monitoring and reviewing key business cases for all major investments to ensure they are cost effective and resolves conflicts and work with the business portfolio stakeholders to set priorities within the portfolio.
* Ensures that service level objectives are agreed with the business for all relevant services, conduct regular service reviews and ensure performance against service levels manages escalations related to service levels, and ensures business continuity plans are in place for all critical operations.
* Provides relevant inputs on business requirements to IT Strategy & Enterprise Architecture to ensure alignment with IT Strategy in selection of technologies and design that is future proof and fit for purpose, provides competitive advantage, and delivers business value.
* Owns ultimate responsibility for IT deliveries to the business by monitoring project milestones, costs, and key risks, actively participating in steering group decisions, and promptly resolving escalated issues to ensure customer satisfaction and successful execution.
* Contributes to IT leadership by supporting build-versus-buy decisions, assists in the sourcing best-of-breed solutions aligned with the mobile-first, cloud-first, and digital-first strategy, and by assisting in the negotiations of SLAs, managing vendor relationships through regular service reviews, and escalating service issues to Chief levels when required.
* Promotes business synergies and drive a proactive culture of innovation, along with detailed business knowledge and understanding the direction of the business and the industry as well as the evolution of technology.
* Drives service improvement programmes that bring in cost efficiencies and reduce time to market, and identifies technology improvement, optimisation and replacement initiatives, implement and drive effective resource management to optimise resource utilization and cost.
* Establishes career development plans, training for direct reportees and provide appropriate mentoring and coaching, by conducting timely annual and interim performance reviews and set SMART objectives to cultivate a culture of high performance, ensuring that the team develops requisite level of customer and technical knowledge to effectively manage business relationships.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor's Degree (3+ years)
* Bachelor’s Degree or Honours in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field. Master's degree in engineering or MBA is preferred
* Fluent in English
* 10+ yrs experience of IT Management, Product/Project delivery and Transformation programs. Experience in leading large IT teams comprising Business analysts, solution architects Software Engineering, application, and business support
* Airline Industry knowledge and awareness of emerging technologies
* Years with qualifications: 10 - 12years
* PMP and SAFe certifications

**COMPETENCIES**

* Customer Focus
* Teamwork
* Effective Communication
* Personal Accountability & Commitment to achieve
* Resilience & Flexibility (Can do attitude)
* Inspiring & Developing Others
* Decision Making
* Strategic Thinking
* Business Acumen

**Isr Requirements**
Reads and complies with the ISR policies of the Company and diligently reports any weakness or incidents to the respective Line Manager or the Information Security team. Completes all required ISR awareness sessions and follows associated guidelines in the day-to-day business operations.

data.jd_text:
**Senior Relationship Manager (External Asset Management)**

**Location: DIFC**

**Salary:**
AED 40,000 - AED 70,000 plus strong commission and 50/50 split on book of business brought over.

**Important:**
Our client are interested in candidates who have worked in London, Switzerland (Geneva/Zurich) and similar locations who have experience working with leading banking institutions or asset management firms and have built a client book of assets they manage

**Company Overview**

The firm is a Dubai based, DFSA regulated investment and advisory business providing bespoke investment solutions to high net worth and institutional clients. The firm focuses on disciplined investment strategies, long term capital growth, and client centric advice across public and private markets, working closely with strategic partners to access differentiated investment opportunities.

**Role Overview**

The Senior Relationship Manager is responsible for leading client relationship initiatives, driving business growth, and ensuring the delivery of high quality investment and advisory services. The role focuses on strategic client engagement, business development, and the ongoing development of tailored investment solutions aligned with client objectives and market opportunities.

Acting as a senior liaison between clients, partners, and internal teams, the Senior Director plays a key role in strengthening client relationships, enhancing market presence, and supporting sustainable revenue growth.

The ideal candidate should have AUM of $40,000,000+ and will come from an asset management or institutional investment background, with strong exposure to portfolio construction, investment strategy, and client advisory at a sophisticated level. Experience working with high net worth or institutional clients is essential, alongside the ability to articulate investment ideas, market views, and portfolio outcomes with credibility and clarity.

Candidates from a wealth management background may also be considered, provided they have worked in a discretionary or advisory led environment with complex client needs, and can demonstrate genuine investment depth rather than a purely sales driven approach. The role requires an individual who is commercially minded, comfortable engaging senior clients, and capable of bridging investment strategy with relationship management in a regulated, institutional setting.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Client Relationship & Advisory Management**

Build, maintain, and deepen relationships with existing and prospective clients through proactive engagement and trusted advisory support.

Provide tailored investment advice and solutions aligned with client objectives, risk profiles, and prevailing market conditions.

Conduct regular in-person and virtual client meetings, including proactive portfolio reviews at least every six months.

Serve as a senior point of contact for client inquiries, ensuring timely, professional, and high quality responses.

Address and resolve client issues or complaints efficiently, coordinating with internal teams where required.

Educate clients on the firm’s investment philosophy, strategies, and product offering.

**Strategic & Business Development**

Contribute to the formulation and execution of the firm’s business development and client acquisition strategy.

Research and analyse market conditions, investment opportunities, and macroeconomic trends to support informed client advice and strategic decision making.

Identify opportunities for business growth, strategic partnerships, and product development.

Collaborate closely with internal teams to ensure alignment between client strategies, investment execution, and operational delivery.

Support initiatives aimed at improving client experience, operational efficiency, and long term commercial performance.

**Performance, Organisation & Leadership**

Operate with a high level of organisation and efficiency, managing multiple priorities while delivering against agreed KPIs and revenue targets.

Demonstrate initiative and autonomy in expanding client relationships and generating new business opportunities.

Participate in ongoing professional development through training, workshops, and industry engagement.

**Compliance & Governance**

Ensure full compliance with internal policies, procedures, and the firm’s code of ethics and professional conduct.

Adhere at all times to DFSA regulatory requirements and applicable compliance standards.

**Education & Qualifications**

Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or a related discipline.

Master’s degree (MBA or equivalent) preferred.

Professional qualifications such as CFA, CFP, or CAIA are advantageous.

data.jd_text:
Our client is looking for an experienced Strategic Assistant to the Managing Director to be based in Dubai, UAE.

As a strategic assistant, you will work directly with the Managing Director of the company. You will collaborate with different teams to make sure strategies/projects are on track and help guide the company in the right direction. Additionally, support the MD in decision making and ensure seamless delivery by providing strategic inputs and market intelligence around new challenges and opportunities. Overall, you play a pivotal role in keeping things run efficiently and ensure the focus is on the business goals

**Duties and responsibilities:**

* Act as a liaison between the Managing Director, Senior leadership and external agencies regarding operations, project updates, proposals, planning and employee well-being.
* Establish reporting mechanism between different business entities & MD’s office and ensure

continued operations across different businesses and geographies.

* Build business review metrics/indicators, collect reports, analytics on business performance and periodic review
* Ensure business continuity and sustainability by actively supporting the MD with insights &

mechanisms to improve performance and bringing robustness in the business

* Perform & present detailed data analysis on performance, market research, business plan &

scorecards and any other business intelligence to the company board

* Identify, strategize & execute the initiatives and special projects as directed by the Managing Director.
* Conduct & analyse an extensive market study & provide insight on the trends and opportunities to leverage new services that aligns & enhances the organization’s strategic goals.
* Collaborate with executives in decision-making, program management and implementation of various organization-level initiatives.
* Propose, build, and nurture collaborative partnerships with external stakeholders/agencies

**Education & Skills required:**

* Graduate in Finance/ Engineer in Electrical/Electronics and/or Masters (Major in
* Strategy/Finance) from one of the Premium B Schools (ISB, IIM - A, IIM - C or IIM -B)
* 4 to 5 years of experience preferably in Automobile industry
* Prior work experience in a start-up firm is preferred
* Strong stakeholder management, interpersonal & influencing skills and organising skills
* Excellent communicator in written and verbal form.
* Analytical thinking and data-driven decision-making capabilities
* Exposure in business analytics and reporting is a plus
* Hands on experience in reporting & statistical tools is required
* Proficient with MS Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook) and familiarity with project

management tools

data.jd_text:
**Director, Data Center Platform Delivery (Lifecycle | Process | Systems)**

Role Focus: Process, Workflow & Playbooks

Location: Dubai (preferred, remote can be discussed)

Relocation: Open to global candidates

Seniority: Director - Senior Director

**Role Overview**

A global data center developer is seeking a senior leader to codify and standardize the end‑to‑end data center development and operations lifecycle. This role focuses
**on turning complex new‑build delivery into a repeatable playbook**
- defining processes, workflows, governance, and systems from early planning through design, construction, commissioning, and steady‑state operations to support scalable growth.

**Key Responsibilities**

**1) Day Zero - Planning & Strategy**

* Standardize processes for site selection, feasibility, and early‑stage decision‑making
* Integrate commercial, regulatory, sustainability, and risk inputs into structured workflows

**2) Day One - Design & Construction Enablement**

* Establish design and construction governance, stage gates, and delivery workflows
* Ensure builds are optimized for operability, modularity, and long‑term scalability

**3) Day Two - Operating Model & Readiness**

* Define operational processes, KPIs, and governance for reliability, maintenance, and capacity
* Enable data‑driven and analytics‑led operations

**4) Lifecycle Playbooks & Workflow Integration**

* Map and streamline workflows across planning, procurement, build, commissioning, and handover
* Create repeatable playbooks and operating models for multi‑site deployment

**5) Systems & Digital Enablement**

* Define and implement lifecycle systems (project controls, asset/facilities, capacity, commissioning)
* Drive integration between design, build, and operations platforms

**6) Governance & Scale**

* Embed risk management, compliance, and change control into workflows
* Drive continuous improvement as the platform expands

**Candidate Profile**

* Strong background in data centers, mission‑critical infrastructure, or large‑scale platforms
* Proven experience building processes, workflows, and operating playbooks
* Exposure across planning, design, build, commissioning, and operations
* Systems‑oriented, structured, and comfortable operating across technical and executive stakeholders
* Successfully expanded new build data center to new region/territory
* **Current/Prior working experience in a data center developer / operator (core requirement)**

**Working Model**

* Preferred: Based in Dubai
* Alternatives: Remote or Thailand‑based
* Relocation support available

If you are interested, kindly apply with your updated English CV, detailing your relevant Data Center experience. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

**Contact: Keith Ng (Lic. No R2093574 / EA No. 16S8194)**

data.title: Service Account Delivery Manager_Algeria based
data.raw_snippet: G+D makes the lives of billions of people around the world more secure. We create trust in the digital age with integrated security technologies in three business areas: Digital Security, Financial Platforms and Currency Technology. We have been a reliable partner for our customers for over 170 year
data.jd_text:
G+D makes the lives of billions of people around the world more secure. We create trust in the digital age with integrated security technologies in three business areas: Digital Security, Financial Platforms and Currency Technology. We have been a reliable partner for our customers for over 170 years with our innovative solutions for SecurityTech! We are an international technology group and traditional family business with over 14,000 employees in 40 countries. Creating Confidence is our path to success. Trust is the basis of our co-operation within G+D.
  
  
The whole world trusts us when it comes to physical or digital currencies. We increase the security and efficiency of the cash cycle in collaboration with central banks and the entire currency industry. As the market leader in advanced currency management, would you like to join us in shaping the future of payments?
  
  
**Scope and Purpose:**

* The Service Account Delivery Manager is responsible for overseeing and managing all service-related aspects from the implementation, to the maintenance-phase of G+D Solution projects, providing input in regards to service delivery to other project stakeholders in the offer phase, ensuring service readiness, supporting a seamless hand-over of the customer solution to the service delivery engine to ensure a smooth start the service operation with the site acceptance and overseeing the delivery in the after sales phase.
* This role is critical in defining the service delivery strategy that complements the overall project objectives, managed by the Service Offer Manager and Solution Project Manager. The Service Account Delivery Manager ensures that the services are implemented and meet the highest standards of quality and efficiency, ultimately enhancing customer satisfaction and project success.
* The role requires close collaboration with Service and Solution Sales.

**Roles & Responsibilities:**

* Offer Phase: Service Delivery Model Definition: Develop and define a comprehensive service delivery model tailored to the project's specific needs and customer requirements. Providing input for service related costing. Collaborate with Service Offer Manager in Service Sales to ensure alignment between the service models, service pricing and the overall project deliverables. 3rd Party Service Supplier and Service Subcontractor Selection: Directing requirements for a supplier selection to ensure timely delivery of services and compliance with contractual terms in cooperation with the regional Subcontractor Manager. Identify and evaluate potential subcontractors who can meet the project's service requirements in alignment with the 3rd Party Service Product Manager and the regional Subcontractor Manager. Support the selection process, owned by Purchasing department, based on criteria such as capability, cost, quality, and reliability.
* Implementation Phase: Backup Service Related Tasks: Interface Management for all service related aspects between onsite teams (Field Service) and remote teams (Care Center, Service Sales, Service Backbone Operation) during the buildup phase. Initiating back-to-back agreements with suppliers according to the defined service delivery model for each solution element. Establish delivery processes based on decided legal setup for Order Management, 3rd Party services, Training and adaptation services in cooperation with Service Backbone Operation, leveraging standard wherever possible. Assure optimized service inventories in cooperation with Service Backbone Operation Subcontractor Contract Creation: Providing technical input for drafting and finalizing contracts with selected subcontractors, ensuring all service specifications and quality standards are clearly defined. Work closely with 3rd Party Service Product Manager, regional Subcontractor Manager, Legal and Purchasing department to ensure contracts are comprehensive and protect the interests of the organization. Ramp-up of Service Employees: Oversee the recruitment and onboarding process for service team members. Ensure that service teams are appropriately staffed to meet project demands and timelines. Trainings for Service Employees: Identify skill gaps and develop training programs to enhance the competencies of service employees (internal and external), leveraging the G+D Training Curriculum wherever possible. Coordinate and oversee the execution of training sessions, ensuring that all service employees are equipped with the necessary skills and knowledge. Trainings for Customers: Identify training needs for customers. Coordinate and oversee the execution of training sessions, ensuring that the customer is trained for all relevant components. Leverage the G+D Training Curriculum and Global Training infrastructure wherever possible. Coordination of Installation Related Tasks: Coordinate, plan and manage the installation of the G+D Solution in close alignment with the Solution Project Manager. Oversee the onsite service teams to ensure that installations are completed on time and meet all quality standards. Site Acceptance Related Tasks: Ensure the successful transition from project to maintenance phase for all service related tasks. Manage the handover of responsibilities from the solution to the service team Reporting and Documentation: Maintain comprehensive documentation of all service processes and adjustments made during implementation phase. Provide input to project reports on service status, challenges, and achievements. Feedback and Improvement: Plan and conduct with reached SAT (Site Acceptance Test) the project closure process including the required lessons-learned activities.
* Warranty and after warranty phase Service Initialization: Monitoring the closure of open items from project phase to completely hand-over the solution into a maintenance phase. Assist the Field Service, Support and Backbone Operation teams during Hyper Care phase. Implement continuous improvement initiatives to enhance service quality and customer satisfaction. Performance Management: Coordination of all activities needed to deliver committed service scope with high performance. Customer Management: Interface to the customer for technical discussions. Manage customer escalations and drive timely solution deliveries using the entire backup organization. Single Point of Contact: Overall coordination of delivering committed scope with respective delivery units (Field Service, Support, Training, Repair, Order Management, Adaptation) Contract Renewal: Support Service Sales during contract negotiation and renewal phase Setting Up and providing Service Fulfillment and commercial related Contract reporting based on committed scope Key Performance Indicators - KPI (generic), individual targets will be agreed yearly Financials (To succeed financially, what should we deliver to our stakeholders?) Target Margin per annum overachieved [%] + [€] Operational (To satisfy our shareholders and customers, what business processes should we excel at?) Project completion within scope, timeline and quality Field Service and Support Delivery – Global KPIs Customer Satisfaction (To achieve our vision, how should we appear to our customers?) Successful Site Acceptance (SAT) Customer Satisfaction (C-SAT) Index

**Requirements:**

* Personality / Skills / Professional Qualification & Experience
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, or a related field
