data.jd_text:
**Keeta**
is an independent brand of Meituan, the world's largest tech-driven retail company. We are revolutionizing the food delivery space as a dynamic and innovative global platform, leveraging cutting-edge technology to provide fast, reliable, and seamless food delivery experiences. With the mission
**"We help people eat better, live better,"**
Keeta launched in 2023 and has rapidly expanded across key regions, including Hong Kong and now the Middle East and Brazil.

Are you passionate about revolutionizing customer service in the takeaway industry? Do you have a knack for designing seamless service journeys that cater to users, merchants, and riders alike? If so, we have an exciting opportunity for you!

We’re looking for a strategic, execution-focused leader to drive the evolution of our global customer service experience. In this role, you’ll own the end-to-end service journey—building scalable capabilities, optimizing cost and efficiency, and delivering measurable impact.

**What You’ll Do**

**1. Drive Performance Excellence**

* Own key outcomes across cost, efficiency, and customer experience.
* Ensure initiatives are implemented with strong follow-through and deliver visible, measurable, and scalable results.

**2. Lead Cross-Functional Execution**

* Manage complex, cross-team projects across Product, CE Operations, and Regional teams.
* Align stakeholders on priorities and targets, allocate resources effectively, manage trade-offs, and proactively mitigate risks to ensure on-time delivery.
* Act as the owner of execution, ensuring initiatives are delivered with speed and quality.

**Why Keeta?**

* Innovation-Driven: Keeta uses the advanced technology solutions to disrupt the traditional food delivery landscape, making every order smarter and faster.
* Fast-Growing & Dynamic: Keeta is expanding quickly, offering endless opportunities for personal and professional growth.
* Global Impact: Join a company that’s transforming the way people enjoy food, impacting communities around the world.

**What We are looking for**

* Bachelor’s degree or above
* 10+ years of experience in product operations, strategy, or service operations
* Strong analytical skills with a focus on problem-solving and root cause analysis (SQL proficiency preferred)
* Proven ability to drive execution in complex, fast-paced environments
* Strong ownership, resilience, and ability to work under pressure
* **Fluency in both English and Chinese is mandatory**

Ready to make an impact? Apply now & let’s shape the future together!

**Location: Beijing, China**

Interested? Apply now

#Keeta #FoodDelivery #HeadOfExperience #CustomerExperience #ServiceDelivery #OperationsLeadership #Hiring #Southeast Asian

data.title: Interface Stakeholder Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
WSP in the Middle East is currently hiring for an Interface & Stakeholder Manager – Aviation Projects to join our team in KSA/ UAE. The Interface & Stakeholder Manager will be responsible for managing all project interfaces across aviation ‑ sector stakeholders, including governm
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
WSP in the Middle East is currently hiring for an Interface & Stakeholder Manager – Aviation Projects to join our team in KSA/ UAE. The Interface & Stakeholder Manager will be responsible for managing all project interfaces across aviation ‑ sector stakeholders, including governmental authorities, airport operators, contractors, consultants, utility providers, and internal technical teams. The role ensures seamless coordination, clear communication, and the timely resolution of interface issues that may affect programme delivery. It also involves developing and implementing structured stakeholder engagement plans to maintain alignment, avoid conflicts, and support smooth project execution. The Manager will provide regular reporting to the Project Director, highlighting interface risks, dependencies, and mitigation strategies critical to the success of the aviation programme.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Lead and manage all interface activities across aviation stakeholders (government bodies, airport operators, contractors, consultants, utilities, and internal teams).
* Establish and maintain effective communication channels to ensure seamless coordination between all project parties.
* Identify, track, and resolve interface issues that could affect project progress, technical delivery, or schedule performance.
* Develop, implement, and maintain structured Stakeholder Engagement Plans to ensure alignment throughout all project phases.
* Facilitate interface workshops, coordination meetings, and technical discussions with project stakeholders.
* Liaise with regulatory authorities and airport operators to ensure compliance with aviation and infrastructure requirements.
* Prepare regular interface status reports and provide interface ‑ risk updates to the Project Director and leadership team.
* Maintain a comprehensive interface register, ensuring risks, dependencies, and actions are clearly documented and managed.
* Support integration between design, procurement, and construction teams, ensuring all disciplines are aligned.

Promote a collaborative working environment across multidisciplinary teams
  
  
**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Project Management, or a relevant field.
* 20+ years of experience in interface management, stakeholder management, or project coordination within large ‑ scale aviation or major infrastructure projects.
* Experience working with airport authorities, regulatory bodies, or large PMC/consultancy organisations (highly preferred).
* Strong technical understanding of aviation infrastructure, design processes, construction interfaces, and multi ‑ party coordination.
* Proven track record resolving complex interface issues in fast ‑ paced project environments.

Imagine a better future for you and a better future for us all.
  
  
Join our close-knit community of talented individuals who share your passion for making a positive impact. Our global team includes more than 69,000 employees, working together to make a difference in communities both close to home and around the world.
  
  
**With us, you can**
. Apply today.

data.raw_snippet:
**About:**

Alef Group is a pioneer in developing premier lifestyle communities, destinations, and experiences through investment and strategic joint ventures, and is seeking a bilingual and experienced
**Senior Manager - Retail Delivery**
to lead and manage the end-to-end delivery of retail and mal
data.jd_text:
**About:**

Alef Group is a pioneer in developing premier lifestyle communities, destinations, and experiences through investment and strategic joint ventures, and is seeking a bilingual and experienced
**Senior Manager - Retail Delivery**
to lead and manage the end-to-end delivery of retail and mall development projects and join the team in Sharjah.

**Job Purpose:**

The
**Senior Manager – Retail Delivery**
will lead and manage the end-to-end delivery of retail and mall development projects, ensuring timely execution, cost efficiency, quality compliance, and alignment with commercial leasing strategies, thereby enabling successful asset activation and revenue generation.

**Key Accountabilities:**

* Lead the planning and execution of retail development projects to ensure delivery within approved timelines, budgets, and quality standards.
* Coordinate with design, leasing, and commercial teams to align project delivery with tenant requirements and leasing strategies, ensuring optimized retail mix and occupancy readiness.
* Manage consultants, contractors, and suppliers to ensure adherence to contractual obligations, specifications, and project milestones.
* Oversee the review and approval of design drawings, shop drawings, and material submittals to ensure compliance with project standards and retail functionality.
* Drive value engineering initiatives to optimize project costs without compromising quality, functionality, or brand positioning.
* Monitor project progress through regular reporting and site inspections to identify risks and implement corrective actions for timely completion.
* Ensure compliance with local authority regulations, health & safety standards, and statutory approvals to achieve smooth project execution and handover.
* Facilitate tenant coordination and fit-out processes to ensure timely store openings and seamless integration into the mall environment.
* Control project budgets and cash flow forecasts to ensure financial discipline and alignment with approved business plans.
* Implement project governance frameworks, policies, and procedures to enhance operational efficiency and risk mitigation.
* Support asset management and operations teams during project handover to ensure smooth transition and operational readiness.

Engage stakeholders, including senior management, investors, and partners, through regular updates to ensure transparency and alignment.

**Educational Qualifications, Work Experience, and Skills Required:**

**Educational Qualifications:**

* Must have a Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering, Architecture, Construction Management, or a related field (mandatory).
* Master’s Degree in Project Management or Business Administration (preferred).
* Professional certifications such as PMP (Project Management Professional), MRICS, or equivalent is highly preferred.
* Relevant certifications in health & safety (e.g., NEBOSH) are an advantage.

**Work Experience:**

* Must have a minimum of 12–15 years of experience in real estate development and construction with at least 5 years in a leadership role managing retail, mall, or mixed-use developments.
* Must have proven experience in delivering large-scale retail projects (shopping malls, retail centers, lifestyle destinations) in the UAE or GCC region.
* Must have a strong exposure to tenant coordination, retail fitouts, and leasing integration.
* Should have demonstrated experience in managing end-to-end project lifecycle from concept to handover.

**Skills required:**

* Strong knowledge of retail development lifecycle and mall operations requirements.
* Expertise in project management methodologies, budgeting, and cost control.
* Familiarity with UAE regulatory frameworks, authority approvals, and compliance standards.
* Ability to review and interpret technical drawings and specifications.
* Strong leadership and team management skills.
* Excellent stakeholder management and communication abilities.
* Strategic thinking with strong commercial acumen.
* Problem-solving mindset with proactive risk management capabilities.
* High attention to detail and quality orientation.
* Proficiency in project management software (e.g., Primavera P6, MS Project).
* Strong working knowledge of MS Office Suite.
* Familiarity with ERP systems and reporting tools is an advantage.

data.title: Senior Design Manager | Hotel Project Must
data.raw_snippet: The DM cum SPM will be responsible for leading both the design management and project execution oversight of a hospitality development project. The role ensures that all design deliverables, stakeholder requirements, authority approvals, and construction activities are delivered in line with project
data.jd_text:
The DM cum SPM will be responsible for leading both the design management and project execution oversight of a hospitality development project. The role ensures that all design deliverables, stakeholder requirements, authority approvals, and construction activities are delivered in line with project objectives, budget, quality standards, and timelines.

Key Responsibilities

1. Design Management

Lead and manage the full design lifecycle from concept to IFC stage

Coordinate with architects, interior designers, MEP consultants, and specialist consultants

Ensure design compliance with hospitality brand standards (hotel operator requirements)

Review and validate design deliverables for quality, coordination, and constructability

Manage design changes, value engineering, and design optimization initiatives

Facilitate design workshops and stakeholder review meetings

2. Project Management (PMC Role)

Act as PMC representative for overall project execution coordination

Monitor project schedule, milestones, and critical path activities

Ensure alignment between design intent and site execution

Oversee contractor performance and construction progress

Manage RFIs, technical queries, and site coordination issues

Lead risk identification and mitigation strategies

3. Stakeholder & Authority Coordination

Liaise with hotel operator / brand representatives for design approvals

Coordinate with Sharjah Municipality and other regulatory authorities

Manage client reporting, dashboards, and project progress updates

Conduct regular progress meetings with consultants and contractors

4. Contract & Commercial Awareness

Support review of variation orders and design-related claims

Work closely with commercial teams on cost impact of design changes

Ensure compliance with contract requirements and PMC scope

5. Quality, Compliance & HSE

Ensure adherence to local UAE building codes and hospitality standards

Monitor quality assurance processes during design and construction stages

Support HSE compliance in coordination with site teams

Required Qualifications

Bachelor’s Degree in Architecture / Civil Engineering / Construction Management (Master’s preferred)

15–20+ years of experience in construction/project management

Strong hospitality project experience (hotels, resorts, serviced apartments)

Prior PMC experience in UAE or GCC mandatory

Experience working with international hotel operators (Hilton, Marriott, Accor, etc.)\*

data.title: Senior Manager - Retail Leasing
data.raw_snippet: The role holder is responsible for managing the leasing activities of the assigned cluster of retail destinations under DHAM Retail to maximize the growth of leasing revenues. The role holder is responsible for leading and guiding the team in identifying, attracting, and closing business development
data.jd_text:
The role holder is responsible for managing the leasing activities of the assigned cluster of retail destinations under DHAM Retail to maximize the growth of leasing revenues. The role holder is responsible for leading and guiding the team in identifying, attracting, and closing business development opportunities across the retail portfolio, including both new and current clients. The role holder is also responsible for providing a seamless customer service process for clients to improve customer satisfaction, customer retention & achievement of overall revenue targets across the portfolio.

**Strategic Responsibilities:**

* Support the Director – Retail Leasing in developing the Retail leasing strategy and plan in line with the overall Retail strategy to ensure all retail assets are fully leased in line with the tenancy mix and earn the desired returns to meet the overall targets for the retail function.
* Identify, prioritize and project manage strategic initiatives that span but are not limited to business development, key industry segment and customer targeting initiatives, operational efficiency initiatives, tenant acquisitions, policy and process introduction, and enhancement initiatives.
* Review and implement leasing strategies merchandising/ tenant mix / new developments for the assigned cluster
* Support the Director – retail leasing in producing systems, tools and processes that improve DHAM retail leasing efficiency and ensure that all Group stakeholders receive timely, accurate and comprehensive information which allows them to make informed decisions.

**Core Responsibilities:**

**Budgetary Support**

* Support the Director – Retail Leasing to prepare, consolidate, and forecast the commercial budget and monitor financial performance versus the budget so that the business is aware of anticipated costs/revenues; areas of unsatisfactory performance are identified, and potential performance improvement opportunities are capitalized upon in line with the forecasts and assuring budget accuracy.
* Review market trends and market research information in order to develop the overall budget forecast in line with company objectives and continually review against actuals to ensure targets are being achieved to take action in case of any variances.
* Support the Director – retail leasing on year-on-year revenue growth strategy.

**Commercial Operations**

* Manage the leasing services for all DHAM retail portfolios and ensure proper planning and execution of activities to maximize occupancy rate and ensure the highest revenue return on the assets.
* Meet revenue and occupancy targets and ensure all pipelines and deals are closed. Oversee and drive the leasing team activities and ensure they are motivated and driven to hit their targets.
* Plan and monitor the life cycle of leasing activities for each offering/unit to ensure optimum staff utilization and effective business closure.
* Research, analyze and make recommendations concerning prospective tenants for Malls / Retail Destinations / Community Centers based on client financial strength, tenant mix, and return on investment. Provide recommendations to the Retail Tenant Selection Committee & Asset Management committee on proposals submitted.
* Pursue local and international tenants within the targeted use categories via regular and systematic canvassing, cold calling, and networking.
* Develop overall market research on brands not present in the UAE and high/unique brands to attract and connect with them and introduce them to DHAM for leasing.
* Negotiate new leases and acquire new business opportunities based on prevailing market rates, evaluate properties, lease rents, and available properties to achieve revenue targets. Understand and recommend the Lease rent trends and their viability for different retailer categories.
* Coordinate with the lease admin team to ensure renewals, leasing documents and payments are issued and received in a timely manner.
* Ensure all leasing activities are incorporated through YARDI or other available platforms.
* Implement the leasing plan and escalate as appropriate to correct deviation from the plan to respond effectively and quickly to any change in the business environment.
* Ensure maximum efficiency of the sales function to achieve targets as well as minimize opportunity loss & revenue loss.
* Identify and develop potential business opportunities, handle major accounts, negotiate major deals with clients, and build short-term/long-term business relationships to meet tangible objectives and targets for growth.
* Work closely with Specialty Leasing on an overall leasing strategy to avoid duplication of concepts/brands and over-saturation of common areas.
* Establish and maintain a strong network with existing brands through ongoing communication and contact with store management and brand headquarters staff.
* Contribute to developing pricing modelling in conjunction with Corporate Strategy and Finance to recommend competitive pricing of product offerings that maximizes the IRR.
* Work with the marketing team to establish new marketing channels and enhance the reach of current channels to improve the return on marketing spend.
* Plan and monitor monthly leasing reports to meet financial targets. Review and recommend corrective actions based on the reports prepared for sales to monitor and review the company's performance against key performance indicators to highlight any variances to Management for corrective action.
* Ensure continuous improvement of leasing practices considering ‘international best practice’, changes in international standards, and changes in the business environment which demand proactive action plans.
* Ensure compliance with Dubai Holding Code of Conduct, department policies and HC policies and procedures at all times.

**Key Relationship Management**

* Manage client relationships and relationships with key commercial contacts and market players within the retail and seek expansion opportunities, ensuring the team conducts regular client visits to achieve assigned revenue and customer satisfaction targets.
* Drive the development and maintenance of effective key business relationships with all relevant external/internal entities with the highest standards of business ethics whilst promptly attending to all critical issues in order to ensure the services required by the organization are delivered most effectively.

**Policies, Processes, Systems, Procedures, and Controls**

* Lead and direct the development and implementation of ‘best-in-class’ processes across all DHAM Retail functions, including external benchmarking, reviewing, and drafting brand new processes to cater to a range of partners in coordination with the Business Excellence team.
* Collaborate with Finance to develop sales payment policies for complicated transactions to reflect the realistic scale of the payments and ensure the policy is implemented effectively though out the project cycle.
* Understand and recommend the lease rent trends and their viability for different retailer categories and provide suggestions to the Research & Product Development team.

**Customer Experience Management**

* Drive the customer experience management model to maximize and enhance the customer acquisition and retention rate.
* Oversee the customer satisfaction survey results for Retail leasing and ensure appropriate corrective actions are taken within the stipulated time per the agreed priorities.
* Provide leadership within the function, setting individual objectives, managing performance, developing and motivating staff, and providing formal and informal feedback and appraisal to maximize subordinate and departmental performance in the pursuit of the Department’s objectives.
* Build and promote an organizational culture that encourages innovation and rewards performance, leading to enhanced staff motivation and retention.

**Minimum Qualification:**

Bachelor’s degree in the fields of Marketing / Business Administration

Chartered Surveyor certification/ member of the RICS preferred

**Experience:**

Minimum ten years of experience in retail leasing/sales with at least two years in a managerial-level position.

Middle East experience is preferred.

Technical Competencies

* Strong financial management and business acumen.
* Adept in revenue and cost analysis.
* Advanced analytical skills.
* Thorough knowledge of retail market/trends intelligence.
* Ability to manage the brokers/agents.
* Advanced negotiation & persuasion skills.
* Excellent customer relations and networking skills.
* Excellent interpersonal and leadership skills with the ability to lead teams in achieving results.

We are looking to hire an
**RPA Project Manager**
with experience in
**UiPath**
and
**PowerApps**
to lead and oversee RPA projects from initiation through deployment and support. This role involves
**collaborating with stakeholders, managing cross-functional teams, and ensuring the successful implementation of automation solutions**
to optimize business processes. Our client based in
**Dubai**
, is one of the
**largest semi-governmental companies in the region**
.

This position is a contract role with an initial duration of
**12 months**
and
**renewable**
.

**Key responsibilities:**

**Project Management:**

* Plan, initiate and execute RPA projects, including defining project scope, goals, deliverables, and timelines.
* Track project progress and ensure alignment with business objectives and timelines.

**Stakeholder Collaboration:**

* Partner with business stakeholders to identify automation opportunities and work closely with technical teams to design, develop, and implement RPA solutions using UiPath.

**Technical Leadership:**

* Provide technical expertise in RPA methodologies and UiPath, guiding the team to develop high-quality automation solutions that improve efficiency and reduce costs and maintain the RPA environment and make sure it is always up to date.

**Solution Development and Integration:**

* Leverage UiPath to design and deploy automated workflows.
* Integrate RPA solutions with other business applications and systems, including Microsoft PowerApps, to create user-friendly interfaces and automate repetitive tasks.

**Quality Assurance:**

* Ensure all RPA processes meet quality and compliance standards. Oversee testing, troubleshooting, and the resolution of any issues during development and post-implementation.

**Operational Oversight:**

* Manage the daily operations of RPA and PowerApps solutions, ensuring that all automated processes function smoothly and efficiently.
* Oversee scheduling, execution, and monitoring of RPA workflows to maintain system stability and performance.

**Support and Incident Management:**

* Act as the primary point of contact for escalations related to RPA issues, managing incidents and working closely with IT and support teams to ensure timely issue resolution.
* Lead root cause analysis and preventive measures for recurring issues.

**Vendor and Tool Management:**

* Manage relationships with vendors and tool providers, including UiPath and Microsoft PowerApps, to stay informed about new features, updates, and best practices.
* Oversee software updates and ensure all RPA tools are functioning optimally.

**Compliance and Security:**

* Ensure all RPA processes comply with security, data privacy, and compliance standards.
* Develop and enforce RPA governance policies to safeguard data integrity and minimize risks.

**Documentation and Reporting:**

* Create comprehensive documentation for RPA solutions and maintain project documentation.
* Provide regular status updates, performance reports, and project insights to stakeholders.

**Continuous Improvement:**

* Monitor automation performance and analyze results, identifying opportunities for optimization.
* Stay updated on RPA and PowerApps trends to ensure solutions leverage the latest capabilities and best practices.

**Knowledge, skills & experience:**

* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Systems, Engineering, or a related field.
* 5+ years of experience in RPA project management, with expertise in UiPath.
* Proven experience with Microsoft PowerApps for building custom applications and workflows.
* Strong project management skills, including experience with Agile or Scrum methodologies.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
* Analytical mindset with a strong ability to problem-solve and think strategically.
* Certifications in UiPath (UiPath Advanced RPA Developer or RPA Business Analyst).
* Familiarity with Microsoft Power Automate and other Microsoft Power Platform components.

**Availability:**

* Preference will be given to candidates available immediately or within 30 days of accepting the offer.

data.title: Commercial Director
data.raw_snippet:
Job Purpose Summary

The Commercial Director is responsible for leading the commercial and contractual management of the organisation’s real estate development portfolio, ensuring projects are delivered in line with approved budgets, commercial strategies, and corporate governance requirements. The
data.jd_text:
Job Purpose Summary

The Commercial Director is responsible for leading the commercial and contractual management of the organisation’s real estate development portfolio, ensuring projects are delivered in line with approved budgets, commercial strategies, and corporate governance requirements. The role oversees the full commercial lifecycle of developments, including feasibility cost planning, procurement strategy, tendering, contract administration, change management, claims resolution, and final account closure.

Operating across multiple projects within the UAE and, where required, across the wider GCC region, the role supports developments of significant capital value, typically including residential, hospitality, mixed-use, and master-planned projects. The Commercial Director safeguards the company’s commercial interests by implementing robust cost control processes, managing financial risk, and driving value engineering initiatives without compromising design intent, quality, or programme delivery.

The role provides strategic commercial input into procurement models, contract selection, and financial forecasting, supporting executive decision-making and investment performance. It also manages and coordinates external consultants, contractors, and internal project teams to ensure consistency in commercial governance, reporting, and contractual compliance.

The position operates with a high degree of autonomy, reporting to senior leadership, and provides oversight and mentorship to commercial team members. The role plays a key part in strengthening commercial governance frameworks and enhancing financial certainty across the organisation’s development pipeline.

1. Role Overview

The Commercial Director is responsible for establishing, implementing, and maintaining commercial management strategies across assigned development projects. The role ensures that projects are commercially viable, contractually compliant, and financially controlled throughout the development lifecycle, from project inception to final handover and close-out.

2. Key Responsibilities

Commercial Strategy & Governance

* Develop and implement project commercial strategies aligned with corporate development objectives.
* Establish cost management and commercial governance frameworks across projects.
* Provide commercial advice to senior management during investment and project approval stages.
* Ensure compliance with Delegation of Authority (DOA) and internal financial governance procedures.
* Support development of standard commercial procedures, templates, and best-practice guidelines.

Cost Planning & Budget Management

* Oversee preparation and validation of feasibility cost plans and development budgets.
* Monitor project financial performance against approved budgets and cost targets.
* Lead cost reporting, forecasting, and financial risk analysis.
* Ensure early identification and mitigation of cost overruns and financial exposure.
* Manage value engineering initiatives to enhance project profitability and cost efficiency.

Procurement & Contract Management

* Lead procurement strategy development including contract packaging and tender methodologies.
* Manage tender processes including prequalification, tender evaluation, and award recommendations.
* Negotiate commercial and contractual terms with consultants, contractors, and suppliers.
* Oversee preparation and execution of development, construction, and consultancy agreements.
* Provide commercial input into procurement decisions to balance cost, programme, and quality outcomes.

Contract Administration & Change Control

* Oversee administration of construction and consultancy contracts.
* Review and approve variations, claims, and commercial submissions.
* Ensure robust change management processes are implemented and maintained.
* Lead commercial negotiations and dispute resolution where required.
* Monitor contractual compliance and manage contractual risk exposure.

Project Delivery Commercial Oversight

* Support project teams during construction to ensure commercial performance and cost control.
* Review contractor payment applications, valuations, and financial submissions.
* Monitor contractor performance against commercial obligations.
* Oversee final account negotiations and settlement processes.
* Ensure effective commercial close-out and defects liability management.

Stakeholder & Consultant Management

* Manage and supervise cost consultants, commercial advisors, and claims specialists.
* Liaise with project delivery, design, finance, legal, and development teams.
* Support collaboration between internal and external stakeholders to achieve commercial objectives.
* Provide commercial reporting to senior leadership and investment committees.

Risk Management

* Identify and manage commercial and contractual risks across projects.
* Develop mitigation strategies to protect company financial interests.
* Maintain commercial risk registers and escalation processes.
* Provide strategic advice on risk allocation within contract structures.

3. Leadership & Team Management

* Provide leadership, mentoring, and professional development to commercial team members.
* Support recruitment, performance management, and succession planning within the commercial function.
* Promote a culture of accountability, collaboration, and commercial discipline.

4. Qualifications & Experience

* Bachelor’s degree in Quantity Surveying, Commercial Management, Construction Management, or related discipline.
* Professional accreditation such as MRICS or equivalent preferred.
* Typically 12–18 years’ experience in commercial management within real estate or construction.
* Experience working on UAE or GCC real estate developments strongly preferred.
* Strong knowledge of UAE construction contracts, procurement practices, and regulatory environment.

5. Competencies & Skills

* Strong commercial acumen and financial management capability.
* Advanced contract negotiation and dispute resolution skills.
* Strategic thinking and problem-solving capability.
* Leadership and stakeholder management skills.
* Strong analytical, reporting, and presentation capability.
* Excellent communication and negotiation skills.

data.title: Manager - Customer Experience Design
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose:**

To lead the design and continuous improvement of seamless, user-centred customer journeys across all touchpoints and channels. This role ensures that every stage of the customer experience is intuitive, efficient, and aligned with the company’s service standards and strategic goals
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose:**

To lead the design and continuous improvement of seamless, user-centred customer journeys across all touchpoints and channels. This role ensures that every stage of the customer experience is intuitive, efficient, and aligned with the company’s service standards and strategic goals. By applying design thinking and data driven insights, the Manager — Customer Experience Design drives initiatives that enhance satisfaction, foster loyalty, and strengthen the brand’s reputation for excellence in customer care.

**Key Accountabilities:**

**Customer Experience Design & Innovation**

* Lead the creation and maintenance of detailed customer journey maps and service blueprints for key customer segments.
* Apply design thinking methodologies to identify pain points and develop innovative solutions that simplify and enhance customer interactions.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams (e.g., IT, Marketing, Operations) to implement design solutions that align with digital transformation and business goals.
* Develop prototypes (UI/ UX) screens, test concepts with end-users, and iterate designs based on feedback and data insights.

**Customer Insights & Measurement**

* Analyse qualitative and quantitative customer feedback to inform design priorities and validate experience improvements.
* Define and track key performance indicators (KPIs) for journey effectiveness, including customer satisfaction (CSAT), Net Promoter Score (NPS), and journey friction points.
* Regularly present insights and design recommendations to senior management.

**People Leadership**

* Lead and mentor team members to build strong design and customer empathy capabilities.
* Set clear performance objectives, provide regular feedback, and support professional development to maximize team effectiveness.
* Foster a collaborative culture of innovation and continuous improvement.

**Governance, Compliance & Reporting**

* Ensure compliance with information security and privacy requirements in all design initiatives.
* Adhere to and champion company policies, processes, and standards to maintain consistent and high-quality service delivery.
* Prepare timely and accurate reports on journey performance, project progress, and design impact for leadership review.

**Continuous Improvement**

* Identify opportunities to enhance departmental tools, methodologies, and best practices in line with global CX design trends.
* Lead or contribute to projects that drive service excellence and operational efficiency.

**Other Duties**

* Perform other responsibilities related to the role as assigned by the Director — Customer Experience.

**Qualifications and Experience:**

**Minimum Qualification**

* Bachelor’s degree in marketing, Business or relevant field
* MBA is a preference

**Minimum Experience and Skills**

* At least 5 years of experience in customer experiences related field.
* Multi-disciplinary with excellent understanding of all touchpoints in the customer lifecycle.
* Ability to collaborate with multiple teams (e.g., Marketing, IT, external partners).
* Familiar with designing UI/UX screens on Figma or any other similar tool.
* Familiar with running customer focus groups and designing customer satisfaction surveys.
* Proven ability to apply customer-centric design methods, strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

data.title: Operations Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Responsibilities:**

* Provide inputs to the development of the overall division strategy and participate in developing the business unit strategy in line with the vision, mission, and business objectives of the company.
* Deliver the Facilities Management strategy while ensuring contractual commi
data.jd_text:
**Responsibilities:**

* Provide inputs to the development of the overall division strategy and participate in developing the business unit strategy in line with the vision, mission, and business objectives of the company.
* Deliver the Facilities Management strategy while ensuring contractual commitments are successfully met.
* Manage the effective achievement of the business unit’s objectives through leading the Facilities and Operations team in the assigned project, by setting individual objectives, managing performance, developing and motivating staff, and providing formal and informal feedback and appraisals in order to maximize the subordinates’ and the business unit’s performance.
* Contribute and assist the director of operations in defining an optimum structure for the business unit/ division so that resources are optimally utilized, and communication takes place in an efficient manner.
* Recommend and oversee the budget for the business unit and monitor financial performance versus the budget so that the business is aware of anticipated costs/ revenues, areas of unsatisfactory performance and potential areas of cost reduction are identified, and performance improvement opportunities are realized.
* Lead and manage the Facilities Management function while ensuring the planning and allocation of all resources, and the implementation of the appropriate standards and controls to ensure that all the unit activities are carried out in an efficient and effective manner to meet and exceed unit objectives.
* Discuss “Side-Specific-Budgets” with customers including CAPEX for example, advise the customers on expenditures, opportunities for cost reductions, and the viability/ feasibility of changing/ buying assets (such as changing a chiller for example) to ensure customers’ budgeting is as appropriate and as accurate as possible.
* Maintenance Operations for CNS; AGL & Airfield Civil Works.
* Knowledge of ISO, ICAO and GCAA industrial best practices (CNS, AGL and ACW).
* Develop and monitor SLAs for the assets, and ensure that they are aligned to service delivery, client expectations, and expectations from suppliers / service partners in order to achieve quality service delivery, effective supplier relationship management, and profitability.
* Monitor service delivery performance and lead the evaluation of suppliers’ performance to ensure the selection of appropriately qualified service providers at the optimum price in order to deliver the expected quality of service.
* Monitor resource utilization to ensure that the right number and talent is available for running operations (projects, civil works, mechanical works, electrical works, landscaping, building inspections, etc.), accomplishing targets, improving customer satisfaction, and achieving business objectives.
* Monitor and control the execution of maintenance contracts, review the preventive and corrective maintenance programs, and supervise the implementation by employees or assigned contractor(s) through reviewing reports and spot-checking as appropriate to ensure the provision of quality maintenance works to the facilities (including maintenance to audio visual equipment, BMS, chillers, generators, HVAC, IT, etc.).
* Attend all coordination meetings with the tenants and contractors to discuss the progress of the fit out works and collect the required documentation, carry out an overall inspection after the completion of the fit out works, prepare the snag list to for the tenant, and follow up on all rectification works needed.
* Monitor the request for quotations and the preparation of Purchase Orders and Vendor Contracts, approve same, and ensure that the purchasing process is optimized to guarantee the provision of products/ services to the company/ customer on time and avoid any operational delays.
* Ensure that the Annual Leave Planer is completed to have a holistic view on forecasted leaves and employees’ availabilities throughout the year so as to guarantee that the appropriate resourcing is done and that business operations do not get interrupted.
* Manage customers’ expectations through clear communication and transparent work attitude in order to be consistent and to develop strong customer relationships.
* Receive escalated problems and complaints from the Call Centre and ensure that the necessary support and maintenance work is provided to customers in a timely fashion in order to resolve customers’ issues (pertaining to cooling, power, ventilation, plumbing, etc.) and maintain their high levels of satisfaction.
* Escort customers on daily tours within the premises/ facilities, listen to any feedback or complaints they might have, and delegate any work needed to the subordinates in order to provide customers with the necessary civil, mechanical, electrical, etc. support and maintenance support.
* Provide technical advice to customers and represent customers in technical interfaces with third parties (such as dealing with contractors conducting any construction work on premises while ensuring that they are delivering according to the agreement) as well as furnish customers with technical advice on improvement opportunities (such as reducing utility consumption and bills) in order to increase CSR awareness and contribute in achieving a greener environment.
* Manage the implementation and improvement of policies, guidelines, and processes for contract management and administration to ensure standards are set so that all business requirements are fulfilled while delivering a quality service to customers in line with the corporate strategy.
* Manage the process of revising contracts’ scope of work, renewing the contract while recommending changes, conducting pricing, and negotiating the contract with the customer while coordinating the Terms & Conditions of the contract with the Legal department to ensure alignment with internal policies and any external laws and regulations.
* Lead and monitor the subcontracting of works (such as fire systems, gas, emergency lighting, vertical transportation, water treatment, tank cleaning, etc.), ensure that subcontractors fulfil their duties in an accurate manner and as per the agreed upon contractual clauses, and manage subcontractors’ evaluations and negotiations while ensuring that chosen subcontractors are approved by the relevant authorities to guarantee compliance with the regulatory framework (such as any approvals needed from the Civil Defense Department for fire-fighting systems).
* Ensure effective planning and implementation of HSEEQ inspections and audits in order to meet regulatory requirements and company standards.
* Monitor physical and documentation audits being conducted on subcontractors to ensure that work is being conducted properly and that customers are being served with the highest quality standards, and take the necessary actions upon the detection of unreported/ undisclosed variations and/ or poor performance to safeguard the company against any liabilities.
* Lead the audits of staff, customers, and suppliers to gather feedback and monitor satisfaction in order to improve the operations and facilities management services the company provides.
* Develop and ensure the implementation of division policies, procedures, and controls covering all areas of activity so that all relevant procedural/ legislative requirements are fulfilled while delivering a quality and cost-effective service.
* Ensure compliance to all relevant quality, health, safety, and environmental management policies, procedures, and controls across the department to guarantee employee safety, legislative compliance, delivery of high quality products/ service and a responsible environmental attitude.
* Ensure corrective actions and preventive actions issued by the HSEEQ department are implemented, update the HSEEQ department about the progress of the implementation.
* Ensure the legionella reporting is timely sent to HSEEQ department.
* Ensure the HIRAs are finalized and yearly updated, with support of the HSEQ department.
* Ensure the risk control measures arising from the HIRA are properly implemented.
* Ensure availability of MS and RA

**Qualifications, Experiences, Skills**

1. Bachelor’s Degree in Electrical or Mechanical Engineering, preferably with a Master’s degree in Management or Facilities Management; CMMS knowledge is also preferable; Contract Management of size of AED 100 Mi; Staff management of 200 staff; Energy management knowledge; P&L Management.

* 12+ Years’ experience in contracts & operations management including 8 years in a managerial role ; exposure to Maintenance and Facilities Management especially in the areas of operations planning, HSEEQ, supplier relations management, client relations management, maintenance, and contract management
* Aviation sector is a plus.

data.title: Director of Construction
data.raw_snippet:
The Construction Director will lead the end-to-end delivery of large-scale data center projects (50–100MW+), ensuring execution excellence across schedule, cost, quality, and safety. This role is critical in delivering mission-critical infrastructure aligned with hyperscale and AI-driven demand.

**
data.jd_text:
The Construction Director will lead the end-to-end delivery of large-scale data center projects (50–100MW+), ensuring execution excellence across schedule, cost, quality, and safety. This role is critical in delivering mission-critical infrastructure aligned with hyperscale and AI-driven demand.

**About the Role**

This role is critical in delivering mission-critical infrastructure aligned with hyperscale and AI-driven demand.

**Responsibilities**

**Project Delivery**

* Lead construction execution from pre-construction through commissioning
* Own project timelines, budgets, and quality standards
* Drive fast-track delivery strategies (modular, phased builds)

**Technical Oversight**

* Oversee mission-critical systems: HV/MV electrical, UPS, generators, cooling systems
* Ensure compliance with Tier III / IV standards and industry best practices (e.g. Uptime Institute)

**Stakeholder Management**

* Manage EPC contractors, subcontractors, and key suppliers
* Interface with investors, developers, utilities, and authorities

**Commercial Management**

* Control multi-million/billion AED budgets
* Lead procurement of long-lead equipment (transformers, generators, chillers)
* Manage contracts, variations, and claims

**Risk & Program Management**

* Develop and track integrated master schedules
* Identify and mitigate delivery risks (power, supply chain, permitting)

**HSE & Compliance**

* Ensure strict adherence to health, safety, and environmental standards
* Maintain full regulatory compliance

**Qualifications**

* 15+ years in construction/project delivery
* Proven experience delivering data center or mission-critical projects
* Strong knowledge of electrical and mechanical infrastructure
* Experience working with hyperscalers/operators (e.g. Equinix, Digital Realty, Microsoft) preferred
* GCC experience is an advantage

**Required Skills**

* Degree in Engineering (Electrical, Mechanical, or Civil)
* Strong leadership and stakeholder management skills
* Commercially driven with solid contract and cost management experience
* PMP or equivalent certification preferred

**Preferred Skills**

* Experience working with hyperscalers/operators (e.g. Equinix, Digital Realty, Microsoft) preferred
* GCC experience is required

data.title: Manager - Project Finance
data.raw_snippet:
**Manager – Project Finance**

We are seeking a highly analytical and commercially driven
**Manager / Senior Manager – Project Finance**
to join our Business Development team. This role will play a key part in executing and structuring large-scale infrastructure and development transactions, includi
data.jd_text:
**Manager – Project Finance**

We are seeking a highly analytical and commercially driven
**Manager / Senior Manager – Project Finance**
to join our Business Development team. This role will play a key part in executing and structuring large-scale infrastructure and development transactions, including greenfield and brownfield projects, refinancings, acquisitions, divestments, and stake sales.

**Candidate Background:**

We are particularly interested in professionals with experience in:

* Project Finance teams within Developers
* Investment Banking (M&A and/or fundraising experience)
* Financial Advisory firms advising on project finance transactions
* Investments
* Private Equity

Candidates must demonstrate strong analytical capabilities, superior communication skills, and above-average exposure to investment transactions.

**Key Responsibilities:**

**Transaction Execution & Financial Leadership**

* Build, audit, maintain and supervise the development of complex financial models for large infrastructure projects.
* Lead financial modelling workstreams across greenfield and brownfield developments, refinancings, acquisitions, divestments and stake sales.
* Ensure models comply with project agreements, financing documents, accounting and tax regulations across jurisdictions.
* Conduct financial analysis, optimization and business valuation to support business development and bid teams.
* Prepare investment memoranda, internal approvals documentation, and Board-level presentations.
* Support economic analysis and financial structuring optimization for existing assets (including impairment tests and performance reviews).

**Fundraising & Financial Structuring**

* Lead and support fundraising activities, including structuring and negotiations with banks, export credit agencies and financial institutions.
* Develop and maintain strong relationships with financial institutions across assigned geographies.
* Coordinate due diligence, tax, accounting and modelling workstreams with internal teams and external advisors.

**Team Leadership & Governance**

* Work closely with Transaction Managers (Executive Manager / Director) in project execution.
* Coordinate with Business Development, Legal, Technical, Finance and external stakeholders to ensure timely transaction delivery.
* Provide financial advisory guidance to subsidiaries and support Board/Audit Committee requirements.
* Train and oversee Managers (M1) and interns within the team.

**Qualifications & Experience:**

**Education:**

* Bachelor’s Degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, Mathematics, Engineering or related field.
* MBA, CA, CFA or other relevant postgraduate qualifications preferred.

**Experience:**

* 6 + years of relevant experience specifically in project finance within developers, banks, financial institutions, advisory firms or consultancies.
* Proven track record in building and managing advanced financial models.
* Strong exposure to project finance structuring, M&A and/or fundraising.
* Strong negotiation skills with investors and lenders.
* Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple workstreams simultaneously.
* Exceptional financial modelling and analytical skills
* Strong commercial acumen
* Clear, confident communicator with stakeholder management ability
* High ownership mindset and ability to lead transaction workstreams
* Exceptional attention to detail with strong governance awareness

data.title: Project HSE Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Title: Project HSE Manager**

**Job Purpose**

To lead and manage Health, Safety, and Environmental (HSE) functions across high-rise construction projects, ensuring full compliance with regulatory requirements, international standards, and company policies while promoting a strong safety cultu
data.jd_text:
**Job Title: Project HSE Manager**

**Job Purpose**

To lead and manage Health, Safety, and Environmental (HSE) functions across high-rise construction projects, ensuring full compliance with regulatory requirements, international standards, and company policies while promoting a strong safety culture on-site.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Develop, implement, and monitor project-specific HSE plans, policies, and procedures.
* Ensure compliance with local GCC regulations and international HSE standards.
* Lead HSE operations across high-rise tower construction projects.
* Conduct risk assessments, hazard identification, and implement mitigation measures.
* Oversee site inspections, audits, and safety walkthroughs to ensure adherence to safety protocols.
* Investigate incidents, accidents, and near misses; prepare reports and recommend corrective actions.
* Drive safety awareness campaigns and training programs for site teams and contractors.
* Coordinate with project managers, consultants, and subcontractors to ensure HSE compliance.
* Monitor and report HSE performance, including KPIs and safety statistics.
* Ensure proper implementation of emergency response and crisis management plans.
* Maintain all HSE documentation, records, and certifications in line with audit requirements.

**Requirements:**

**Experience**

* Minimum
  **15+ years of experience**
  in HSE within the GCC region.
* Proven experience working on
  **high-rise tower construction projects**
  is mandatory.

**Qualifications**

* **NEBOSH Level 6 / OTHM / NVQ Level 6**
  in Occupational Health & Safety or equivalent.
* **ISO Level 3 Certifications**
  (e.g., ISO 45001, ISO 14001, ISO 9001).

**Skills & Competencies**

* Strong knowledge of HSE regulations and best practices in the GCC.
* Excellent leadership and team management skills.
* Strong risk assessment and incident investigation capabilities.
* Effective communication and stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to work in a fast-paced, high-pressure construction environment.

data.title: Software Engineering Director
data.raw_snippet:
This is the general track for Engineering Director at Canonical, apply here if you are confident to run a project which spans teams and time zones, hiring and managing engineering managers and staff engineers.
  
  
Canonical's largest software products are built by multiple teams working together u
data.jd_text:
This is the general track for Engineering Director at Canonical, apply here if you are confident to run a project which spans teams and time zones, hiring and managing engineering managers and staff engineers.
  
  
Canonical's largest software products are built by multiple teams working together under a single director of engineering. Once you have passed the first round of interviews we will discuss specific software products which would be a good fit for your interests.
  
  
We believe that open source is just starting to transform the tech sector and enterprise compute. Our goal is to make open source easier, more reliable and more secure for deployment and development. We strive to be the provider of 'most software to most companies'. To deliver on that ambition, our engineers are carefully selected from the applicants across the globe. We select for brilliance and motivation to take open source to the next level. Our engineering directors set the pace and the direction to help teams achieve more than they realised they could, and feel proud of the result.
  
  
Even though this is a senior management position, managing managers, we expect Engineering Directors to be outstanding developers with the confidence to lead by example across the full range of activities in their teams. You need to understand what great code looks like in the language and genre of your product - whether that is a web service, or a system daemon, or a desktop application, or a distributed system. You'll need to know how to drive testing and benchmarking to improve the clarity in your teams around quality and performance. You'll also need to be confident to set and defend high expectations of work ethic, consistency, focus and learning.
  
  
We have director level roles across a wide range of engineering domains, including:
  
  

* Python and Golang
* C / C++ / Rust
* Data infrastructure
* HTML / CSS / JavaScript / Typescript / React
* Flutter
* Distro packaging and systems
* SAAS and web microservices
* Kernel
* Servers
* Graphics, Browser and Desktop
* Silicon enablement and embedded devices
* Product Security

If your domain of expertise isn't listed above, yet you feel it's relevant to Canonical, then feel free to apply anyway. We will route you to the most suitable team.
  
  
Location: The role is remote, with positions available in all time zones. It includes a requirement for global travel for twice per year, for trips up to two weeks long.
  
  
What you'll do
  
  

* Lead multiple teams of engineers, ranging from graduate to senior
* Develop your engineering managers and maintain Canonical culture
* Hire staff level engineers for specific roles like performance and quality
* Coach, mentor, and offer career development feedback
* Identify and measure indicators of team health and productivity
* Ensure rounded delivery including community participation and docs
* Implement disciplined engineering processes and defend them
* Set and measure progress against benchmark goals for speed and efficiency
* Represent your product to stakeholders, partners, and customers
* Develop and evangelise great engineering and organisational practices
* Plan and manage progress on agreed goals and projects
* Be an active part of the leadership team, collaborating with other leaders
* Collaborate with leads for related or dependent products

What we're looking for in you
  
  

* An exceptional academic track record from both high school and university
* Undergraduate degree in Computer Science or STEM, or a compelling narrative about your alternative path
* Extensive management experience and confidence to set high expectations
* Outstanding Linux based software engineering track record
* Drive and a track record of going above-and-beyond expectations
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English
* Public speaking and presentation skills
* A love of developing and growing people and a track record of it
* Experience in leading, coaching and mentoring software developers
* Organised and able to ensure your team delivers timely, high quality results
* Well-organised, self-starting and able to deliver to schedule
* Professional manner interacting with colleagues, partners, and community
* You have advanced expertise in your own domain
* You are knowledgeable and passionate about software development
* You have solid experience working in an agile development environment
* You have a demonstrated drive for continual learning
* Builds trust, relationships and confidence
* Result-oriented, with a personal drive to meet commitments
* Ability to travel twice a year, for company events up to two weeks each

**Additional Skills We Value**

* Experience in a developer advocacy or community role
* Open source community engagement and leadership
* Ops and system administration experience
* Performance engineering and security experience

What we offer you
  
  
We consider geographical location, experience, and performance in shaping compensation worldwide. We revisit compensation annually (and more often for graduates and associates) to ensure we recognise outstanding performance. In addition to base pay, we offer a performance-driven annual bonus. We provide all team members with additional benefits, which reflect our values and ideals. We balance our programs to meet local needs and ensure fairness globally.
  
  

* Distributed work environment with twice-yearly team sprints in person
* Personal learning and development budget of USD 2,000 per year
* Annual compensation review
* Recognition rewards
* Annual holiday leave
* Maternity and paternity leave
* Employee Assistance Programme
* Opportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleagues
* Priority Pass, and travel upgrades for long haul company events

**About Canonical**
Canonical is a pioneering tech firm at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open source projects and the platform for AI, IoT and the cloud, we are changing the world on a daily basis. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence - in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do. Canonical has been a remote-first company since its inception in 2004. Working here is a step into the future, and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game.
  
  
Canonical is an equal opportunity employer
  
  
We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background create a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.

data.title: Sales Director - Construction Saudi Cluster
data.raw_snippet:
**About us**

dmg events is an international exhibitions and publishing company. We attract more than 425,000 visitors to our global portfolio of 80 exhibitions each year. Through our global events, our aim is simple. We want to accelerate business through face-to-face events, which is why we work s
data.jd_text:
**About us**

dmg events is an international exhibitions and publishing company. We attract more than 425,000 visitors to our global portfolio of 80 exhibitions each year. Through our global events, our aim is simple. We want to accelerate business through face-to-face events, which is why we work so hard to bring people together, creating opportunities for them to network, learn and do business. dmg events is part of the Daily Mail Group Trust (DMGT). DMGT Manages a diverse, multinational portfolio of companies with total revenues of £2bn, that provide businesses and consumers with compelling information, analysis, insight, events, news and entertainment
**.**

**Job Description:**

**Sales and Sponsorship:**

* To be responsible for the revenue generation through the direct sales team who sell exhibition stands and sponsorship packages to achieve agreed sales targets.
* Responsible for generating sales strategy for portfolio of products going forward.
* Ensuring strong sales culture amongst the team, clear deadlines, targets and responsibilities.
* Coaching and mentoring colleagues where possible to improve their performance.
* Sell exhibition space and sponsorship in accordance with set targets to ensure the revenue budget is achieved and exceeded.
* Questions customers in depth to ascertain their long term business requirements and target markets
* Empathises with the client by demonstrating understanding of their market and customer base
* Identifies particular issues of interest or visitors for key accounts
* Develops long term account relationships through regular calls and visits, offering information on the customer’s sector and sending information
* Is able to articulate issues in associated sectors and suggest new perspectives for the customers marketing approach
* Actively networks with trade associations and other third parties
* Presents benefits of shows to large groups of potential exhibitors using visual aids
* Knows when to delegate and when to tackle issues directly
* Prepares sales plans with financial case included
* Demonstrates continuous development in sales practice

**Customer Service:**

* To actively seek new customers from all relevant sources including trade press, competitors and other like minded events. Thus increasing sponsorship revenue and develop emerging markets/product areas.
* Communicates the links between excellent service and business goals
* Monitors the performance of individuals and teams in relation to customer service
* Promotes excellent customer service through all team communication processes including performance management meetings
* Networks and benchmarks externally to generate ideas for improving customer service
* Translates suggestions for improvements into practical actions.
* Ensures high customer retention rate.

**Reporting:**

* Provide the Portfolio Director with weekly report detailing team activities and forecast.
* Monitor sales figures and reporting on a weekly, monthly and quarterly basis to enable senior management to be updated on the progress of the show and sponsorships.
* Writes and implements sales plans
* Develops interim forecasts
* Creates monthly sales forecasts

**People Management:**

* Manage the workload of the direct reports
* Develop and train the team to ensure high standards are met.
* Ensure all people administration is completed in a timely manner e.g. appraisals, return to works etc.
* Motivate team member to increase results.

**Administration:**

* Maintains accurate sales records
* Manages floor plan
* Issues and returns contracts
* Manages and develops database
* Organises distribution of sales communications
* Chases initial payments

**Financial Responsibility:**

* Understand and manage the sales budget Involvement with invoicing and collections to ensure payments are made in line with the contract.

**Qualifications:**

* Minimum 8-10 years of B2B sales management and account handling experience within the exhibitions/events industry.
* Familiarity in selling construction and design products/services is a plus.
* Excellent communication in Arabic & English (written and spoken is must).
* Ability to communicate effectively and efficiently with a wide variety of clients and partners across multiple mediums, including phone, email, and face-to-face meetings.
* Highly motivated, and ambitious, a desire to take ownership and responsibility to ensure the best outcome.
* Ability to work towards KPIs, using them as a motivational tool to hit and exceed targets.
* Adaptable and collaborative nature, working with colleagues across the team.
* Ability to travel within the region as required.

**Job-Specific Skills:**

* Proven track record with sales and sponsorship delivery
* Understanding of sales budget/forecasting
* Proficient with SalesForce

**Behavioural Competencies :**

* Communication
* External Awareness
* Resilience and tenacity
* Team work
* Flexibility

**"Please take the time to read the job description, you must meet all the criteria set out above for your application to be considered. We do check all applications and suitable candidates will be contacted within 5 days. If you are not contacted by us within 5 working days, please consider your application unsuccessful at this time."**

data.title: Head of Construction /Construction Director
data.raw_snippet: The Head of Construction/Construction Director oversees the full execution of the high-rise development projects in Abu Dhabi and Dubai, from pre-construction through to handover, acting as the key link between the project site, consultants, contractors, and internal stakeholders. In addition to tec
data.jd_text:
The Head of Construction/Construction Director oversees the full execution of the high-rise development projects in Abu Dhabi and Dubai, from pre-construction through to handover, acting as the key link between the project site, consultants, contractors, and internal stakeholders. In addition to technical and construction oversight, the role assumes broad project management responsibilities to ensure timely delivery, budget control, quality assurance, and alignment with MERED’s ultra-luxury standards.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Act as the Client’s Point of contact on-site, representing the company in all day-to-day project operations, stakeholder communications, technical decisions, and program management—ensuring seamless execution of the company’s development vision.
* Take responsibility for the execution and monitoring of the project master schedule, overseeing critical path activities and proactively resolving bottlenecks across all trades and work fronts.
* Lead all site-level decision-making, interfacing daily with the Consultant and Contractor, while aligning with the strategic objectives of the Executive Management team.
* Coordinate and chair all weekly progress meetings, technical coordination meetings, and task force sessions with internal and external parties; follow preparation of comprehensive MOMs, trackers, and follow-ups to ensure accountability and implementation.
* Ensure that all procurement, long lead items, shop drawings, and authority approvals are aligned with the schedule and proactively track their timelines with the planning department to avoid execution delays.
* Review and assess contractor’s programs, lookahead plans, recovery schedules, and mitigation plans; reject or revise plans that do not meet MERED's standards or fail to support critical milestones.
* Monitor and supervise site works for full scope disciplines including:

+ Soil Investigation.
+ Enabling Works.
+ Structural: Sequencing, rebar installation, slab formwork, PT works, cast-in items.
+ Architectural: Blockworks, waterproofing, screeding, ceiling frameworks, partitions, stone and tile installations.
+ Façade: System panels, brackets, brackets coordination with MEP penetrations and PT zones, balcony closures.
+ ID: Joinery, veneer mockups, lighting details, finishing tolerances, and detail verifications.
+ MEP: Shaft coordination, riser alignment, containment readiness, T&C planning and authority inspections.

* Take charge of all government authority coordination (DDA, DEWA, Civil Defense, DM, RTA), ensuring that submissions, site inspections, approvals, and NOCs are prepared and executed on time.
* Maintain direct oversight of design coordination activities, ensuring all site conditions, RFI responses, and consultant instructions are technically reviewed, confirmed, and closed in collaboration with design managers and consultants.
* Represent the Developer in all commercial and contractual coordination together with commercial team by:

+ Evaluating technical claims, cost implications, and time extension requests.
+ Providing technical input to Contracts/Legal for variation orders, claims rebuttals, and scope clarifications.
+ Assessing additional work justifications and holding the Contractor accountable for scope performance.

* Take full leadership of QA/QC implementation:

+ Approve method statements and ITPs.
+ Review NCRs and ensure rectification with zero recurrence.
+ Verify material submittals, shop drawing accuracy, and as-built records.

* Manage construction digital tools and systems, ensuring workflows, WIRs, MIRs, and document reviews are completed accurately, with continuous system training and performance follow-up.
* Support planning department for internal weekly reporting to Executive Management:

+ Progress dashboards, milestone tracking, risk registers, productivity comparisons, and KPI compliance reviews.

* Oversee cost control interfaces with the commercial team by tracking site quantities, abortive works, unexecuted scope, and opportunities for value engineering or savings through optimization.
* Support the tendering process by preparing and coordinating technical evaluations, organizing site visits for bidders, reviewing PTC’s, technical submissions and providing input on contractor selection in coordination with the Commercial and Design teams.
* Support the Marketing team by preparing monthly construction progress updates, facilitating site readiness for content creation activities (photoshoots, videography, walkthroughs), and coordinating materials that reflect the company’s culture, particularly in health, safety, and environmental standards.
* Drive logistics and construction phasing strategies including crane operations, platform reconfigurations, hoist planning, material laydown, storage areas, and emergency access.
* Coordinate with the Contractor and Engineer to uphold a high standard of HSE culture across the project by leading weekly HSE-focused site walks, enforcing compliance with UAE regulations and MERED’s internal safety policies, and ensuring that all activities reflect a clean, safe, and well-managed construction environment.
* Spearhead initiatives to elevate site culture:

+ Ensure strict housekeeping compliance.
+ Maintain site readiness for walkthroughs.

* Facilitate pre-handover activities including testing and commissioning, authority handover, DLP coordination, and unit inspections aligned with project branding and customer satisfaction goals.

Requirements
  

**Required Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in civil engineering or architecture.
* 15–20 years of experience in high-rise construction, including luxury residential towers (experience with offices and hotels is a plus).
* Relevant experience in high-rise construction projects in Abu Dhabi and Dubai.
* Verifiable experience working for Tier 1 contractors or developers.
* Understanding of FIDIC contracts and construction contract administration.
* Knowledge of construction planning and phasing.
* Appreciation for customer care and commitment to handing over projects with a customer-centric approach.
* Understanding of RERA inspections and approvals for Dubai projects, and relevant authority regulations for Abu Dhabi projects.
* Strong technical knowledge in structural, MEP, façade, ID, and authority regulations.
* Proficient in project management tools (Primavera, MS Project), AutoCAD, and document control systems.

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Professional certification if applicable, PMP certification or equivalent project management training.
* Experience with Dubai development regulations and authorities (DDA, DEWA, RTA, etc.).
* Exposure to design management or contractor-side execution is an advantage.
* Working knowledge of sustainability certifications (LEED) in construction execution, if applicable.
* Industry-recognized professional whose expertise and reputation are valued by contractors.

**Skills and Competencies**

* Strong leadership and decision-making capabilities.
* Excellent coordination and conflict resolution skills.
* Meticulous attention to detail and organizational discipline.
* Proactive problem-solver with a results-oriented mindset.
* Comfortable managing complex teams and high-pressure timelines.
* Fluent in English; knowledge of Russian or Arabic is an asset.

·

Benefits
  

* Competitive salary package.
* Annual flight ticket allowance.
* Performance discretionary bonus.
* Comprehensive health insurance.
* Employment visa.

data.title: Site Project Manager
data.raw_snippet: The Site Project Manager is a key leadership role responsible for overseeing the execution and delivery of architectural projects from a site perspective. This position requires a seasoned professional with extensive experience in both architecture and construction management, with a strong focus on
data.jd_text:
The Site Project Manager is a key leadership role responsible for overseeing the execution and delivery of architectural projects from a site perspective. This position requires a seasoned professional with extensive experience in both architecture and construction management, with a strong focus on project delivery, client relations, team management, and quality control. In addition to site and project responsibilities, the role will also incorporate business development functions to support company growth and client engagement.

**Job Requirements**

* Build and maintain strong client relationships, ensuring their expectations are managed and met throughout the project lifecycle.
* Act as the main point of contact for clients, contractors, and other stakeholders on-site.
* Manage the entire project lifecycle, ensuring the seamless integration of design, construction, and site management.
* Monitor project progress, provide direction, and make decisions to mitigate risks or resolve issues on-site.
* Ensure that all work carried out on-site complies with project specifications, industry standards, and local regulations.
* Oversee project budgets, including cost control, forecasting, and financial tracking.
* Manage resource allocation on-site, ensuring materials, equipment, and labor are appropriately utilized and available.
* Develop and implement strategies to mitigate risks and address challenges as they arise.
* Provide post-project analysis and feedback to help improve future project delivery.
* Identify new business opportunities within the architecture, engineering, and construction sectors.
* Collaborate with senior leadership to define target markets and pursue high-value opportunities.
* Attend industry events and networking functions to promote company capabilities and services.

**Experience**

* Bachelor’s Degree in Architecture or Civil Engineering – Master’s degree preferred.
* 15+ years of progressive experience in architecture, construction, and project/site management.
* UAE experience is mandatory.
* PMP or PRINCE2 certification required.
* Proven track record of leading and delivering complex, high-value architectural projects.
* Strong understanding of financial management, including cost control and project forecasting.
* Ability to plan for and manage risks in complex projects and take swift, decisive action when needed.
* Demonstrated ability to generate new business and maintain long-term client relationships.

data.raw_snippet:
**About Us**
