* Excellent English & Arabic language skills.
* Excellent communication skills
* Proactive and highly organized, with strong time management and planning skills
* Excellent command of productivity software, presentation, word processing & number tools
* High attention to detail
* Highly energetic
* Strong Work Ethic

**Benefits**

* Get the chance to work with high potential for growth startups and bright entrepreneurs in the MENA region and from diﬀerent countries around the world
* Exposure to diﬀerent local, regional and international investors and VCs
* Engage in the buzzing startup community in the MENA region
* Work in an environment supporting creativity and proactivity, and be a part of a small dynamic team

data.title: Test Director
data.raw_snippet:
We are looking for
**a Senior Test Delivery Manager / Test Program Director**
to lead the quality engineering and testing delivery for a large-scale telecom transformation program. The role requires strong leadership in managing complex testing portfolios, large, distributed teams, and multi-vendor
data.jd_text:
We are looking for
**a Senior Test Delivery Manager / Test Program Director**
to lead the quality engineering and testing delivery for a large-scale telecom transformation program. The role requires strong leadership in managing complex testing portfolios, large, distributed teams, and multi-vendor ecosystems, while ensuring delivery excellence and financial discipline.
  
  
The leader will be responsible for end-to-end test strategy, delivery governance, demand management, and resource optimization, while driving AI-first quality engineering practices to improve productivity, predictability, and business outcomes.
  
  
This role will work closely with client leadership, program directors, architecture teams, and delivery partners to ensure quality objectives are achieved across all releases in the transformation program.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**
**Test Program Leadership**

* Own and drive the overall testing strategy and execution for a large telecom transformation program.
* Lead testing across multiple transformation workstreams.
* Establish quality governance frameworks aligned with program milestones and release plans.
* Manage large, distributed testing teams and multiple vendor partners.
* Ensure testing delivery meets fixed bid contractual commitments related to scope, cost, timelines, and quality.
* Drive cost optimization, productivity improvement, and margin protection through automation and AI-led efficiencies.
* Manage program-level testing budgets, forecasting, and resource utilization.
* Establish strong governance for scope management, change control, and risk mitigation.

**Demand Management & Resource Planning**

* Manage testing demand across multiple workstreams and releases in alignment with program priorities.
* Lead capacity planning, resource forecasting, and skill-based allocation to ensure optimal utilization.
* Establish structured resource scheduling models aligned with release cycles and delivery milestones.
* Collaborate with leadership teams to address demand-supply gaps, ramp-up planning, and skill transformation initiatives.

**AI-First Quality Engineering**

* Drive adoption of AI-enabled testing across the testing lifecycle.
* Leverage AI agents and intelligent automation to accelerate testing cycles and improve quality.
* Define AI adoption roadmap for quality engineering within the program.
* Build a highly automated testing ecosystem across functional and non-functional testing.
* Drive shift-left and shift-right quality practices to enable faster feedback loops.

**Stakeholder & Client Engagement**

* Act as the primary QA leader interfacing with senior client stakeholders.
* Provide strategic guidance on quality engineering practices and transformation initiatives.
* Facilitate program-level quality reviews, defect governance forums, and release readiness discussions.
* Provide executive dashboards and quality insights to program leadership.

**Risk & Quality Management**

* Establish proactive mechanisms for risk identification, quality assurance, and defect prevention.
* Implement predictive quality metrics and analytics using AI-based insights.
* Ensure strong governance for all testing lifecycle activities.

**Experience**
**Required Skills & Experience**

* 18+ years of experience in Quality Engineering and Testing
* 8+ years managing large transformation programs
* Experience delivering complex telecom programs under fixed bid or outcome-based models
* Proven leadership managing large, distributed QA teams (100+ resources)
* Telecom Domain Expertise and AI & Modern Testing experience
* Strong program governance and stakeholder management
* Experience managing multi-vendor delivery environments
* Expertise in demand management, capacity planning, and workforce scheduling
* Proven ability to drive quality transformation initiatives
* Strong background in Agile delivery

data.title: Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
****Job Brief:****

*This role serves as the central "nerve center" for our KSA operations, ensuring that opportunities across our diverse Agility global portfolio are tracked, managed, and accelerated.*

*You will bridge the gap between high-level government engagements and operational execution. Y
data.jd_text:
****Job Brief:****

*This role serves as the central "nerve center" for our KSA operations, ensuring that opportunities across our diverse Agility global portfolio are tracked, managed, and accelerated.*

*You will bridge the gap between high-level government engagements and operational execution. You will be responsible for maintaining a "single source of truth" for our pipeline, managing complex stakeholder relationships within the Saudi ecosystem, and ensuring that leadership has the data-driven insights needed to make critical decisions.*

**Requirements**
**Job Responsibilities:**

* Pipeline & Opportunity Management: Build and rigorously maintain the KSA Opportunity Tracker (via Power BI or Excel). Monitor the status, ownership, timelines, and dependencies for all regional projects.
* Stakeholder & Government Liaison: Track engagements with key KSA entities. Document next actions and ensure no follow-up is missed.
* Performance Reporting: Prepare monthly leadership updates and visual dashboards that translate complex data into actionable insights for the executive team.
* Operational Accountability: Follow up directly with Operating Companies (OpCos) to ensure meeting actions and deadlines are met. Act as the primary "enforcer" of project timelines.
* Risk Mitigation: Proactively identify and flag delays, resource bottlenecks, or strategic risks before they impact delivery.
* Knowledge Management: Ensure seamless continuity of project data and strategic relationships during priority shifts or team transitions.

**Your Qualifications**

* Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Engineering, or a related field. An MBA is a plus.
* Certification: PMP, PRINCE2, or equivalent project management certification is highly preferred.
* 3-6 years of project management experience, preferably within a conglomerate, consulting firm, or logistics/infrastructure sector.
* Regional Expertise: Deep understanding of the KSA business landscape and the Vision 2030 framework. Familiarity with the working styles of Saudi government ministries  and working in international organizationsis essential.
* Native or professional fluency in English and Arabic is required to navigate government documentation and internal reporting.

**Your Proficiencies**

* Leadership and Management skills
* Data Visualization: Advanced proficiency in Power BI and Excel (lookups, pivot tables, and dashboard creation).
* Strategic Thinking: Ability to see the "big picture" across multiple business units (Logistics, Aviation, Ventures) while maintaining attention to detail.
* Influence & Communication: Strong interpersonal skills to hold senior leaders accountable for deadlines without direct reporting authority.
* Agility: Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment where priorities shift based on government mandates or market opportunities.

JASARA PMC is actively looking for a Project Manager to join our team. In this role, you will oversee multiple projects, ensuring that they are completed on time, within budget, and to the highest quality standards.

You will be integral in ensuring project objectives are met while facilitating collaboration and maintaining strong communication between all parties involved.

* Property project management experience
* Self starters
* Good at execution and project delivery
* Strong leadership skills with the ability to motivate and guide project teams
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills for effective stakeholder engagement
* Proficiency in project management software and tools
* Experience with budgeting and resource management
* Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple projects simultaneously
* Can use Aconex, revit, excel, powerpoint well

data.title: Director of Mining – Major Programs
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
WSP Middle East is seeking an experienced and dynamic Director of Mining based in Riyadh, KSA, to establish and lead our Major Programs Mining & Minerals business line in the region. This strategic leadership role will combine business development, project delivery oversight, com
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
WSP Middle East is seeking an experienced and dynamic Director of Mining based in Riyadh, KSA, to establish and lead our Major Programs Mining & Minerals business line in the region. This strategic leadership role will combine business development, project delivery oversight, commercial and financial management, and client relationship excellence to drive growth and successful delivery in one of our key sectors. As a leader within the Middle East region, with global connectivity, this role will require a blend of technical expertise, project leadership, business development acumen, and strategic client engagement.
  
  
You will be responsible for shaping the direction of the mining business line, building strong teams, and delivering complex, major mining programs that align with WSP’s global standards and regional ambitions
  
  
**Responsibilities**
**Business Development & Strategy:**

* Serve as the founding leader for WSP’s Mining & Minerals major programs business in the Middle East, establishing market presence and credibility.
* Navigate regional regulatory frameworks, cultural dynamics, and client expectations to build a sustainable business footprint.
* Define and execute the growth strategy for the Mining & Minerals business line across the Middle East.
* Identify and pursue new market opportunities, capitalize on your existing relationships with government entities, mining operators, and strategic investors.
* Lead bid preparation and proposal development, including pricing, risk assessments, and contract terms.
* Develop and maintain strong relationships with new and existing clients, and effectively represent WSP in meetings, workshops, and site-based engagements.
* Prepare proposals, technical reports, and client-facing documentation aligned with project and business objectives.
* Lead the setup and execution of PMC frameworks for large-scale mining programs.
* Develop delivery models tailored to regional client needs, including owner’s team services and integrated project controls.

**Strategic Oversight of Advisory & Design Streams:**

* Provide strategic leadership for the Mining Advisory and Design service lines.
* Ensure alignment with global technical teams and leverage international expertise to support and grow regional delivery.
* Drive integration across service lines to create a unified client offering – from pit to port, from exploration to closure.

**Project Delivery & Operations:**

* Provide leadership and oversight for the successful end-to-end delivery of major mining projects including feasibility studies, mine planning, delivery, and closure phases.
* Implement and enforce project delivery governance, quality standards, safety protocols, and risk management frameworks.
* Collaborate closely with multi-disciplinary teams to ensure seamless project execution and client satisfaction.

**Client Relationship & Stakeholder Management:**

* Develop and maintain trusted advisor relationships with key clients, government agencies, regulators, and industry partners.
* Represent WSP at industry forums, conferences, and stakeholder meetings to enhance brand positioning and business opportunities.
* Be proactive in identifying opportunities to improve client outcomes and exceed expectations.

**Commercial & Financial Leadership:**

* Take full P&L accountability for the Mining & Minerals major programs business line, including budgeting, forecasting, and financial reporting.
* Manage commercial agreements, contracts, claims, and scope changes to protect company interests and maximize profitability.
* Drive cost control initiatives and optimize resource allocation.

**Leadership & Team Development:**

* Recruit, mentor, and lead a high-performing team of mining professionals across technical, commercial, and operational disciplines.
* Foster a culture of innovation, collaboration, safety, and continuous improvement.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in mining engineering, Mineral Processing, Geology, or related field; master’s degree or MBA preferred.
* Minimum 15–20 years of experience in the mining sector, with exposure to consulting and operator-side roles in the Middle East region.
* Familiarity with regional mining regulations, standards, and market dynamics is highly desirable.
* Proven track record in business development and establishing new business lines or service offerings.
* Strong commercial acumen with experience managing P&L, contracts, and financial performance.
* Demonstrated success in leading large-scale mining projects or programs in the Middle East or similar regions.
* Excellent leadership, communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment and drive change effectively.

Imagine a better future for you and a better future for us all.
  
  
Join our close-knit community of talented individuals who share your passion for making a positive impact. Our global team includes more than 69,000 employees, working together to make a difference in communities both close to home and around the world.
  
  
With us, you can. Apply today.

data.title: Project Director - Data Centre Projects
data.raw_snippet:
Position Overview:
  
  
The Project Director will lead the planning, execution, and delivery of complex data centre construction projects from inception through completion. This Position requires extensive infrastructure experience managing large-scale, mission-critical facilities with demanding te
data.jd_text:
Position Overview:
  
  
The Project Director will lead the planning, execution, and delivery of complex data centre construction projects from inception through completion. This Position requires extensive infrastructure experience managing large-scale, mission-critical facilities with demanding technical requirements.
  
  
Key Responsibilities:
  
  
**Strategic Project Leadership**

* Direct data centre projects valued at $50M-$500M+ from design through commissioning
* Lead project teams of 20-100+ personnel including engineers, construction managers, and subcontractors
* Serve as primary client interface and senior escalation point

**Programme Management**

* Oversee multiple concurrent data centre projects or complex phased developments
* Optimize resources, manage risks, and ensure consistent delivery standards across portfolio
* Coordinate interdependencies and balance competing priorities

**Technical Infrastructure**

* Apply expertise in critical systems: power distribution (HV/MV/LV), cooling (CRAC/CRAH, liquid cooling), backup power (generators, UPS), fire suppression, BMS/DCIM
* Ensure designs meet industry standards (Uptime Institute Tiers, TIA-942)
* Drive constructability reviews, value engineering, and technical risk mitigation

**Financial & Commercial Management**

* Manage project budgets, forecasts, and profitability
* Negotiate and administer contracts with contractors and suppliers
* Review change orders, claims, and contract variations
* Monitor cash flow and financial performance

**Stakeholder & Client Management**

* Build relationships with clients, consultants, contractors, and regulatory authorities
* Manage expectations and facilitate resolution of complex issues
* Represent organization in client meetings and industry forums

**Risk, Quality & Safety**

* Identify and mitigate technical, commercial, schedule, and stakeholder risks
* Establish quality management systems and commissioning protocols
* Champion safety culture and ensure regulatory compliance

Required Qualifications:
  
  

* Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Construction Management
* Professional registration (PE, CEng, PMP) preferred
* 15+ years in construction project management
* 8+ years specifically in data centre or mission-critical infrastructure
* Proven track record delivering projects exceeding $50M
* Experience with hyperscale, colocation, or enterprise data centres

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience with hyperscale clients (AWS, Microsoft, Google, Meta)
* International project experience
* Knowledge of sustainability frameworks (LEED, BREEAM)
* Familiarity with DfMA and off-site construction methodologies

data.jd_text:
JASARA PMC is seeking a strategic and experienced Project Director for Construction to lead our ambitious projects in Saudi Arabia. As a recognized leader in the construction management sector, JASARA is dedicated to excellence and innovation in delivering large-scale projects that align with the Kingdom's Vision 2030. In this role, you will oversee the entire lifecycle of complex construction projects, ensuring they meet the highest standards of quality, safety, and efficiency.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Provide overall direction and leadership to project teams, ensuring clarity of objectives and effective communication throughout all project phases
* Develop comprehensive project plans that align with strategic business goals and client expectations
* Manage project budgets, timelines, and resources, ensuring projects are completed on time and within budget
* Collaborate with stakeholders, including clients, contractors, and regulatory bodies, to foster relationships and ensure compliance
* Oversee risk management processes and proactively address potential issues that could impact project delivery
* Conduct regular site visits and meetings with teams to monitor progress, address challenges, and maintain project momentum
* Prepare and present detailed project reports to senior management and stakeholders, highlighting key performance indicators and progress updates

**Requirements**

* Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering, Construction Management, or a related discipline; a master's degree is preferred
* Minimum of 22+ years of experience in construction management, with at least 5 years in a leadership role overseeing large-scale projects
* Proven track record of successfully delivering complex construction projects from inception to completion
* Strong leadership skills with the ability to influence and manage diverse teams effectively
* In-depth knowledge of construction methodologies, project management principles, and relevant legal regulations
* Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
* Proficient in project management software and tools
* Professional certifications such as PMP, or equivalent, are highly desirable

**Benefits**
Project benefits:
  
  

* Company accommodation (single occupancy)
* Company transportation
* Meals
* Laundry

data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
The
**Program Manager**
is responsible for leading and overseeing large-scale infrastructure programs comprising multiple projects, ensuring successful delivery from planning through execution. The role involves coordinating with project sponsors, cross-functional teams, and project managers to define scope, resources, budgets, and timelines, while driving alignment with client objectives. The Program Manager ensures effective risk management, quality control, and compliance with design specifications, safety, and environmental standards. Additionally, the role manages stakeholder communication, oversees contracts and fiscal controls, and optimizes project sequencing to enhance delivery efficiency and minimize operational disruption.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Participate in the planning and formulation of design alternatives and solutions for the construction project.
* Work closely with project sponsor, cross-functional teams, and assigned project managers to develop the scope, deliverables, required resources, work plan, budget, and timing for new initiatives.
* Manage program and project teams for optimal return on investment, and coordinate and delegate cross-project initiatives.
* Identify key requirements for cross-functional teams and external vendors.
* Develop and manage budget for projects and be accountable for delivering against established business goals/objectives.
* Work with other program managers to identify risks and opportunities across multiple projects within the department.
* Analyze, evaluate, and overcome program risks, and produce program reports for managers and stakeholders.
* Communicate with the Client’s representatives continuously regarding Project Progress and areas of concerns.
* Develop and administer project budgets and fiscal controls, contracts, and quality control provisions.
* Direct work sequencing to expedite projects delivery and to minimize disruption of ongoing operations.
* Ensure that projects operations are in compliance with design specifications and with client requirements.

* Bachelor's degree in engineering from an accredited university.
* Minimum 20 years’ experience in managing large-scale infrastructure programs consist of multiple projects.
* Experience of major government and/or semi-government program and projects implementations.
* Extensive Experience in the construction management of water and wastewater works.
* Experience of implementing a zero-accident philosophy.
* A record of engagement with government entities / utility providers.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
* Experience of working internationally.

data.jd_text:
**Description**
We are seeking an experienced Senior Program Manager to lead the Amazon Marketplace Experience Transformation (AMET) function for Delivery Associates (DAs) and Delivery Service Partners (DSPs) across Africa, Middle East, and Turkey. In this critical role, you will be based in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, focusing on local operations while developing and executing the regional strategy. You will leverage multiple listening channels to identify experience priorities, consolidate feedback, and work cross-functionally to address key improvement opportunities. This position requires exceptional stakeholder management and strategic thinking to create meaningful programs that enhance the overall driver and DSP experience across diverse markets.
  
  
Your expertise in program management, strategy development, and influence without authority will be essential as you partner with external entities to create impactful campaigns, present strategies to senior leadership, and drive initiatives that transform the delivery partner experience. You will serve as the strategic voice for delivery partners, ensuring their needs are represented in business decisions while balancing operational excellence and partner satisfaction
  
  
Key job responsibilities
  
  

* Develop and execute the strategic roadmap for delivery partner experience across Africa, Middle East, and Turkey, while maintaining focused implementation in Saudi Arabian operations.
* Collect and analyze insights from multiple listening channels to identify experience priorities, then work cross-functionally with operations teams, ACES, and DEX teams to address structural challenges within established SLAs.
* Draft comprehensive strategy documents and present recommendations to senior leadership, driving alignment and securing resources for key initiatives.
* Establish and manage partnerships with external entities to create campaigns and benefits for Delivery Associates and DSPs, including organizing annual partner meetings and launching ignite events throughout the region.
* Lead country expansion efforts and new program launches within AMET, ensuring consistent implementation of best practices while adapting to local market needs.

**Basic Qualifications**

* 5+ years of program or project management experience
* Experience using data and metrics to determine and drive improvements
* 5+ years of owning program strategy, end to end delivery, and communicating results to senior leadership experience
* Bachelor's degree
* Experience in English-language communication skills, both written and verbal
* Experience in Arabic-language communication skills, both written and verbal

**Preferred Qualifications**

* 2+ years of driving process improvements experience
* Master's degree, or MBA in business, operations, human resources, adult education, organizational development, instructional design or related field

data.title: Logistics Supply chain Manager, KSA , MEA-TR Delivery Service Partners
data.raw_snippet:
**Description**
Would you like to be part of a team focused on driving innovation in the transportation industry while working to empower entrepreneurs and contribute to Amazon’s sustainability goals?
  
  
Equal parts advisor and operating partner, Amazon’s team of Delivery Partner Managers assists
data.jd_text:
**Description**
Would you like to be part of a team focused on driving innovation in the transportation industry while working to empower entrepreneurs and contribute to Amazon’s sustainability goals?
  
  
Equal parts advisor and operating partner, Amazon’s team of Delivery Partner Managers assists and guides our Amazon DSPs (Logistics Supply chain Managers) business owners as they build and grow successful middle-mile businesses during a transformational time.
  
  
Account Manager (Logistics Supply chain Manager) manage the DSP relationship across the entire lifecycle of the business. As trusted advisors, Logistics Supply chain Manager, work alongside DSPs to help solve their biggest challenges at a programmatic level, influence their business planning and strategy, and look around corners to identify obstacles and recommend solutions, ensuring DSP owners make effective business decisions and are set up for success.
  
  
Key job responsibilities
  
  
As a Logistics Supply chain Manager, you will partner with 25-30 DSP owners across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia including entrepreneurs with no background in the logistics industry, or seasoned logistics carrier (Depending on business program)
  
  
Work closely with a portfolio of owners at different stages as they set strategy, help drive accountability and engagement, and motivate and track key performance metrics.
  
  
Collaborate with an integrated internal team of Program Managers and Compliance and Finance personnel to ensure owners launch and scale their business in compliance with program requirements.
  
  
Support owners by removing obstacles and improving financial, operational, and safety practices at the network level.
  
  
As Lead, Logistics Supply chain Manager will do this by analyzing problems, discovering insights, delivering recommendations, and driving change both internally and externally.
  
  
They will collaborate frequently with a wide array of integrated internal stakeholders such as Partner Relations (PAR), Value Added Service (VAS), Legal, fleet and network health to name a few. The Logistics Supply chain Manager support owners by removing obstacles and improving financial, operational, and safety practices at the network level. They facilitate and execute Monitoring and Enforcement Policies (MEP) and build two-way feedback channels with OTR teams, DSPs and WW/EU Product and strategy.
  
  
The Logistics Supply chain Manager r will be required to work flexibly and will be required to travel between multiple sites to engage with business owners weekly to carry out their role effectively.
  
  
A day in the life
  
  
Safety: Partnering with OTR Safety and OTR Regional Managers to ensure business safety compliance.
  
  
Performance: Guiding owners as they scale their business and manage operational issues, ensuring they have resources in place to effectively ramp-up operations and prepare for peak period.
  
  
Performance: Supporting owners as they onboard to the program and prepare to launch (this will be on the basis of a net new launch only)
  
  
Performance: Coach and ensure effective upskilling and utilisation of AMZL tools.
  
  
Performance: Deep dive to identify customer metric improvement opportunities.
  
  
Performance: Champion the consistent application of Last Mile processes within Delivery Stations – challenge UTR processes that impact OTR.
  
  
Performance: Coaching business owners to run compliant, safe and high performing companies (SLS metric deep dive)
  
  
Experience: Identifying workflow inefficiencies and working to formulate and implement operational improvements at the network level and to improve the individual DSP owner experience.
  
  
Experience: Developing the relationship between Amazon and our DSP partners (DSP sentiment improvements)
  
  
Experience: Communication alignment to DSP business owners following close collaboration with OTR partners.
  
  
Be the voice of the DSP within and represent them within the AMZL business.
  
  
Experience: Improve driver standards to protect brand image.
  
  
Capacity Management: Work with the DSP’s to deliver effective ramp plans and pipeline goals ensuring driver supply is achieved to meet peak volume demands.
  
  
**Basic Qualifications**

* Experience analyzing data and best practices to assess performance drivers
* Bachelor's degree

**Preferred Qualifications**

* 4+ years of client or vendor facing roles with a focus in relationship management and negotiation skills experience
* Experience aggregating and analyzing internal and external campaign metrics to assess performance drivers and identify insights
* MBA

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
  
  
  
**Company**
- Afaq Q Tech General Trading

data.jd_text:
Mace combines construction expertise with consultancy to unlock potential in every person or project and redefine the boundaries of ambition. Our values shape the way we consult and define the people we want to join us on our journey.
  
  
**The Project**
This is an opportunity to work on one of the largest programmes in Saudi Arabia. This unique project consists of major mixed-use development including sports facilities, entertainment, and arts along with all associated infrastructure.
  
  
As delivery director, you will take executive responsibility for the safe, high-quality, and on-schedule delivery of a major residential portfolio. Working within a large, integrated programme organisation, you will provide leadership to package delivery teams, ensure alignment with master schedule requirements, and drive performance across contractors, consultants, and internal delivery partner groups.
  
  
**You'll Be Responsible For**

* Lead safe, high‑quality, and compliant project delivery, championing wellbeing, inclusion, and adherence to local regulations.
* Provide strategic direction across key assignments, ensuring strong governance and trusted client relationships that drive growth.
* Oversee ethical, commercially robust operations and shape long‑term business strategy.
* Develop, mentor, and mobilise teams, promoting innovation, best practice, and talent excellence.
* Act as the senior point of contact across internal delivery partner teams, consultants, contractors, supervision consultants, and wider stakeholders.
* Lead the overall construction delivery strategy for the residential programme, ensuring alignment with the master schedule, commercial targets, and quality expectations.
* Ensure robust delivery governance, reporting structures, risk management, and issue escalation pathways.
* Manage interfaces across infrastructure, utilities, design, commercial, and programme controls.
* Support procurement strategies, package sequencing, contractor capability assessments, and tender evaluations.
* Drive value engineering, cost optimisation, and risk mitigation strategies across delivery.
* Lead executive reporting, including progress dashboards, risk registers, mitigation plans, and performance summaries.

**You’ll Need To Have**

* 20+ years' experience delivering major construction projects, including large-scale residential or mixed-use developments.
* Degree in engineering, construction management, architecture, or a related field.
* Chartered status preferred (e.g., ICE, CIOB, PMI, or equivalent).
* Strong track record in managing multi-package delivery on complex, fast-track programmes.
* Experience in a PMC, delivery partner, or Tier 1 contractor leadership role.
* Proven leadership of large, diverse teams and effective senior‑level stakeholder management.
* Necessary visa criteria for the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and relevant work experience working on high-valued projects/programmes for a project management consultancy business, which are required for immigration and client approval.

**Our values**
**Safety first - Going home safe and well:**
We champion a safe, diverse, and inclusive working environment, understanding the importance of well-being in every team.
  
  
**Client focus - Deliver on our promise:**
We own the quality of deliverables and strategic outcomes and build long-term relationships with our clients.
  
  
**Integrity - Always do the right thing:**
We influence positive outcomes within our industry while always aligning with our compliance obligations.
  
  
**Create opportunity - For our people to excel:**
We champion a continuous improvement culture throughout all activities, inspiring our people and teams to develop.
  
  
Mace is an inclusive employer and welcomes interest from a diverse range of candidates. Even if you feel you do not fulfill all the criteria, please apply, as you may still be the best candidate for this role or another role within our organisation.
  
  
We are also open to discussing part-time, flexible, and hybrid working options if suitable within the role.

data.raw_snippet:
**Job Overview**
The Senior Director - Commercial (SDU) at Qiddiya Investment Company is a strategic leadership role responsible for overseeing commercial activities within the Strategic Development Unit (SDU). You will drive strategic commerciality (and safety) into every decision both in procureme
data.jd_text:
**Job Overview**
The Senior Director - Commercial (SDU) at Qiddiya Investment Company is a strategic leadership role responsible for overseeing commercial activities within the Strategic Development Unit (SDU). You will drive strategic commerciality (and safety) into every decision both in procurement and in contract administration. Setting up strategy and execution to the outset through PM/CM specific process and procedures to suit the task at hand whilst fully complying with internal governance and Delegation of Authority. Responsible for driving outturn cost within the agreed business plans and cost plans and feeding back commercial lessons learned and outturn to cost planning.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Establish, implement, and maintain the commercial management framework for the Construction Management vertical, covering procurement commercial strategy, contract administration, cost control, and commercial assurance
* Define and embed commercial policies, processes, procedures, manuals, and templates tailored to Project Management / Construction Management delivery models, while ensuring full alignment with QDC governance and Delegation of Authority requirements
* Drive strategic commercial decision‑making across procurement and contract administration, ensuring value for money, appropriate risk allocation, and integration of safety considerations into commercial outcomes
* Lead development of commercial strategies at project and programme level, aligned with approved business plans, cost plans, and delivery strategies
* Provide functional oversight and governance of procurement commercial inputs, including contract strategies, commercial terms, payment mechanisms, incentives, and risk provisions
* Lead and oversee contract administration frameworks, including change control, payment certification, claims management, EOT assessments, dispute avoidance, and close‑out
* Ensure robust cost management, forecasting, and reporting throughout the project lifecycle, driving delivery of final outturn costs within approved budgets
* Monitor commercial performance, risks, and exposures, and implement mitigation strategies in coordination with Delivery, Procurement, Finance, and Risk functions
* Act as the commercial authority within the Construction Management vertical, providing guidance, challenge, and escalation support to project teams in a matrix capacity
* Establish and maintain clear commercial governance checkpoints aligned with stage‑gate approvals and executive decision forums
* Support preparation and review of commercial inputs to Board and N‑1 papers, including cost summaries, risk positions, commercial strategies, and recommendations
* Ensure alignment between cost planning, commercial execution, and outturn performance, and provide structured feedback to cost planning teams on variances, trends, and lessons learned
* Capture, analyse, and disseminate commercial lessons learned, benchmarks, and best practices across the Construction Management vertical and wider QDC organisation
* Support the build‑up and capability development of the Construction Management commercial function, including mentoring, standards setting, and skills development
* Coordinate closely with the Project Director Design, Project Director Delivery, Project Director Procurement, and Finance functions to ensure integrated, end‑to‑end commercial control
* Represent the Construction Management vertical in senior internal and external forums on commercial, contractual, and cost matters, as required

**Requirements**
**Education**

* Bachelor's degree in Quantity Surveying, Engineering, Construction Management, Commercial Management, or a related discipline (minimum)
* Master's Degree in a related field is preferred

**Specific Skills Required**

* Strong experience in commercial management of large‑scale construction and infrastructure projects, preferably within CM or self‑delivery models
* Deep understanding of procurement commercial strategies and contract administration across multiple delivery models
* Proven ability to establish and operate commercial governance frameworks, controls, and assurance mechanisms
* Strong knowledge of cost planning, budgeting, forecasting, and outturn cost management
* Experience operating within strict governance and Delegation of Authority environments, ideally within giga‑projects
* Ability to embed safety, risk, and compliance considerations into commercial decision‑making
* Strong leadership, stakeholder management, and influencing skills
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills, including executive‑level reporting
* High level of professionalism, judgment, and commercial acumen

**Experience**

* 15-20 years' relevant experience in senior commercial leadership roles within large programmes, mega or giga‑projects, or complex construction environments
* Experience within GCC is highly desirable

**Benefits**
Comprehensive benefits package

data.title: Performance Improvement Director - Refining & Chemicals (Energy & Process Industries Practice)
data.raw_snippet: At AlixPartners, we solve the most complex and critical challenges by moving quickly from analysis to action when it really matters; creating value that has a lasting impact on companies, their people, and the communities they serve. By understanding, respecting, and honoring the needs of our employ
data.jd_text:
At AlixPartners, we solve the most complex and critical challenges by moving quickly from analysis to action when it really matters; creating value that has a lasting impact on companies, their people, and the communities they serve. By understanding, respecting, and honoring the needs of our employees, clients, and communities, AlixPartners actively promotes an inclusive environment. We strongly believe in the value that diversity brings to our experiences and are committed to the perpetual enhancements of initiatives, policies, and practices. We hold ourselves accountable by providing the space for authenticity, growth, and equity for everyone.
  
  
AlixPartners has embraced a hybrid work model to provide flexibility and support our employees’ work-life integration. Our hybrid model combines a mix of in-person (at client site or AlixPartners office) and remote working. Travel is part of this position, but the frequency may vary based on client, team, and individual circumstances.
  
  
**What You’ll Do**
Are you ready to build a future that exceeds your expectations? At AlixPartners, a leading global consulting firm, we help CEOs, boards, and owners tackle their most complex, high-value challenges—often those making front-page news and shaping Board Room agendas.
  
  
Our Energy & Process Industries (EPI) practice works with healthy, underperforming, and distressed companies across the refining, petrochemicals, and broader downstream value chain. We are seeking an experienced and entrepreneurial Director to lead and expand our Refining & Chemicals platform. This role requires a proven leader who can drive transformational client delivery, spearhead business development, and manage multiple high-stakes engagements simultaneously.
  
  
You will collaborate with C-level executives at national, integrated, and independent energy and chemicals companies, as well as institutional investors and portfolio firms. Drawing on your deep industry expertise, you’ll deliver measurable results across strategy, operations, capital, and performance.
  
  
As part of our collaborative, fast-paced team, you will work on urgent, high-impact situations—helping clients unlock value while pursuing your own professional development and growth aspirations.
  
  

* Lead end-to-end client delivery across strategy, operational improvement, cost transformation, and commercial performance in refining and petrochemicals
* Serve as a trusted advisor to senior executives and boards—especially in situations of urgency, complexity, or underperformance
* Oversee and coordinate multiple concurrent client engagements, ensuring excellence in delivery and outcomes across teams
* Drive business development efforts with both existing and new clients—developing relationships, shaping opportunities, and converting high-value mandates
* Build and develop the practice, including talent development, capability building, and cross-functional collaboration across AlixPartners globally
* Collaborate closely with peers in turnaround, restructuring, due diligence, and value creation to bring multi-disciplinary solutions to clients and investors

The Performance Improvement Director - Refining & Chemicals (Energy & Process Industries Practice) is a permanent role located in Riyadh and reports to the Partner.
  
  
This description is not designed to encompass a comprehensive listing of required activities, duties or responsibilities.
  
  
What you’ll need
  
  

* A minimum of 15 years of experience with a blend of strategic consulting and industry leadership in refining, petrochemicals, or downstream
* Experience may include time with:
* A top-tier strategy firm at Senior Manager or Principal level
* A global energy or chemicals operator in VP or senior functional/strategy roles
* An institutional investor or PE-backed portfolio company with a focus on value creation
* Demonstrated ability to lead both delivery and business development across complex client portfolios
* Deep understanding of global energy markets, value chains, and regional dynamics, with experience in the Middle East a strong plus
* Prior involvement in M&A, commercial diligence, or post-deal transformation is advantageous
* A track record of high-impact problem solving, boardroom presence, and driving results under pressure
* Strong academic credentials from a top university; advanced degree (MBA, MS)
* Advanced written communication skills experienced with preparing client ready documents as well as structuring and developing presentation materials
* Advanced proficiency with Microsoft Word, PowerPoint, Excel, database applications and other related tools
* Fluency in English is critical; Arabic knowledge would be advantageous
* High energy style, flexible and adaptive, with the ability to work well in a very fast paced environment
* Willingness to travel extensively
* You will hold valid residency for Saudi Arabia, or be able to obtain such, (administrative support will be provided by AlixPartners to obtain permits)
* Willingness to work outside of normal business hours, and in particular as unique projects/needs arise
* Must become familiar with, and promote and abide by, our Core Values as defined by the AlixPartners’ Code of Conduct and foster an inclusive environment with people at all levels of an organization

Office Location: Olaya Business District, Riyadh
  
  
Working hours: 8:30am – 5:30pm, Sunday to Thursday, hybrid model
  
  
*The firm offers market-leading benefits that provide flexible options to support our employee’s needs, you can read more about the AlixPartners benefits here.*
*This advert will be removed once a suitable candidate has been identified.*
*AlixPartners is an equal opportunity employer.*
*#*
*LI-Hybrid*

data.title: Design Management Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Director of Project Design Management**
Want to work with the most sought-after minds and most talked-about projects? Your experience of Design Management in Engineering Consultancy might just make you our new Design Management Director.
  
  
**Job Description**
**Here at Buro Happold, expect the
data.jd_text:
**Director of Project Design Management**
Want to work with the most sought-after minds and most talked-about projects? Your experience of Design Management in Engineering Consultancy might just make you our new Design Management Director.
  
  
**Job Description**
**Here at Buro Happold, expect the exceptional.**
From the projects you will work on to the clients we work with. From career-defining opportunities to an inclusive and diverse practice where we all contribute to a more equitable world. From our reputation to our relationships. Wherever your Buro Happold career takes you, it’ll be anything but ordinary.
  
  
**Your next role**
Buro Happold has a clear strategic plan, strong learning culture and entrepreneurial mindset that will allow you to thrive.
  
  
You’ll be part of something bigger than us all where sustainability, equity, social and performance outcomes matter. All of Buro Happold is committed to doing the right thing, even when that’s the hardest thing. This is a genuine opportunity to make impact - and leave real legacy.
  
  
**Your key duties**
The role entails providing strategic leadership to clients and overseeing major buildings and infrastructure projects across the Middle East. It also carries the accountability for the successful delivery of complex, multidisciplinary projects, ensuring the highest standards of quality, commercial performance, and client satisfaction. Acting as a trusted senior advisor, the director will be the primary client interface, working closely with local partners and regional leadership.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**
**Strategic Project Delivery**

* Scope Management: Define and manage project scope to ensure alignment with client expectations and organisational objectives.
* Schedule Management: Oversee the development and governance of robust project programmes to achieve timely delivery.
* Quality Assurance: Establish and maintain quality control processes to ensure all deliverables meet internal and client standards.
* Financial Oversight: Provide strategic supervision of project budgets, financial performance, and risk management.
* Governance & Commercial Control: Implement and uphold strong commercial and governance practices.

**Leadership**

* Client Engagement: Lead senior‑level client meetings and act as a trusted advisor.
* Mentorship: Coach and mentor senior staff, supporting succession planning and professional development.
* Design Leadership: Guide teams in resolving complex project challenges through integrated, multidisciplinary solutions.
* Service Growth: Identify opportunities to promote Buro Happold’s wider service offerings.
* Team Leadership: Foster a positive, high‑performance team culture in appointed Buro Happold project teams.

**Collaboration**

* Cross‑Discipline Working: Support collaboration across disciplines, regions, and business units to deliver exceptional outcomes.
* Knowledge Sharing: Contribute to the wider practice by sharing lessons learned, best practice, and thought leadership.
* Role Modelling: Champion collaborative behaviours and inclusive ways of working in appointed Buro Happold project teams.

**Technical & Professional Excellence**

* Technology Integration: Advise on the strategic use of digital tools and project technologies to enhance delivery and client value.
* Deliverable Quality: Ensure all reports, presentations, models, and drawings are produced to the highest professional standards.
* Quality Compliance: Enforce compliance with Buro Happold’s internal quality management systems.
* Professional Development: Promote continuous learning, CPD, and awareness of industry and technical advancements.

**Your Skills And Experience**

* Degree in Architecture, Engineering, or Master Planning.
* Proven experience in a senior leadership role with at least 5 years in the Middle East.
* Project management qualification (e.g., PMP) or significant project delivery experience.
* Professional accreditation from a recognised organisation.
* Strong technical background in multidisciplinary building and infrastructure design.
* Proven experience in strategic project delivery and team leadership, including managing remote teams.
* Excellent communication skills, capable of engaging with senior clients and collaborators.
* Understanding of Middle East policies and regulations.
* Experience in managing multidisciplinary LDC projects, overseeing financial and technical performance, and creating and managing programmes.
* Experience in developing long term relationships with clients and collaborators, and leading fee estimates, proposals, and negotiating terms and conditions.
* Familiarity with Project Management information systems (e.g., Aconex).

**What We Offer You**

* Bring your knowledge and expertise to one of the world’s most respected consultancies.
* Hybrid working arrangements
* Attractive salary and benefits package
* A strong commitment to your continuous development. Whatever stage in your career, we have a learning and development programme that will enable and empower you
* Entitlement to two memberships to professional bodies or subscriptions
* An international culture that wherever your career takes you at Buro Happold, you won’t be far from the exceptional.

**At Buro Happold, everyone else’s extraordinary is just our everyday.**
**Apply today and be a part of our legacy.**
**A place for everyone**
Buro Happold values individual's flexible approaches to working patterns as an important part of the way you work and achieve balance. We welcome applications from those who are seeking flexibility in their careers.
  
  
Our exceptional portfolio of projects is the result of the diversity of thought, identities, backgrounds and experiences that shape us. Appreciating each other’s differences is key, we want employees to feel they don’t have to mask elements of their identity to thrive.
  
  
We are working to change the lack of representation of marginalised groups in the built environment and are particularly keen to hear from anyone who feels they are underrepresented in the industry. We have much to learn from one another. Embracing difference allows us to develop the most innovative and elegant solutions.
  
  
Please let us know if there are any adjustments, we could make to the application process to make it easier and more comfortable for you. Contact recruitment@burohappold.com so we can work with you to support you throughout your application.

data.title: Aviation Associate Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
WSP in the Middle East are seeking an experienced Associate Director – Aviation to be based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. The role supports the Aviation Director in leading the sector’s strategic growth, operational excellence, and project delivery across the Kingdom.
  
  
The Associ
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
WSP in the Middle East are seeking an experienced Associate Director – Aviation to be based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. The role supports the Aviation Director in leading the sector’s strategic growth, operational excellence, and project delivery across the Kingdom.
  
  
The Associate Director will play a key role in business development, key client relationships, sector capability building, and oversight of major aviation projects, while ensuring quality, compliance, and alignment with WSP’s strategic objectives. The role also contributes to innovation, best practices, and continuous improvement across aviation programmes.
  
  
**Responsibilities**
Strategic Leadership & Sector Support
  
  

* Support the Aviation Director in driving the strategic growth and positioning of the aviation sector in KSA.
* Contribute to sector planning, market analysis, and identification of new aviation opportunities.
* Assist in shaping sector strategy in line with regional priorities, client needs, and WSP objectives.

Business Development & Client Engagement
  
  

* Support and contribute to business development activities, including pursuits, bids, and client presentations.
* Develop and maintain strong relationships with key aviation clients, authorities, and stakeholders.
* Provide senior input into proposals, fee strategies, and technical positioning.

Project Oversight & Delivery Excellence
  
  

* Provide oversight and strategic input on select major aviation projects, ensuring delivery excellence.
* Ensure projects meet quality, safety, compliance, and contractual requirements.
* Support project teams in managing risks, resolving issues, and achieving programme objectives.

Technical Excellence & Capability Development
  
  

* Promote best practices, innovation, and continuous improvement across aviation programmes.
* Support development of sector capability, including mentoring of senior staff and talent development.
* Contribute to knowledge sharing, lessons learned, and technical leadership within the aviation community.

Governance & Quality Assurance
  
  

* Ensure alignment with internal governance, operational procedures, and client expectations.
* Support assurance reviews, independent checks, and senior-level decision making where required.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Architecture, Aviation, or a related discipline.
* Master’s degree or professional chartership is desirable.
* 15+ years’ experience in the aviation or infrastructure sector, with significant exposure to large-scale aviation programmes.
* Proven experience supporting or operating at senior leadership level (Associate Director / Director / Senior Manager).
* Strong Middle East experience, preferably Saudi Arabia (KSA).
* Skills & Competencies
* Strong understanding of aviation sector clients, delivery models, and regulatory environments.
* Proven ability to manage senior stakeholders and client relationships.
* Commercial awareness with experience supporting bids, negotiations, and strategic pursuits.
* Strong leadership, communication, and decision-making skills.

data.title: Business Director - Communications Consultancy
data.raw_snippet:
**Company Description**
Saatchi & Saatchi is a leading global communications and advertising network known for its impactful creative ideas that generate powerful emotional connections between consumers and brands. Present in over 67 countries, Saatchi & Saatchi employs 6,500 professionals over 114
data.jd_text:
**Company Description**
Saatchi & Saatchi is a leading global communications and advertising network known for its impactful creative ideas that generate powerful emotional connections between consumers and brands. Present in over 67 countries, Saatchi & Saatchi employs 6,500 professionals over 114 offices. Global clients include HSBC, P&G, Toyota, Visa and GSK. Saatchi & Saatchi is part of Publicis Communications a key division of Publicis Groupe, the world’s third largest communications group.
  
  
**Overview**
The Business Director role is responsible for both building client relationships and managing a team, while collaborating with senior leadership ( Business Lead / CEO), other agency departments (creative, strategy, production) and other potential partners from Publicis Group (media, Vertical, epsilon, sapient)
  
  
This candidate will lead the strategic, operational and delivery aspects of major accounts and own relationships with Saatchi & Saatchi Wellness.
  
  
client(s).
  
  
They will work closely with the Business Lead of your account(s) and ultimately ensuring high levels of client satisfaction and revenue growth across your assigned client portfolio.
  
  
The Business Director will take responsibility & accountability for the growth of their team and client business, identifying and developing opportunities to drive new business proposals involving the group capabilities.
  
  
Foster the agency’s beliefs and spirit externally-internally, as well as develop and drive vision for the business, aiming to bring in more business and drive the Power of One development and implementation.
  
  
As part of their day-to-day office leadership team, the candidate will work to inspire, mentor, and guide the career development of your team members
  
  
**Responsibilities**
**Technical & Product**

* Lead client conversations and work closely with Business Lead(s) to ensure excellence in strategy, creative
* and production.
* Oversee strategy, planning, creative execution, production for all assigned client accounts. Responsible
* for winning client commitment to the agency and Group’s direction, strategy, recommendations, and
* subsequent execution, translating business needs to creative challenges and ensuring a timely delivery
* milestone.
* Perceived as a trusted advisor by your own clients and as an expert in specific industry, internally and in the
* market, by demonstrating deep understanding and knowledge of category.
* Be able to define the correct scope, the needed resources and deliver accordingly to financial targets for the
* current year.
* Support in business development reports alongside other senior agency stakeholders and engage relevant
* group resources when appropriate.

**Business Acumen & Operational Efficiency**

* Responsible of all outcomes, quality control and the health of the relationship with the client across all
* disciplines, practices, facets of the business internal and external.
* Build strong client relationships to understand the needs and requirements to proactively support the
* day-to-day delivery of projects.
* Set the yearly strategic roadmap with the client on business transformation by becoming the trusted
* consultant and authority on the client’s consumer journey.
* Ensure that the brand strategy, client messaging and deliverables (from planning to roll out) are consistent.
* Serve in a brand guardian role.
* Responsible for the smooth operating of day-to-day workstreams and foster positive collaboration between
* senior team members, strategy & creative colleagues, and all other experts to facilitate smooth process and
* project management delivery.
* Lead your team on all plans (check and upload from markets), ensuring the process is running timely and
* efficiently.
* Drive business transformation and innovation for clients.
* Drives integration and interdependence across all capabilities to deliver high-standard integrated communication solutions
* Capable of breaking down silos to enable collaboration across different Groupe verticals and practices.
* Constantly aim to have award winning work delivered to get recognition for clients in their industry and
* get recognition as an industry leader in our field.
* Support other teams when pitching for clients of similar industry.
* Responsible for the management of a healthy and profitable client P&L.
* Responsible for the commercial tracking, forecasts, and numbers ensuring no blindsides negatively affect the
* agency’s commitments.
* Inspire, mentor, and nurture the team to build capability and develop competence.

**Qualifications**

* 10 years experience with a track record in creative, brand, digital, social and data-driven marketing projects in creative agencies, with a strong focus on healthcare communication.
* Experience in being client facing in a leading role
* Management experience of a team
* Arabic fluency is a must, as well as English
* Excellent understanding of end-to-end communication eco-system, with a deep understanding of the health industry , communications trends, and latest trends in data and marketing integration.
* Experience in planning, strategy, managing and activating multichannel campaigns.
* BA degree (or similar)

**Additional Information**
R-3712L-1170

data.title: Product Delivery Manager - Offer Optimization
data.raw_snippet: Riyadh Air (RX), headquartered in the Saudi Capital, is the new national airline that’s shaping the future of flying. It seeks to lead the aviation industry by transforming Saudi Arabia into a global aviation and trade hub - a digitally native airline that will connect the kingdom to more than 100 d
data.jd_text:
Riyadh Air (RX), headquartered in the Saudi Capital, is the new national airline that’s shaping the future of flying. It seeks to lead the aviation industry by transforming Saudi Arabia into a global aviation and trade hub - a digitally native airline that will connect the kingdom to more than 100 destinations.
  
  
**About The Role**
Are you a delivery-focused technical leader with a passion for building next generation airline retailing capabilities?
  
  
We are seeking a driven product delivery manager to oversee the operational delivery, integration, and readiness of Riyadh Air’s Offer Management platforms.
  
  
In this role, you will guide the end to end execution of critical retailing capabilities, ensure alignment with digital and commercial strategies, and lead cross functional squads and vendors to deliver reliable, scalable, and future ready systems.
  
  
You will manage the rollout of NDC compliant workflows and implement key offer Management functions such as continuous pricing, offer construction, optimization, order servicing, refunds, and disruption handling.
  
  
You are expected to translate strategic roadmaps into clear delivery plans, establish operational readiness criteria, and ensure smooth technical integrations across multiple platforms.
  
  
A core part of this role includes maintaining delivery discipline, managing risks and dependencies, coordinating Agile ceremonies, enforcing quality controls, and ensuring stable releases that meet Riyadh Air’s performance and SLA expectations.
  
  
This is a unique opportunity to influence Riyadh Air’s commercial technology foundation and play a leading role in shaping a world class retailing ecosystem for one of the industry’s most ambitious airline startups.
  
  
**About You**
Degree qualified, you will bring at least 8 years’ experience in enterprise product delivery or technology delivery, ideally within the airline or travel domain. Experience working with PSS transformation (Amadeus, Sabre, or similar) and Passenger Revenue Management platforms (PROS, Amadeus NRMS, Sabre RO) is highly desirable.
  
  
You are expected to airline merchandising engines, ancillaries, bundling, and competitor pricing capabilities. Strong experience coordinating cross functional teams, managing vendors, and delivering technically complex integrations is essential.
  
  
You will excel at converting strategy into structured delivery plans, maintaining RAID governance, driving Agile execution, and ensuring operational readiness across multiple delivery streams. Experience in managing technical checkpoints, quality gates, and integration dependencies will be key.
  
  
Your ability to collaborate effectively, communicate clearly, manage complexity, and consistently deliver high quality outcomes will set you up for success in this role.
  
  
This is your opportunity to shape the future of air travel. Bring your best and show us why you can own this position within Riyadh Air.
  
  
Please submit your application by clicking on the Apply button. Our Talent Acquisition team will be reviewing applications shortly.

The Content Manager will be responsible for creating, managing and executing social media content strategies for our clients in a digital, social media & creative scope. The ideal candidate will have a deep understanding of social media platforms and the latest social media trends, as well as excellent copywriting skills.

* Expert writing and editing skills for various platforms and formats

* Content and publishing calendar creation
* Write and edit high-quality social media content, including posts, captions, and blogs.
* Collaborate with creative teams and account managers to ensure brand consistency and client satisfaction.
* Stay up to date with the latest social media trends and best practices.
* Monitor industry social media activity

**Business Acumen & Operational Efficiency**

* Strong business acumen with a demonstrated ability to understand client needs and objectives
* Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously while ensuring quality and timeliness of deliverables
* Proven track record of meeting or exceeding project goals and targets
* Strong organizational and project management skills

**Innovative & Analytical Mindset**

* Creative and innovative approach to social media content creation
* Ability to analyze data and metrics to inform content strategy
* Ability to think critically and solve problems

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Journalism, or a related field
* Minimum of 5+ years of experience in social media content creation and management, preferably in an agency setting
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills

**Additional Information**

**luxury lifestyle services**
and a proven track record in
**team leadership and service excellence**
. The ideal candidate will have:
  
  
****Expertise & Industry Insight****

* Deep knowledge of luxury lifestyle services, including hospitality, travel, and premium experiences
* Active awareness of Arabic luxury markets, ensuring service excellence and innovation
* Ability to bridge Proposition and Lifestyle teams, setting and exceeding industry standards

****Leadership & Team Development****

* Strong people management skills, leading high-performing teams across multiple locations
* A mentor and motivator, driving engagement, growth, and professional excellence
* Cross-functional leadership experience, ensuring alignment across global teams

****Service Excellence & Problem-Solving****

* Results-driven mindset, focused on member satisfaction, efficiency, and SLAs
* Proactive problem solver, identifying and resolving roadblocks to enhance service quality
* Expert in customer care, confidently handling escalations and turning challenges into positive outcomes

****Collaboration & Communication****

* Professional Arabic & English language skills are essential
* Exceptional communication skills, engaging stakeholders across all levels
* Collaborative and adaptable, excelling in a fast-paced, evolving environment

This role is perfect for a
**dynamic leader**
who thrives in a
**member-focused, high-performance environment**
, committed to
**innovation and continuous improvement**
.
  
  
This role is 100% office based!
  
  
**Benefits**
Our people are at the heart of the business and we have a culture of recognition and reward - both through regular appraisals but also through annual Extra Mile Awards where we celebrate those who have gone that extra mile in their role. We also encourage all our staff to incorporate their aspirations and interests into their career at Ten and we are there every step of the way to support development.
  
  
🌎
***Rewards designed around you:***

* A competitive salary depending on experience, plus a performance-based bonus
* Paid time away from work. Our employees enjoy a competitive paid time off package, including a paid day each year to volunteer time for a good cause that is important to them
* Paid Sabbaticals. One (1) month paid Sabbatical after every 5 years of Service, without tapping into annual leave
* Extra Rewards. Lucrative Ten Loyalty Rewards program which includes a bonus and gift to say thank you for being part of Ten
* Remote Working Holidays - possibilities to Travel and Work anywhere in the world!
* Employee Discounts. Access to lots of great travel and entertainment discounts as our clients' members would!
* Be part of our global, dynamic, and inclusive Team, with diversity at its core
* Genuine career opportunities within a dynamic and international company

**Who We Are**
Ten Life Group is a global luxury concierge service and our travel department is offering a unique opportunity to join a vibrant team. Our clients and colleagues are the cornerstones of what we do, and we serve High-Networth (HNW) and UHNW clients with their requests for leisure travel. At Ten our goal is simple, to become the most trusted service business in the world.
  
  
We deliver our service through a combination of Ten's proprietary, unique technology-enabled platform and the expertise of our highly trained lifestyle managers. Ten is growing quickly and has ambitious plans to keep innovating, inspiring and continuing to improve the lives of millions of members. As a Certified B Corp, Ten Lifestyle Group joins a global community of businesses united by a shared goal of making a positive impact on society and the environment.
  
  
To find out more about Ten, please watch this short video Discover The Exciting World Of Ten Lifestyle Group 2024 - YouTube
  
  
**Commitment to Diversity**
We encourage diverse philosophies, cultures, and experiences. We appreciate diversity and are dedicated to creating an inclusive work environment for our employees. This idea unites the teams at TEN. All aspects of our relationship, including the decision to hire, promote, discipline, or terminate, will be based on merit, competence, performance and business needs.
  
  
*"Ten works with a small preferred supplier list of recruitment agencies only. Please note we are not accepting any further recruitment agencies at this time. Ten Group is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes."*
**Thank you for considering a career with us. Don't miss the opportunity to join our team! Submit your application before then to be considered for this exciting opportunity. We look forward to reviewing your application!**

to lead complex IT infrastructure, security, and operations initiatives within a highly regulated bankin
data.jd_text:
A global technology and consulting services provider supporting major financial institutions across the region. The organization is seeking a
**Technical Project Manager – Banking IT Operations**
to lead complex IT infrastructure, security, and operations initiatives within a highly regulated banking environment. The role will work closely with engineering teams, vendors, and business stakeholders to ensure successful delivery of mission‑critical projects.

**Responsibilities**

**Project Leadership & Execution**

* Lead end-to-end delivery of IT infrastructure and operations projects within the banking environment.
* Develop detailed project plans, technical work breakdown structures, and dependency maps.
* Oversee scope, schedules, risks, budgets, and resources across multiple concurrent workstreams.
* Manage upgrades, migrations, and deployments with minimal business disruption following structured change management.
* Ensure projects comply with architectural, cybersecurity, and regulatory requirements.
* Implement standardized project delivery frameworks to improve operational consistency.

**Technical Delivery Management**

* Oversee workstreams involving collaboration platform upgrades, security control implementation, observability solutions, and cloud operations.
* Manage initiatives across servers, networks, storage, virtualization, and disaster recovery/continuity environments.

**Vendor & Stakeholder Management**

* Manage vendors and external service partners ensuring contractual and SLA compliance.
* Provide clear project reporting, risk updates, and audit responses to leadership and governance forums.
* Coordinate across infrastructure, cloud, networking, application, and security teams.

**Risk, Compliance & Governance**

* Enforce adherence to IT risk management, cybersecurity frameworks, and internal/external regulatory standards.
* Maintain project documentation, approvals, compliance evidence, and audit-ready artifacts.

**Qualifications & Skills**

**Professional Experience**

* 5–10+ years of IT project management experience, ideally within banking or financial services.
* Strong background in infrastructure, cloud, and cybersecurity delivery.
* Demonstrated ability to manage multiple complex technical initiatives simultaneously.

**Technical Competencies**

* Strong knowledge of enterprise collaboration systems, identity platforms, and directory services.
* Understanding of networking fundamentals, cloud platforms (Azure/AWS), and observability technologies.
* Familiarity with IT security controls, compliance standards, and virtualization platforms.
* Knowledge of ITSM processes aligned with ITIL.

**Project Management Competencies**

* Expertise in project planning, RAID logs, governance reporting, and stakeholder engagement.
* Proficiency in project delivery tools (e.g., MS Project, Azure DevOps, Jira, Confluence).
* Certifications such as PMP, PRINCE2, or Agile methodologies are preferred.

**Soft Skills**

* Strong leadership and communication abilities.
* Capable of translating complex technical information for executive stakeholders.
* High ownership, analytical capability, and comfort working under pressure.

**Education**

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, or related field.
* Master’s degree is a plus.

**Halian Group:**

With over 28 years of experience, we have come to understand that innovation is the only way to provide agile, practical solutions that transform businesses and careers.

Our resourcing and smart services help you to realize tomorrow’s potential. Discover the amazing things possible when you bring the right people and the right technologies together.

At Halian, we recognize that diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) are essential to building high-performing teams for our clients. We are committed to connecting organizations with top talent from all backgrounds, ensuring that every individual feels valued, respected, and empowered to contribute their unique perspectives. We encourage applications from all qualified candidates, regardless of race, gender, disability, or any other characteristic that makes them unique. By fostering diverse and inclusive workplaces, we help our clients drive innovation, enhance collaboration, and better reflect the communities they serve.
