Trade
data.jd_text:
Sanabil Studio is a venture builder that blends industry expertise, technology, and startup know-how to turn bold ideas into real businesses. We take concepts from zero to launch, and when a venture proves its potential, we back it with seed funding and hands-on support to help it scale.
  
  
TradePay is one of those ventures - a B2B trade platform for the FMCG sector in Saudi Arabia, built to improve how merchants and suppliers transact, settle, and grow. We are creating a scalable, data-informed platform that supports day-to-day trade while maintaining strong operational discipline and risk controls.
  
  
We are looking for a Head of Product to lead TradePay’s product vision and execution-shaping the roadmap, driving delivery, and ensuring the platform serves merchants, suppliers, and internal teams as the business scales.
  
  
**THE ROLE**
What you'll own here.
  
  

* Define and own the product vision and roadmap, aligned with company objectives.
* Lead product discovery, prioritization, and delivery across core platform workflows.
* Partner closely with Engineering, Risk, Operations, Partnerships, and Legal to ship reliable, scalable solutions.
* Own product requirements, backlog management, release planning, and delivery quality.
* Lead integrations with external partners and service providers.
* Define and drive product and development operating rituals - backlog, PRDs, metrics, release readiness, and post-mortems.
* Establish product metrics and reporting to support data-driven decisions.
* Design and iterate on incentive and engagement mechanisms to improve adoption, retention, and healthy usage, with appropriate controls.
* Hire, coach, and develop a small, high-performing product team as the company grows.

**How Success Will Be Measured**

* A clear, credible roadmap executed reliably.
* Stable delivery across core workflows and partner integrations.
* Improved adoption, retention, and operational efficiency.
* Incentive mechanisms that drive usage while maintaining strong controls.
* Solid product processes, team collaboration, and reporting.

**THE PROFILE**
You're probably a fit if…
  
  

* You have 7-10+ years of product experience, including in senior leadership roles.
* You’ve built and scaled products in fintech, marketplaces, B2B platforms, or operationally complex environments.
* You have a strong understanding of transaction-based systems, workflows, and platform integrations.
* You’ve designed gamification, loyalty, or incentive systems tied to measurable business outcomes - not just engagement metrics.
* You can translate business needs into clear product requirements and outcomes without needing someone to hand you a structure.
* You’re comfortable in ambiguous, fast-moving environments and know how to create momentum where there is little.
* You communicate effectively across engineering, operations, commercial teams, and external partners.
* Bonus: experience in B2B payments, lending, or working-capital products; FMCG or supply-chain businesses; emerging-market product launches; or A/B testing and cohort analysis.

**THE ENVIRONMENT:**
What working here actually looks like.
  
  
**Direct Line to the Top:**
You’ll report directly to the Founder and CEO, with short feedback loops and real influence on company direction from day one.
  
  
**Complex, Real-World Product Building:**
TradePay operates in the real economy - FMCG supply chains, merchant credit, and supplier settlements. The problems are challenging, the impact is tangible, and the platform is yours to shape.
  
  
**Early Stage With Serious Ambition:**
We’re building with operational discipline and a long-term view. You’ll set the product foundation that takes TradePay from where it is today to genuine scale.
  
  
**What You Get From Us**

* Competitive pay: A package that reflects your seniority and the market.
* Meaningful equity: Real upside tied to the long-term value you help create.
* Premium gear, day one: Everything you need to hit the ground running, set up and ready before your first morning.
* Mentorship that matters: Individual career development from people who’ve actually built and scaled ventures.
* An accelerated curve: You’ll learn more here in 12 months than most roles offer in three years.

AstraZeneca is a global, science-led, patient-focused biopharmaceutical company that focuses on the discovery, development, and commercialisation o
data.jd_text:
**JOB TITLE**
**Public Policy Associate Director**
**Job Location:**
Riyadh
  
  
**Reports To:**
Corporate Affairs Director
  
  
**About Astrazeneca**
AstraZeneca is a global, science-led, patient-focused biopharmaceutical company that focuses on the discovery, development, and commercialisation of prescription medicines for some of the world’s most serious diseases. But we’re more than one of the world’s leading pharmaceutical companies.
  
  
**Site Description**
***AstraZeneca is experiencing a significant transformation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, driven by a commitment to advancing healthcare, innovation, and sustainable growth. Building on our global legacy, AZ KSA is rapidly evolving its operations to better serve patients, collaborate with healthcare stakeholders, and contribute to the ambitious goals outlined in the Saudi Vision 2030. We are investing in talent, digital solutions, and new ways of working; all designed to enhance our impact on patient outcomes and reinforce our leadership in therapeutic areas. This dynamic environment calls for visionary, agile professionals who thrive in change and are motivated to help shape the future of healthcare in KSA.***
**Role Summary**
The
**Public Policy Associate Director**
is responsible for shaping, executing, and advancing AstraZeneca’s policy and advocacy strategy in support of the business unit’s portfolio and objectives. Reporting to the Gulf Corporate Affairs Director, this leadership role focuses on analyzing and influencing the external policy environment, identifying opportunities and risks, and guiding the organization’s engagement with critical stakeholders. The position works cross-functionally with commercial, medical, regulatory, and government affairs colleagues to support patient access, drive business priorities, and ensure alignment with AstraZeneca’s mission and values.
  
  
**What You’ll Do**

* Develop and maintain a deep understanding of the policy landscape affecting AstraZeneca’s disease products, anticipating emerging trends and regulatory changes.
* Monitor relevant legislation, regulations, and advocacy activities to ensure compliance and proactively address potential risks to the business unit’s interests.
* Lead the design, implementation, and evaluation of public policy and advocacy projects that advance therapeutic access, reimbursement, and innovation for the respective therapy area(s).
* Assess and grow internal policy shaping capabilities, with a particular focus on ensuring alignment between national priorities and our therapy area-specific objectives.
* Ensuring KSA policy strategies are aligned with AstraZeneca’s global policy framework and contribute to broader corporate affairs strategy and must wins.
* Build and sustain relationships with key external stakeholders, including policymakers, senior government officials, patient advocacy groups, medical societies, NGOs, and industry associations.
* Serve as a strategic advisor to cross-functional teams, ensuring alignment between policy priorities and business goals. Act as a subject matter expert for policy-related input into brand plans, regulatory submissions, market access, and lifecycle management.
* Develop impactful policy position statements, white papers, briefings, and other communication materials for internal and external audiences.
* Track and report key policy and advocacy outcomes, supporting continuous improvement in strategy and execution.

**Essential For The Role**

* Bachelor’s degree in Public Health, Pharmacy, Life Sciences, or a related discipline required; Master’s degree in Public Policy, Health Economics, or a relevant field strongly preferred.
* Minimum of 3 years’ experience in healthcare policy, government affairs, or advocacy roles, with proven success in the pharmaceutical, biotech, or healthcare sector.
* Experience influencing public policy at national and/or international levels, including shaping legislative frameworks.
* Strong knowledge of regulatory and reimbursement environments relevant to AstraZeneca’s therapy areas.
* Familiarity with market access, pricing, and reimbursement challenges in innovative therapeutics.
* Exceptional analytical, interpersonal, and communication skills. Demonstrated ability to manage complex projects and lead cross-functional initiatives.
* Strategic thinker, results-oriented, and adept at navigating ambiguous and evolving policy environments.
* Ability to represent AstraZeneca externally with credibility and impact.
* High agility in stakeholder management and consensus-building across diverse groups.

**Why AstraZeneca?**
At AstraZeneca we’re dedicated to being a Great Place to Work. Where you are empowered to push the boundaries of science and unleash your entrepreneurial spirit. There’s no better place to make a difference to medicine, patients, and society. An inclusive culture that champions diversity and collaboration, and always committed to lifelong learning, growth, and development. We’re on an exciting journey to pioneer the future of healthcare.
  
  
**So, what’s next?**

* Are you already imagining yourself joining our team? Good, because we can’t wait to hear from you.
* Are you ready to bring new ideas and fresh thinking to the table? Brilliant! We have one seat available, and we hope it’s yours.

**Where can I find out more?**
Our Social Media, Follow AstraZeneca on LinkedIn
  
  
Follow AstraZeneca on Facebook
  
  
Follow AstraZeneca on Instagram
  
  
**Date Posted**
03-Apr-2026
  
  
**Closing Date**
14-Apr-2026
  
  
AstraZeneca embraces diversity and equality of opportunity. We are committed to building an inclusive and diverse team representing all backgrounds, with as wide a range of perspectives as possible, and harnessing industry-leading skills. We believe that the more inclusive we are, the better our work will be. We welcome and consider applications to join our team from all qualified candidates, regardless of their characteristics. We comply with all applicable laws and regulations on non-discrimination in employment (and recruitment), as well as work authorization and employment eligibility verification requirements.

data.jd_text:
**المسمى الوظيفي: مدير تطوير الأعمال**

**القسم: إدارة الاستثمار**

**التبعية الإدارية: مدير الاستثمار**

**الهدف العام للوظيفة:**

تحديد وتطوير الفرص الاستثمارية من خلال إعداد الدراسات المالية ودراسات الجدوى العقارية، وتحليل أفضل استخدام للأصول العقارية، بما يحقق تعظيم العوائد الاستثمارية وتحقيق النمو المستدام للمحفظة الاستثمارية.

**المهام والمسؤوليات الأساسية:**

**1. إعداد الدراسات المالية ودراسات الجدوى العقارية:**

* إجراء التحليلات المالية والتقييمات الاقتصادية لدراسة جدوى المشاريع العقارية والاستثمارية.
* تحديد أفضل استخدام للأصول العقارية بناءً على التحليل السوقي والتوجهات الاستثمارية.
* تطوير النماذج المالية لمختلف المشاريع الاستثمارية وتقييم العوائد والمخاطر المرتبطة بها.
* إعداد التقارير والتوصيات الاستثمارية وعرضها على مدير الاستثمار للإقرار.

**2. استكشاف وتقييم الفرص الاستثمارية:**

* تحليل السوق العقاري والقطاعات الاستثمارية لتحديد فرص النمو والاستثمار.
* البحث عن فرص استثمارية جديدة تساهم في تعزيز قيمة الأصول وزيادة العائد على الاستثمار.
* دراسة الاتجاهات الاقتصادية والعقارية التي تؤثر على قرارات الاستثمار.

**3. تنسيق وإدارة المشاريع الاستثمارية:**

* العمل مع الإدارات المالية والقانونية لضمان توافق الاستثمارات مع الأنظمة والتشريعات.
* التنسيق مع الجهات الخارجية مثل المستشارين الماليين والمطورين العقاريين لتقييم وتنفيذ المشاريع.
* المساهمة في تطوير استراتيجيات الاستثمار وتحليل المخاطر بالتعاون مع مدير الاستثمار.

**4. إعداد التقارير وتقديم التوصيات:**

* تقديم دراسات الجدوى والتوصيات الاستثمارية لمدير الاستثمار لضمان اتخاذ قرارات مستنيرة.
* إعداد العروض التقديمية والتقارير الدورية حول أداء المشاريع الاستثمارية وفرص التوسع.
* متابعة تنفيذ المشاريع الاستثمارية وضمان تحقيق الأهداف المالية المخطط لها.

**المؤهلات والخبرات المطلوبة:**

* درجة البكالوريوس في إدارة الأعمال، المالية، الاقتصاد، أو تخصص ذو صلة.
* خبرة لا تقل عن سنتين في تطوير الأعمال، الاستثمار العقاري، أو التحليل المالي.
* معرفة قوية بإعداد دراسات الجدوى العقارية والتحليل المالي للمشاريع الاستثمارية.
* إتقان برامج التحليل المالي مثل Excel والنمذجة المالية وأدوات التقييم العقاري.
* مهارات قوية في البحث والتحليل واتخاذ القرارات الاستثمارية.
* الإلمام بالأنظمة والتشريعات العقارية والاستثمارية.

**الجدارات (الكفاءات) المطلوبة:**

**جدارات فنية:**

* التحليل المالي والاستثماري: القدرة على تقييم المشاريع واتخاذ قرارات استثمارية مستندة إلى بيانات.
* إعداد دراسات الجدوى: تحليل وتقييم الفرص الاستثمارية بناءً على أفضل استخدام للأصول.
* التخطيط الاستراتيجي: المساهمة في وضع استراتيجيات استثمارية تدعم أهداف الشركة.

**جدارات إدارية وشخصية:**

* مهارات التفاوض: القدرة على التفاوض مع الشركاء والمستثمرين لتحقيق أفضل الصفقات.
* اتخاذ القرار وحل المشكلات: القدرة على تقديم حلول مبتكرة لدعم تطوير الأعمال والاستثمارات.
* إدارة الوقت والتنظيم: القدرة على العمل على مشاريع متعددة بكفاءة.
* العمل تحت الضغط: القدرة على العمل في بيئة ديناميكية واتخاذ قرارات سريعة ومدروسة.

**العلاقات الوظيفية:**

**الداخلية:**

* التعاون مع الإدارات المالية، القانونية، وإدارة المخاطر لضمان تنفيذ المشاريع بفعالية.
* تقديم التقارير والدراسات لمدير الاستثمار لمراجعتها واعتمادها.

**الخارجية:**

* التواصل مع المستثمرين، البنوك، المطورين العقاريين، والمستشارين الماليين.
* التنسيق مع الجهات التنظيمية لضمان الامتثال للأنظمة العقارية والاستثمارية.

**مؤشرات الأداء الرئيسية (KPIs):**

* عدد الدراسات المالية ودراسات الجدوى التي تم إعدادها والموافقة عليها.
* نسبة المشاريع الاستثمارية الناجحة مقارنة بالفرص المدروسة.
* العائد على الاستثمار (ROI) للأصول التي تم تطويرها بناءً على توصياته.
* جودة ودقة التقارير والتوصيات المقدمة لمدير الاستثمار.

data.title: Enterprise Account Executive
data.raw_snippet:
Creatio is a global vendor of an AI-native platform to automate workflows and CRM with no-code and a maximum degree of freedom. Our platform combines an AI-first architecture, composable no-code tools, and enterprise-grade governance to help organizations build and scale faster.
  
  
We’re proud to
data.jd_text:
Creatio is a global vendor of an AI-native platform to automate workflows and CRM with no-code and a maximum degree of freedom. Our platform combines an AI-first architecture, composable no-code tools, and enterprise-grade governance to help organizations build and scale faster.
  
  
We’re proud to be recognized by top industry analysts as a Leader and Strong Performer in multiple Gartner and Forrester reports.
  
  
In 2025, Creatio was named to Inc.’s Best Workplaces list, recognizing our commitment to employee wellbeing and a strong workplace culture.
  
  
For the role of
**Enterprise Account Executive (KSA)**
, we are seeking an experienced field sales professional to help us scale the number of Enterprises that use the Creatio platform. Candidates must have experience building and developing a territory to high performance within an innovative SaaS technology provider. Successful candidates will help to build a portfolio of business within the top target enterprises in their territory. Successful candidates will need to drive their own activity and build a funnel while being supported by the broader Creatio organization of diverse and executive, product, and technical teams.
  
  
The role is based in
**Riyadh (KSA)**
and will report to the Regional Sales Director MEA (based in Dubai).
  
  
Our targets are ambitious, and we are seeking engaging, collaborative, successful Enterprise Account Executives who have the skills, experience, and track record to make an immediate impact. We’re fast-paced, innovative, and collaborative. We pursue excellence in everything and have a lot of fun along the way.
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Deliver against revenue targets and all key performance metrics.
* Generate new business opportunities on an assigned territory, manage pipeline, opportunities, forecasting, and other items related to a normal outside sales function.
* Manage the end-to-end enterprise sales process and resource to create and execute winning solution sales strategies.
* Establish relationships with VP/C-level buyers (Business and IT).
* Develop and orchestrate sales presentations and product demonstrations.
* Focus on new logo acquisition and manage relationships with the existing accounts to identify opportunities for cross and up-sales.
* Ability to work with all customer functions including executive-level personnel, various customer stakeholders, architecture, operations, design, vendor management, innovation, sourcing, and customer procurement.

**Desired Skills And Experience**

* Minimum 5 years of experience working within enterprise SaaS platform sales to large enterprises
* Proven track record of meeting quarterly and annual targets
* Deep understanding of executive-level Enterprise and/or Global Account sales and methodologies
* Superb written and verbal communications and organizational skills
* 4-year degree required, with technical curiosity and desire to learn
* Experience with CRM/BPM software space is strongly preferred
* Fluency in English and native Arabic

**What You Should Expect From Us**

* The award-winning product (a Leader in Gartner Quadrants) to be proud of.
* Focus on making our clients successful (NPS score – 42%).
* Dedicated leadership with open doors.
* Steady stream of inbound leads (though we expect you to generate your own leads as well).
* Collaborative environment where everybody is happy to help.
* A remote-first hybrid model: while giving plenty of space for concentration and personal working habits, we encourage regular meetings in one of our five hubs worldwide.
* Culture of genuine care, ownership, dedication, and high standards (learn more here).
* A vibrant corporate life: enjoy the opportunity to explore your teammates' cultures in online and offline events, participate in sports competitions, enjoy art master classes, and create your new favorite memories at our parties.
* Creatio offers all team members competitive pay.
* Paid leave options for life-qualifying events, sicknesses, etc.

data.raw_snippet:

QNB Group’s presence through its subsidiaries and associate companies extends to more than 31 countries acr
data.jd_text:
**About QNB**
Established in 1964 as the country’s first Qatari-owned commercial bank, QNB Group has steadily grown to become the largest bank in the Middle East and Africa (MEA) region.
  
  
QNB Group’s presence through its subsidiaries and associate companies extends to more than 31 countries across three continents providing a comprehensive range of advanced products and services. The total number of employees is more than 28,000 serving up to 20 million customers operating through 1,000 locations, with an ATM network of 4,300 machines.
  
  
QNB has maintained its position as one of the highest rated regional banks from leading credit rating agencies including Standard & Poor’s (A), Moody’s (Aa3) and Fitch (A+). The Bank has also been the recipient of many awards from leading international specialised financial publications.
  
  
Based on the Group’s consistent strong financial performance and its expanding international presence, QNB currently ranks as the most valuable bank brand in the Middle East and Africa, according to Brand Finance Magazine.
  
  
QNB Group has an active community support program and sponsors various social, educational and sporting events.
  
  
**Job Purpose Summary**
Support the Strategy PMO (Senior) Managers in managing, monitoring, steering, and tracking projects in order to ensure implementation and successful completion within the defined time, budget, and scope. Support in the preparation of management information reports on all planned and ongoing projects on a continuous and ad hoc basis as directed. Assist in the day-to-day operations of the Group Project Management Office (PMO) for all planned, ongoing, and ad hoc projects in QNB. Assist in rolling out and championing the overall project management methodology, processes, procedures, tools and templates to manage the overall project portfolio within QNB Group Learn and acquire knowledge of comprehensive project management methodology and the associated standards, tools, templates and processes
  
  
**Essential Duties & Responsibilities By Dimensions**

* Shareholder & Financial:
* Assist in reporting against Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) to successfully monitor and track the Group’s portfolio of on-going projects.
* Implements KPI’s and best practices for Associate Strategy PMO.
* Promote cost consciousness and efficiency and enhance productivity, to minimise cost, avoid waste, and optimise benefits for the bank.
* Customer (Internal & External):
* Assist within the Group PMO in all project related matters (e.g., collection of data, liaison with project managers) and reporting of projects with regards Group PMO standards, processes, tools and templates
* Maintain issue/ risk logs, project plans, preparation of reporting, communication within the project team, and project meetings
* Support and manage the smooth planning, running and follow up of Group PMO meetings where necessary and act as an ambassador for the Group PMO in customer facing meetings and communication, promoting the professionalism and best practices of the Group PMO
* Support in the preparation of management information reports on all planned and ongoing projects on a continuous and ad hoc basis as directed
* Support in rolling-out the new project management methodology within QNB Group where necessary - Build and maintain strong and effective relationships with other related departments
* Internal (Processes, Products, Regulatory):
* Assist and support in the maintenance and development of Group PMO documentation, including processes and policies
* Support the day-to-day internal operational Group PMO processes as directed by the Strategy PMO (Senior) manager(s) and VP, Strategy PMO
* Assist in the maintenance of the inventory of projects including all related and necessary documentation and information within the appropriate Group PMO tools
* Regularly update project information through the preparation of project status reports, using a fact driven approach aligned against the original project scope, plan and objectives
* Support in the preparation of management information reports on all planned and ongoing projects on a continuous and ad hoc basis as directed
* Support the (Senior) Strategy PMO manager(s) and VP, Strategy, PMO as requested with additional mandates, and other ad hoc requests as necessary
* Participate and support in the set up and running of relevant project/ team meetings as and when required
* Support the development of training material and the rollout of training sessions to project managers
* Learning & Knowledge:
* Possess a basic understanding of Project Management theory and practice
* Identify areas for professional and self-development - Strive to learn project management methodology

**Education/Experience Requirements**

* Bachelor degree from leading academic institution with focus on business administration, finance or science
* Fresh Qatari graduates, no previous experience required.
* Basic understanding of project methodology and approach, e.g., Prince II and/ or PMP is an advantage, as is any certification
* Proven academic track record or some work experience in a strategy consulting environment, or a similar environment of a well renowned international financial services related institution
* High degree of methodological-conceptual skills - Well-developed numerical, analytical and evaluation skills

Note: you will be required to attach the following:
  
  

* Resume/CV
* Copy of Passport or QID
* Copy of Education Certificate

data.title: Quality Expert
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose:**

The Quality Expert is responsible for developing, implementing, and monitoring the Quality Management System (QMS) in accordance with international standards such as ISO 9001 and Business Continuity standards such as ISO 22301. The role focuses on improving service quality, enhanci
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose:**

The Quality Expert is responsible for developing, implementing, and monitoring the Quality Management System (QMS) in accordance with international standards such as ISO 9001 and Business Continuity standards such as ISO 22301. The role focuses on improving service quality, enhancing operational efficiency, and increasing taxpayer and stakeholder satisfaction.

**Key Responsibilities:**

• Develop and update quality policies, procedures, and frameworks in line with international standards and best practices.

• Oversee the implementation of the Quality Management System across departments and ensure compliance.

• Lead initiatives aimed at improving customer experience and the quality of services provided to taxpayers and stakeholders.

• Plan and conduct internal quality audits and follow up on findings and corrective actions.

• Support the implementation and activation of Business Continuity Management (BCM) and crisis management plans.

• Coordinate with internal and external stakeholders to ensure readiness for quality certifications and accreditation.

• Monitor quality performance indicators and recommend continuous improvement initiatives.

**Qualifications and Experience:**

• Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Quality Management, Public Administration, or a related field.

• Proven experience in implementing ISO standards, particularly ISO 9001 and ISO 22301.

• Experience in government service improvement or public service quality management is preferred.

• Professional certifications in Quality Management or Business Continuity (such as ISO Lead Auditor, CQI, or similar) are an advantage.

• Strong analytical, documentation, and stakeholder coordination skills.

Lead a team of the Project Services staff to provide Cost Management, Budget Control, Planning and scheduling, Contracts, Procurement, Accounts Payable, Document Control, Project Reporting and general administrative services with focus on the successful MM EPIC Project execution on time, within budget and in accordance with the project requirements.

B.Sc. in an Engineering discipline from a recognized University; higher degree
  
  
would be advantageous. Membership of a recognized professional engineering association/institution. PMP certification would be advantageous.

data.raw_snippet:
**Commercial Director**
Doha Golf Club – Doha, Qatar
  
  
**Position Overview**
The Commercial Director is responsible for leading the commercial strategy and revenue growth of Doha Golf Club by maximizing the value of its assets, partnerships, and customerexperience offerings. The role will overse
data.jd_text:
**Commercial Director**
Doha Golf Club – Doha, Qatar
  
  
**Position Overview**
The Commercial Director is responsible for leading the commercial strategy and revenue growth of Doha Golf Club by maximizing the value of its assets, partnerships, and customerexperience offerings. The role will oversee all revenue generating functions including membership, hospitality, events, partnerships, sponsorships, retail, and commercial leasing, while supporting the club’s strategic transformation into a multi-sport, lifestyle, and tourism destination operating year-round.
  
  
The Commercial Director will work closely with the General Manager, Board, and key stakeholders to drive sustainable financial performance, expand the club’s market reach, and position Doha Golf Club as a premier destination for sports, leisure, and community engagement in Qatar.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**
**Commercial Strategy & Revenue Growth**

* Develop and implement the club’s commercial strategy aligned with long-term growth objectives.
* Identify and activate new revenue streams including hospitality, sports facilities, retail, events, tourism partnerships, and land utilization opportunities.
* Drive membership growth, retention, and premium member experiences.
* Optimize pricing strategies, packages, and offerings to maximize revenue across all business units.

**Partnerships, Sponsorships & Business Development**

* Secure and manage strategic partnerships, sponsorships, and commercial colla

borations.
  
  

* Develop relationships with corporates, institutions, hospitality brands, sports or

ganizations, and tourism stakeholders.
  
  

* Structure and negotiate commercial agreements, joint ventures, and long-term leasing opportunities.Events, Hospitality & Destination Programming
* Lead the commercial development of sports tournaments, corporate events, entertainment programming, and lifestyle experiences.
* Position the club as a year-round destination for sports, leisure, and community engagement.
* Develop partnerships with hospitality operators, event organizers, and tourism bodies.

**Asset & Land Commercialization**

* Identify opportunities to activate underutilized land and facilities through commercial developments, partnerships, or events.
* Support projects related to sports academies, wellness, hospitality, and destinat

ion experiences.
  
  

* Ensure optimal return on investment (ROI) from club assets.

Financial Performance & Reporting
  
  

* Manage revenue targets, budgets, and commercial performance metrics.
* Provide regular financial forecasts, performance analysis, and strategic recommendations to senior management and the board.
* Monitor profitability across business units and identify opportunities for optimization.

**Marketing, Branding & Customer Experience**

* Work with marketing teams to strengthen the club’s brand positioning locally and internationally.
* Ensure the club delivers premium customer experiences aligned with its positioning as a flagship golf and lifestyle destination.
* Support initiatives that enhance community engagement and tourism appeal.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Hospitality Management, Sports

Management, or a related field.
  
  
**Experience**

* 10+ years of senior commercial leadership experience, preferably within:
* Hospitality
* Sports and leisure
* Destination developmento Private clubs or golf operations
* Luxury lifestyle sectors
* Proven experience in:
* Revenue growth and commercial strategy
* Sponsorship and partnership development
* Large-scale events and hospitality operations
* Negotiation and contract management

**Key Competencies**

* Strategic thinking and commercial acumen
* Strong leadership and stakeholder management
* Business development and partnership negotiation
* Financial and operational management
* Customer-centric mindset
* Ability to operate in a dynamic, high-profile environment

**Key Success Indicators**

* Growth in commercial revenue streams
* Expansion of strategic partnerships and sponsorships
* Increased membership engagement and visitor footfall
* Successful activation of events, hospitality, and lifestyle offerings
* Enhanced asset utilization and enterprise value

**Reporting Structure**
**Reports to: General Manager**
**Strategic Impact**
The Commercial Director will play a critical role in supporting Doha Golf Club’s transformation into a leading multi sport, lifestyle, and tourism destination, ensuring sustainable growth and long-term value creation.

data.title: HEAD, PROJECT CONTROLS & SERVICES
data.raw_snippet:
**Primary Purpose Of The Job**
Lead and supervise the Project Services team in delivering comprehensive Cost Estimation, Cost Monitoring and Control (including budget management), Planning and Scheduling, Invoice Processing and Monitoring, and Document Control services. Ensure all activities support
data.jd_text:
**Primary Purpose Of The Job**
Lead and supervise the Project Services team in delivering comprehensive Cost Estimation, Cost Monitoring and Control (including budget management), Planning and Scheduling, Invoice Processing and Monitoring, and Document Control services. Ensure all activities support the successful execution of projects on schedule, within budget, and in full alignment with project requirements. Promote and uphold the highest standards of Quality, Health, Safety, and Environment (QHSE) in strict compliance with the QHSE Management System.
  
  
**Required Experience And Skills**

* Minimum of 15 years’ relevant experience in the Oil & Gas industry with an IOC, NOC, EPIC contractor, or major Oil & Gas company, focused on large-scale project execution. At least 5 of those years must be in a Head or Lead Project Control Engineer role within an IOC/NOC or EPIC contractor environment.
* Proficient, hands-on experience with planning and scheduling software including Primavera P6, P6 Analytics, Primavera Risk Analysis, MS Project, MS Office, and SAP.
* Demonstrated expertise in Cost Monitoring, Cost Control, and Reporting processes.
* Proven capability in implementing industry best practices along with company systems, standards, and processes.
* Experience supporting the development of project execution strategies, engineering workflows, project management processes, and detailed project execution plans.
* Strong familiarity with activities related to engineering, procurement, fabrication, installation, commissioning, and start-up of major onshore projects.
* Possesses strong management, communication, conflict resolution, and presentation skills.

**Educational Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in an Engineering discipline from a recognized university; a higher academic qualification is considered an advantage.
* Membership in a recognized professional engineering association or institution is required.
* Project Management Professional (PMP) certification or equivalent is an added advantage.

data.title: EOI - Project Engineering Manager (Offshore)
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
Wood is accepting expressions of interest for a Project Engineering Manager (Offshore) to join our team in Qatar. The Project Engineering Manager (offshore) will be responsible for the execution of the engineering portion of a multi-discipline engineering scope of work on one or
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
Wood is accepting expressions of interest for a Project Engineering Manager (Offshore) to join our team in Qatar. The Project Engineering Manager (offshore) will be responsible for the execution of the engineering portion of a multi-discipline engineering scope of work on one or more projects / work scopes. Has responsibility for coordinating and completing the various engineering, and start-up aspects of a project(s) while meeting HSSE, quality, schedule, and budget performance goals. Has responsibility for the technical excellence of the engineering portion of a project(s) across all disciplines.
  
  
Reflecting The Market Focus For The Office In Both Brownfield And Greenfield Opportunities, Multi-skilled Personnel Are Sought, In Particular Those With Experience In
  
  

* Onshore Oil and Gas
* Offshore Oil and Gas

**Responsibilities**
The Project Engineering Manager (Offshore) leads by example, consistently displaying and enforcing the Company’s values and behaviors, and commitment to the highest standards of safe and ethical behavior, to ensure safe and reliable operations and client satisfaction
  
  
**Driving technical assurance.**

* Continuous promotion of corporate / client specific procedures.
* Assist in incident investigations as required.
* Monitors compliance with standards and processes to assure delivery.
* Roll out and Implementation of learning opportunities from across the business.
* Driving continual focus on process safety through the engineering team
* Driving elimination of technical incidents through robust controls, incident reviews and embedding lessons learned
* Identifies and mitigates areas of risk and improvement opportunities
* Identifies and pursues improvement opportunities
* Managing and leading, supporting and supervising the multidiscipline engineering team

**Plan, organize, direct, control and evaluate the activities and operations of a multidiscipline engineering team**

* Assist in the management of recruitment, selection, transfers, performance management, succession planning and promotion of resources to meet engineering team requirements
* Ensuring appropriately resourced and competent personnel on Project/Contract
* Oversight and control of Engineering Histogram to support workforce planning
* Assist in setting & maintaining standards for the development and retention of motivated and competent people

**Management of key stakeholders in the execution and delivery of contracted activities.**

* Responsible for the engineering content of project execution plans for assigned contracts/projects
* Responsible for the direction and management of the engineering and associated project activities of the business grouping/Project
* Manage and direct resources efficiently and effectively.
* Consult and negotiate with clients to prepare specifications, explain proposals and present engineering reports and findings
* Assign, co-ordinate and review the technical work of the department or project teams
* Focuses on managerial concerns of the project such as cost, completion date, and resource allocation. Provides expert resolution of issues and monitors integration of work.
* Reviews technical concepts of major projects.
* Personally participates in solving difficult technical problems.
* Resolves conflicts that are complex and manages divergent audience
* Responsible for facilitating agreement between conflicting parties
* Resolves issues which are non-recurring and occasionally novel
* Carries responsibility for resolution of major problems for the engineering segment
* Assist in identifying and requesting functional support to projects / contracts as required
* Accountable for the efficient planning and management of engineering resouces, identifying ad pursuing opportunities for margin improvement, including HVEC utilisation.

**Undertaking the role of process owner**

* Develop and implement policies, standards and procedures for the engineering and technical work performed in the department
* Directs the application of existing principles and the development of new polices and strategies aligned with OU, BU and Corporate objectives
* Conduit for regulatory framework, legislation changes, initiatives and industry technology developments.

**Qualifications**

* Minimum 15 years experience in discipline engineering
* Minimum 5 years experience with Wood or legacy Wood companies
* Experience in EPCM contract will be advantageous
* Balance of techical and management experience at relevant level and position.
* Typically requires several years of supervisory experience with an understanding of human relations, training, performance evaluation and health and safety
* Broad and extensive knowledge of engineering theories and techniques and a high level of skill in application of this knowledge in the management of the engineering function
* Capable of representing business and client to business associates in a professional manner.
* Excellent interpersonal and communication skills, capable of influencing people at all levels of the organization.
* Skilled in forecast planning for people resources.
* Skilled in recruitment and selection, employee communication and management including performance management.
* Able to implement and embed standards and processes to effect delivery of engineering excellence.
* Good knowledge of regulatory framework and associated legislation.
* Current knowledge of industry and technology development within area of expertise.
* Expert in Engineering excellence.
* Able to carry out audit and incident investigations Good Project management skills.
* Skilled in mediation and dispute resolution
* Financial and commercial awareness.

**About Us**
Wood is a global leader in consulting and engineering, helping to unlock solutions to critical challenges in energy and materials markets. We provide consulting, projects and operations solutions in 45 countries, employing around 25,000 people. www.woodplc.com
  
  
**Diversity Statement**
We are an equal opportunity employer that recognises the value of a diverse workforce. All suitably qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment on the basis of objective criteria and without regard to the following (which is a non-exhaustive list): race, colour, age, religion, gender, national origin, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, protected veteran status, or other characteristics in accordance with the relevant governing laws.

**Job Title :- IT Project Manager**

**Contract Duration :- 1 year**

**Location:-Qatar**

**Project Management Services**

* The project management services will be performed under the supervision of the DBS Programs Lead. The estimated duration is 18 Months. These services include (but are not limited to) the following:
* Project planning, scheduling, and budgeting
* Risk, issue, and change management
* Stakeholder engagement and communication
* Quality assurance and compliance
* Project reporting and documentation  Vendor management
* Use of the PMO standard tools and templates (ServiceNow PPM, SharePoint, etc.)

**Delivery Methodology**

Projects will primarily use PMI framework for project management and the Waterfall methodology. Agile or hybrid approaches may be adopted based on approved governance processes.

**Team Integration**

* CONTRACTOR resources must integrate seamlessly with COMPANY PMO, SMEs, and stakeholders. On-site presence is mandatory unless otherwise approved. Collaboration tools (Microsoft Teams, SharePoint) will be used, with regular meetings scheduled.
* Resources from the CONTRACTOR need to integrate seamlessly with the COMPANY PMO team to collaborate efficiently with the PMO team, SMEs, stakeholders, and other vendors.
* On-site presence of all the CONTRACTOR required resources is mandatory to better facilitate communications with the project teams and different stakeholders.

**Senior Project Lead Qualifications**

* The Project Manager must have a combination of skills to ensure the successful delivery of the project’s scope within the established budget and schedule.
* The project manager requires exceptional organization skills to manage resources according to the implementation plan, with proven problem solving and conflict resolution skills.

* **In addition to general management tasks, they will be responsible for the following activities:**
  Prepare budgets, schedules, scope, risk, and resource plans
* Engage stakeholders and maintain effective communication
* Align deliverables with business goals and IT strategies
* Assess and escalate risks promptly for mitigation
* Lead multi-disciplinary teams and resolve conflicts
* Maintain risk and issue registers
* Ensure timely status reporting and documentation
* Facilitate change requests and communicate impacts
* Coordinate development of training materials and user documentation
* Conduct post-project evaluations

**Senior Project Lead Key Qualifications Mandatory:**

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in a related field
* Minimum 10 years of experience in project/program management
* Experience with Waterfall and Agile project delivery methodologies
* PMP and/or PRINCE2 certification
* Strong leadership, communication, and stakeholder engagement skills
* Proficiency in Word/Excel/PowerPoint for analysis and reporting
* Ability to manage multiple projects concurrently
* Demonstrated expertise in core PM processes including detailed planning, progress reporting, risk and issue management, and change control
* Proven experience managing vendors and third-party suppliers to deliver project scope
* Ability to perform business analysis tasks such as requirements gathering and documentation, and support change management activities including impact assessments and stakeholder readiness

**Preferred:**

Experience in oil & gas and/or digital transformation projects

Proficiency in ServiceNow PPM module for project tracking and reporting

Exposure to delivering projects across multiple solution types including infrastructure, applications, and data initiatives

**Nice-to-Have:**

Advanced certifications in Agile or portfolio management

Programme and/or Project Management Office experience

**Interested candidates should send their CV along with the following details:**

**Expected salary**

**Visa/Work Permit status**

**Notice Period**

**Current Location**

data.jd_text:
General Information
  
  
**Ref #**
227909
  
  
**Location:**
Qatar-Doha
  
  
**Job family:**
Corporate & Commercial
  
  
**Closing Date:**
2026-04-19
  
  
**Description**
****About the Role****
An exciting opportunity to join the Qatar Airways IT - PMO team as Program Manager. This role within IT PMO is responsible for driving IT sourcing and vendor governance initiatives across IT. This role ensures effective collaboration with internal stakeholders and external vendors to deliver IT products and services that are aligned with organizational standards, compliance requirements, and strategic objectives. In addition, it incorporates vendor performance management by establishing frameworks to monitor and evaluate vendor performance metrics and Service Level Agreements (SLAs), driving consistent quality and accountability throughout service delivery.
  
  
**Your Duties Would Include**

* Lead sourcing initiatives for IT in partnership with IT Lines of Business (LOBs), QR Procurement, and Legal teams.
* Oversee the end-to-end RFX process from requirements gathering to acquisition of tools, products, or services.
* Lead RFP, RFQ, and Tender processes, ensuring coordination of technical evaluations with Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) and alignment with QR Procurement policies, while managing the development and review of functional, technical, and non-functional requirements (NFRs).
* Establish Vendor Performance Management framework and enable the monitoring of vendor performance metrics and Service Level Agreements (SLAs).
* Vendor Management aspects such as Performance Management, Pricing, Governance, Change Management, and Information Security/Data Protection.
* Drive accountability and compliance to maintain consistent quality and service delivery.
* Manage and optimize operations of Offshore Development Centers (ODCs) and secondment partners and ensure timely availability of skilled IT consultants for project needs while adhering to QRG policies
* Collaborate with QR Procurement and Contracts Department to evaluate current procurement processes and templates to identify areas for streamlining and adapting processes for IT-specific products and services.
* Lead key IT projects and programs assigned by the line manager.
* Ensure alignment with IT PMO governance standards and organizational objectives.

****Be part of an extraordinary story****
Your skills. Your imagination. Your ambition. Here, there are no boundaries to your potential and the impact you can make. You’ll find infinite opportunities to grow and work on the biggest, most rewarding challenges that will build your skills and experience. You have the chance to be a part of our future, and build the life you want while being part of an international community.
  
  
Our best is here and still to come. To us, impossible is only a challenge. Join us as we dare to achieve what’s never been done before.
  
  
Together, everything is possible.
  
  
Qualification
  
  
We Are Looking For a Passionate And Experienced Professional To Join Our IT - PMO Team. The Ideal Candidate Should Possess The Following
  
  

* Bachelor’s Degree or Equivalent with Minimum 15 years of job-related experience
* Minimum 5 years of experience in procurement and vendor management for an IT function.
* Experience in leading IT projects, of which at least 3 years should be in successful delivery of large-scale Programs.
* Proven experience in managing IT partners & related contracts.
* PMP certification or demonstrable Project & Program Management experience.
* Managerial skills - Ability to delegate work, set clear direction and manage workflow. Strong mentoring and coaching skills. Ability to train and develop subordinate's skills. Ability to foster teamwork among team members.
* Airline Industry experience though not essential would be an added advantage.

**About Qatar Airways Group**
Our story started with four aircraft. Today, we deliver excellence across 12 different businesses coming together as one. We’ve grown fast, broken records and set trends that others follow. We don’t slow down by the fear of failure. Instead, we dare to achieve what’s never been done before. So, whether you’re creating a unique experience for our customers or innovating behind the scenes, every person contributes to our proud story. A story of spectacular growth and determination. Now is the time to bring your best ideas and passion to a place where your ambition will know no boundaries, and be part of a truly global community.
  
  
**How To Apply**
If you are interested to submit your application and feel you are a good fit for this role, please complete our application form and upload your CV for our review and consideration.
  
  
https://aa115.taleo.net/careersection/QA\_External\_CS/jobapply.ftl?lang=en&job=227909

data.jd_text:
* Project Planning & Execution

+ Develop project execution plans, schedules, budgets, and resource requirements.
+ Manage end-to-end execution of substation projects (EHV/HV substations, 220 kV & above).
+ Ensure compliance with Oil & Gas facility regulations, HSE requirements, and quality standards.
+ Proficiency in Primavera P6 / MS Project for project scheduling.
+ Leadership & Coordination

- Lead multidisciplinary project teams including engineers, supervisors, subcontractors, and vendors.
- Liaise with client representatives, consultants, and internal stakeholders for approvals and progress updates.
- Supervise installation, testing, and commissioning of substation equipment (GIS/AIS, transformers, protection & control systems, switchgear, SCADA, etc.).
- Technical & Contractual Management

* Review and validate electrical designs, drawings, and technical specifications.
* Ensure compliance with IEC, IEEE, ANSI, and Oil & Gas industry standards.
* Administer contract terms, manage claims, variations, and resolve disputes with stakeholders.
* Financial & Resource Control

+ Monitor project costs, cash flow, invoicing, and profitability.
+ Optimize resource utilization (manpower, materials, equipment).
+ Coordinate procurement of long-lead items and critical equipment.
+ HSE & Quality Assurance

- Implement stringent HSE management systems in compliance with Oil & Gas safety standards.
- Ensure QA/QC procedures are followed at all stages of project execution.
- Conduct risk assessments, safety audits, and quality inspections.
- Reporting & Documentation

* Prepare project progress reports, dashboards, and presentations for senior management and clients.
* Maintain proper documentation of engineering, construction, and commissioning records.
* Ensure project close-out, handover, and warranty obligations are fulfilled.

data.title: Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Summary**
We are seeking a results-driven Project Manager to lead, plan, and monitor projects from initiation through completion. The role requires strong expertise in project planning, procurement processes, performance monitoring, and reporting. The ideal candidate will ensure projects are d
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary**
We are seeking a results-driven Project Manager to lead, plan, and monitor projects from initiation through completion. The role requires strong expertise in project planning, procurement processes, performance monitoring, and reporting. The ideal candidate will ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, and aligned with organizational objectives while maintaining high standards of quality and compliance.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**

* Develop and monitor procurement plans and prepare detailed project schedules, including timelines, milestones, and deliverables.
* Provide senior management with regular updates on project progress, including weekly and monthly reports.
* Prepare quarterly administrative reports covering procurement plans and the status of all ongoing projects.
* Establish key performance indicators (KPIs), assess project performance, identify deviations, and recommend corrective actions and improvement initiatives.
* Prepare data-driven reports, including tables, charts, and dashboards, to clearly communicate project progress and performance.
* Ensure all projects are initiated as planned or ahead of schedule where possible.
* Monitor team performance and ensure all project tasks are executed efficiently and effectively.
* Support market research activities, including data collection, benchmarking, and comparative analysis.
* Develop and standardize processes, procedures, and templates using smart tools, and present them for management approval and team adoption.
* Track project timelines and proactively address risks, delays, and bottlenecks.
* Lead knowledge transfer initiatives and provide training to team members on project management methodologies and best practices.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Economics, Finance, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.
* Professional certification in Project Management (PMP or PRINCE2) is required.
* Additional certifications such as Certified Professional in Procurement, CPE, or AICP are considered an advantage.

**Experience**

* 5–7 years of proven experience in project management, including end-to-end project delivery.
* Strong experience in preparing professional reports and presentations.
* Solid understanding of government financial regulations, particularly tendering and procurement laws and executive regulations.
* Experience in government procurement cycles, financial analysis, feasibility studies, market studies, and budgeting.
* Proven ability to manage multiple tasks under pressure and meet tight deadlines.
* Prior experience in government or semi-government consulting environments is an advantage.

**Core Competencies & Skills**

* Strong project management, planning, and scheduling capabilities.
* Expertise in setting, monitoring, and evaluating operational performance indicators (KPIs).
* Advanced analytical and financial modeling skills.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills; Arabic is mandatory, with strong proficiency in English.
* High-level report writing and documentation skills, with the ability to clearly present project status, challenges, and recommendations.
* Strong presentation skills, particularly in Arabic, with the ability to communicate complex concepts effectively.
* Ability to prioritize tasks, manage multiple projects, and meet deadlines.
* Strong training and knowledge transfer capabilities.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, financial modeling, and professional presentation tools.

**Behavioral Competencies & Work Conditions**

* Demonstrates professionalism, integrity, and strict confidentiality.
* Shows strong commitment, discipline, and accountability in all responsibilities.
* Works collaboratively and provides objective guidance to improve team performance and workflow.
* Complies with organizational policies, procedures, and management directives.
* Commits to official working hours and maintains a high standard of workplace conduct.
* Develops and implements on-the-job training plans to ensure effective knowledge transfer and team readiness.
* Fluent in Arabic (spoken and written) with strong proficiency in English.
* Possesses a good understanding of technical project terminology, including systems, networks, and engineering-related concepts, particularly in construction environments.

data.title: EOI - Project Control Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
Wood is accepting expressions of interest for a Project Control Manager to join our team in Qatar.
  
  
Project Control Manager leads the cost; planning, scheduling and risk assessment support to assignments / project teams and clients, typically on projects of moderate size and
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
Wood is accepting expressions of interest for a Project Control Manager to join our team in Qatar.
  
  
Project Control Manager leads the cost; planning, scheduling and risk assessment support to assignments / project teams and clients, typically on projects of moderate size and complexity. Oversees the set up and running of all required project controls systems, tools and interfaces to allow successful management and reporting of the project costs, schedule and risks on projects and specific assignments. Responsible for managing a team of project control resources in support of project delivery excellence
  
  
The role interfaces with a number of key stakeholders across the project and wider business. Primary focal point for the Project Manager, Client or Project Team for all matters relating to project costs, schedules and risk; and resources requirements. Develops and implements the project control execution plan for projects of moderate size and complexity
  
  
**Responsibilities**

* Act as the focal point with the client and any contractor Project Controllers as appropriate to ensure costs and progress are reported accurately, ensure alignment with the project reporting requirements and ensure timely and accurate cost and progress reporting
* Monitor overall project / assignment progress status, achievement and non-achievement of major milestones and analyse and forecast performance in relation to plan
* Identification, monitoring and reporting against the project critical path providing early warning to the Project Manager of any potential slippages
* Identifies and establishes the communications interfaces essential for the delivery of cost, planning, scheduling and risk deliverables and services
* Report project status and KPI to management
* Develops the project Work Breakdown Structure?
* Manage the implementation of the cost and planning control structures in alignment with the project Work Breakdown Structure
* Manage and oversee the project work approval process in terms of accurate cost code allocation and initial budget set-up and approvals
* Timely control and forecasting of budgets and ensure that the impact of all change requests are properly assessed and included in the budget and schedules if applicable
* Accountable for accuracy and timeliness of S-curves and histograms produced by team
* Accountable for delivery and ongoing maitenance of the projects fully resourced, logic linked Gantt Charts within preferred planning software to the agreed project and programme requirements
* Accountable for providing analysis of current and future resource needs for the project and programme to the Project Manager
* Manages and oversees the recovery process followig identified slippages or significant float erosion
* Responsible for timely and accurate development and issuing of project change orders / variations in accordance with contract / assignment change notifications
* Promote the project change management system and facilitate assurance activities to ensure the process is adhered to
* Serve as Chair for ongoing internal team and client team Project Controls meetings (Cost, Schedule and Progress).
* Oversee the preparation of proposal schedules and CTR packs
* Lead cost and schedule risk analysis workshops / sessions both internally and with clients
* Ensure risk is managed and monitored at project level in line with local standards and processes
* Ensure Project Controls processes and procedures are accurate, that the project controls team are familiar with them and comply with their requirements
* Responsible for ensuring that projects are managed effectively to ensure delivery in a manner which meets quality, time and budget specifications
* Accountable for the accuracy and completeness of all cost, planning and risk deliverables prior to issue to internal or external customer
* Responsible for ensuring all project specific control tools and systems are set up and functioning adequately
* Manage the workload, performance and development of the project controls team. Provides constructive feedback and coaching.
* Responsible for ensuring project control staff are competent to carry out assigned work
* Reviews contractual obligations and ensures that cost control activities are performed in accordance with the contractual agreements and the Client’s requirements
* Ensuring that lessons learned are captured and implemented in support of continuous improvement
* Motivates project control team to meet project aims; promotes communication and teamwork within group and project.

**Qualifications**

* B.S. or equivalent degree
* Minimum of 15+ years relevant experience in major Brownfield oil & gas projects, including at least five (5) years in similar position
* Pre-FEED, FEED experience
* Typically requires a minimum of eight (8) years of relevant industry experience, with at least six (6) years in project control positions.
* Excellent client service focus
* Exceptional organisational skills and able to multi-task"
* Working knowledge of risk management processes and techniques and experience in facilitating Risk workshops with project / assignment teams
* Advanced Working Knowledge of relevant software tools such as Microsoft Project and Primavera

**About Us**
Wood is a global leader in consulting and engineering, helping to unlock solutions to critical challenges in energy and materials markets. We provide consulting, projects and operations solutions in 45 countries, employing around 25,000 people. www.woodplc.com
  
  
**Diversity Statement**
We are an equal opportunity employer that recognises the value of a diverse workforce. All suitably qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment on the basis of objective criteria and without regard to the following (which is a non-exhaustive list): race, colour, age, religion, gender, national origin, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, protected veteran status, or other characteristics in accordance with the relevant governing laws.

data.raw_snippet:

Worley is a global professional services company of energy, chemicals and resources experts. We partner with customers to deliver projects and create value over the life of their assets. We’re bridging two worlds, moving towards more sustainable energy
data.jd_text:
**Building on our past. Ready for the future**
Worley is a global professional services company of energy, chemicals and resources experts. We partner with customers to deliver projects and create value over the life of their assets. We’re bridging two worlds, moving towards more sustainable energy sources, while helping to provide the energy, chemicals and resources needed now.
  
  
****Major Accountabilities Of Position****

* To be responsible for establishing clear expectations of Business and Project Risk Management within LGCA region in terms of process, procedure, deliverables etc. and support from an implementation perspective.
* To be responsible for ensuring consistent Project Team application of the development, maintenance and monitoring of all Project Risk Management activities and associated documents across relevant scope(s).
* To be responsible for establishing, monitoring and maintenance of Business Risk Management activities with LGCA.
* Responsible Line Manager for Project Risk Management Professionals in region.

****Key Aims And Objectives:****

* Ensure LGCA Regional projects pro-actively establish and maintain Risk Management activities on projects as necessary.
* Drive development and delivery of pre-award project risk management requirements for project proposals.
* Delivery of a range of Risk Management services to Project teams post award, facilitating the identification and analysis of risks on projects at all stages as required, interpreting risk outputs, and communicating to relevant stakeholders as appropriate and business requires.
* Supporting Risk Management professionals within LGCA region and development of strategy for long term learning and career development.
* Support in conducting Business Risk for all the locations in LGCA region and maintaining of Business Risk register.

****Prime Responsibilities And Duties:****

* To be fully conversant with the application and use of Worley Risk Management suite of tools and chosen software applications.
* To prepare, update and maintain project Risk Management activities, throughout the project lifecycle and across the Risk

**Management Process:**

* To ensure the timely issue of accurate, updated Risk Management Plans and associated documents at the agreed intervals.
* To provide guidance to Project personnel in defining Risk Management objectives based on project objectives and support application of the risk process.
* To utilise several risk identification techniques in order to facilitate risk identification sessions.
* To develop and implement risk assessment criteria as part of a project risk register.
* To assist Risk Owners with the selection of appropriate risk response strategies and development of action plans to address identified risks.
* To assist project or functional personnel in the familiarisation and consistent application of Risk Management software tools and associated process.
* To facilitate Risk workshops and develop project Risk Registers which act as repositories for all risk related information.
* To conduct Cost / Schedule Risk Analysis Workshop sessions, facilitating workshops and facilitating workshops building bespoke models and interpreting associated outputs for communication / review.

**Major Accountabilities Of Position**

* To educate, support and encourage managers and business units in the use of quantitative and decision analysis on proposals / projects where applicable.
* Initiate and scope out regional RM business development opportunities and manage execution with input from regional and global risk teams.
* To promote good working relations within the internal and external teams.
* Provide guidance, support, and leadership to Project disciplines in project risk management activities.
* Monthly WPR attendance and input where required.
* Present and provide training on a range of RM topics to internal / external audiences.
* Monthly Regional level RM performance dashboard with critical analysis.

****Allied Occasional Duties:****

* To present to external audiences on a range of Risk Management related topics
* Ongoing presentation or support to wider network of practicing Risk Management professionals.
* Engage with wider Business and Project Delivery function in corporate initiatives / support Global Project Controls in Risk Management activities.

****Essential Qualifications/training:****

* Higher National Diploma / Advanced Diploma etc. (in relevant discipline).
* Recognised Risk Management qualification (e.g., IRM International Certificate in Risk Management or equivalent in experience).

****Desirable Qualifications/training:****

* BA or BSc degree (min. 2:1) in Risk Management, alternative subjects considered can include: Project Management, Engineering, other analytical disciplines.

****Essential Experience:****

* Previous Project Risk Management experience across various projects (minimum circa 15+ years).
* Specialist knowledge in Risk Management software (i.e., MCS software) and experience with quantitative cost & schedule risk analysis.
* Demonstrable involvement / history in the relevant project industry and / or cross-over experience from a comparable technical industry.
* Experience in analytical quantitative risk methods.

+ Montecarlo simulations / 3-point analysis
+ Pertmaster, PRA

****Desirable Experience:****

* Extensive working Risk related knowledge of the Worley industry / business line.
* Knowledge of various industry Risk Management software / applications available.
* Experience in internal project delivery processes and procedures (e.g., Worley Project Delivery suite).

****Personal Qualities, Aptitudes And Skills****

* Ability to work as lead member of a team.
* Good communicator.
* Demonstrate confident presentation skills and embrace opportunities to educate others on Risk related topics.
* Confident and appropriately assertive to lead group workshops on a range of Risk Management activities.
* General risk awareness with a demonstrable interest in wider Risk Management topics / issues.
* Willingness to learn and continually improve across all business sectors.

**Competencies - Generic**

* Sound computer skills (standard Microsoft Office applications).
* Ability to timely deliver to both given and self-imposed deadlines and delegate tasks to junior personnel.
* Ability to communicate effectively with people at all levels within the organisation.
* Demonstrates team leadership skills and takes a lead in training and ongoing development of junior team members.
* Demonstrates good safety awareness and sets an appropriate example to others.

**Competencies - Technical**

* Excellent facilitation skills and ability to guide the conversation.
* Capable of communicating with project teams, third parties & clients to meet internal and client requirements across multiple projects with several different clients concurrently.
* Capable of identifying and providing qualitative inputs to Risk Management related process initiatives.
* Ability to build constructive relationships, allowing the discussion and resolution of any risk related issues.
* Highly experienced in qualitative measuring risks, facilitating analysis, plus evaluation of specific threats and opportunities.
* Strong competency in modelling quantitative (cost & schedule) risks and evaluation of analysis output using industry risk analysis tools.
* Able to provide constructive challenge to project teams to ensure all risks are addressed appropriately and provide support to junior team members with this.

**Moving forward together**
We’re committed to building a diverse, inclusive and respectful workplace where everyone feels they belong, can bring themselves, and are heard. We provide equal employment opportunities to all qualified applicants and employees without regard to age, race, creed, color, religion, sex, national origin, ancestry, disability status, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, citizenship status or any other basis as protected by law.
  
  
We want our people to be energized and empowered to drive sustainable impact. So, our focus is on a values-inspired culture that unlocks brilliance through belonging, connection and innovation.
  
  
And we're not just talking about it; we're doing it. We're reskilling our people, leveraging transferable skills, and supporting the transition of our workforce to become experts in today's low carbon energy infrastructure and technology.
  
  
Whatever your ambition, there’s a path for you here. And there’s no barrier to your potential career success. Join us to broaden your horizons, explore diverse opportunities, and be part of delivering sustainable change.

data.jd_text:
**Date Posted:**
2026-03-12
  
  
**Country:**
Qatar
  
  
**Location:**
QA-DA-DOHA-004 ~ Airport Rd ~ AL JAIDAH SQ BLDG, 1st Flr (External Site)
  
  
**Position Role Type:**
Unspecified
  
  
**Senior Manager, FlightSense Program Management (Hybrid) based in Doha**
The Senior Manager, FlightSense™ Program Management owns the execution of the FlightSense™ agreement with the customer and is the main focal both internally and externally. This includes building and maintaining strong relationships with the customer and ensuring Collins Aerospace delivers to the contractual, financial, and operational performance of the program.
  
  
FlightSense™ is a premier repair services business aerospace flight hour programs at Collins focused on supporting our customers with best-in-class performance and a superior customer experience.
  
  
**Primary Responsibilities:**

* Central single point of contact for the contract both externally to the customer and internally with aftermarket team (Repair, Technical, Finance, Management).
* Track overall Customer Support Level (CSL) to the customer for the FlightSense contract, in addition to all Collins commercial repairs.
* May include connecting with specific sites to ensure recovery plans executed and are realistic in terms of recovery to CSL requirements.
* Own the overall Estimate At Completion (EAC) financial performance for adherence to original business plan.
* Review monthly/quarterly cost data, reliability trends, effects of improvement activities and customer fleet/flying projections to update future forecast model predictions in EAC financial model.
* Lead any performance penalty or contractual alignment discussions, internally as well as with the customer.
* Support customer technical review discussions, with guidance from the Collins product owners, to agree on service bulletin incorporation, chargeable quote disputes and other items.

**Basic Qualifications:**

* Typically requires a University Degree or equivalent experience and minimum 10 years prior relevant experience or an Advanced Degree in a related field and minimum 7 years of experience or in absence of a degree, 14 years of relevant experience.

**Preferred Qualifications:**

* Experience leveraging strong financial acumen and / or experience with financial modeling.
* Demonstrated track record of conflict / issue resolution on difficult problems.
* Experience with commercial airframe components

This position may involve access to export-controlled information and hardware where an export license would be required for compliance with applicable laws and regulations. Employment will be subject to satisfactory security checks, export license approval, and if required, completion of a non-disclosure agreement.
  
  
Collins Aerospace, an RTX Company, is a leader in technologically advanced and intelligent solutions for the global aerospace and defense industry. Collins Aerospace has the capabilities, comprehensive portfolio and expertise to solve customers’ toughest challenges and to meet the demands of a rapidly evolving global market.
  
  
We make modern flight possible for millions of travelers and our military every second. Our major product lines are on-board virtually every aircraft flying. Be it keeping passengers safe with our emergency power generation systems or creating a positive in-flight experience through reliable cabin pressure controls and quieter engines, Power & Controls focuses on delivering a best-in-class experience to our customers. We hire the top people in the industry. Their ideas drive our performance, and their integrity keeps our customers happy. Join us as we take flight!
  
  
**WE ARE REDEFINING AEROSPACE.**
Please consider the following role type definitions as you apply for this role.
  
  
**Onsite:**
Employees who are working in Onsite roles will work primarily onsite. This includes all production and maintenance employees, as they are essential to the development of our products.
  
  
**Hybrid:**
Employees who are working in Hybrid roles will work regularly both onsite and offsite. Ratio of time working onsite will be determined in partnership with your leader.
  
  
**Remote:**
Employees who are working in Remote roles will work primarily offsite (from home). An employee may be expected to travel to the site location as needed.
  
  
*Regardless of your role type, collaboration and innovation are critical to our business and all employees will have access to digital tools so they can work with colleagues around the world – and access to Collins sites when their work requires in-person meetings.*
Nothing matters more to Collins Aerospace than our strong ethical and safety commitments.
  
  
At Collins, the paths we pave together lead to limitless possibility. And the bonds we form – with our customers and with each other -- propel us all higher, again and again.
  
  
Apply now and be part of the team that’s redefining aerospace, every day.
  
  
*RTX adheres to the principles of equal employment. All qualified applications will be given careful consideration without regard to ethnicity, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation or identity, national origin, age, disability, protected veteran status or any other characteristic protected by law.*

Click on this link to read the Policy and Terms

data.raw_snippet:
