776664

data.title: Head of Distribution
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose**

Head of Distribution is responsible for leading and managing the overall Retail Banking Distribution Network, including branches, sales channels, and distribution support functions. The role drives the strategic direction, performance, and profitability of retail distribution channe
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose**

Head of Distribution is responsible for leading and managing the overall Retail Banking Distribution Network, including branches, sales channels, and distribution support functions. The role drives the strategic direction, performance, and profitability of retail distribution channels, ensuring effective customer acquisition, service delivery, and market expansion.

The position ensures alignment between Retail Banking strategy, branch performance, and channel optimization while maintaining high standards of governance, operational efficiency, and customer experience across the distribution network.

**Key responsibilities of the role include:**

* Development and execution of the Retail Distribution Strategy aligned with Retail Banking objectives.
* Driving sales performance, customer acquisition, and revenue growth across the branch network.
* Optimizing branch network footprint and multi-channel distribution.
* Strengthening customer experience and operational efficiency.
* Ensuring strong governance, compliance, and Sharia adherence across all distribution activities.

**Main Tasks & Accountabilities**

**Distribution Strategy & Business Growth**

* sustainable growth within Retail Banking.
* Translate strategic objectives into clear distribution frameworks and execution plans across the branch network and sales channels.
* Ensure alignment between distribution strategy, market opportunities, and overall Retail Banking objectives.
* Continuously review and refine distribution approaches to ensure the organization remains competitive and responsive to market dynamics.

**Channel Optimization & Network Management**

* Lead and oversee the activities of Retail Banking sales and distribution channels.
* Ensure optimal utilization and coordination of distribution channels to support customer acquisition and service delivery.
* Develop and execute the branch network strategy, including expansion, relocation, consolidation, or optimization of branches where required.
* Monitor the overall effectiveness of the distribution network and identify opportunities to improve reach and efficiency.

**Operational Effectiveness & Customer Experience**

* Coordinate initiatives aimed at enhancing operational efficiency across distribution channels.
* Promote a culture focused on service quality and continuous improvement in customer experience.
* Support the implementation of initiatives that enhance the effectiveness and responsiveness of the distribution network.

**Stakeholder Engagement & Governance**

* Strengthen relationships with internal stakeholders and external partners to support distribution effectiveness.
* Ensure adherence to organizational policies, regulatory requirements, and governance standards across distribution activities.
* Facilitate coordination between distribution teams and other business units to ensure alignment between strategy and execution.

**Leadership Responsibilities**

* Inspire and lead distribution teams towards high levels of performance and accountability.
* Build and sustain a high-performing distribution organization through effective leadership and talent development.
* Foster strong working relationships across the organization to support business objectives and collaboration.
* Ensure that operational activities within the distribution network remain aligned with strategic priorities.

**Education Level**

* Minimum Bachelor’s Degree in Banking, Finance, Business Administration or related field

**Professional Qualifications**

* Professional banking or leadership certifications (preferred)

**Work Experience**

* Minimum 12–15 years of banking experience, with at least 8 years in Retail Banking distribution or sales leadership roles.
* Proven experience in managing branch networks and multi-channel distribution.
* Strong track record in retail sales growth, customer acquisition, and deposit mobilization.
* Experience in strategic planning, distribution management, and business performance optimization.
* Sound knowledge of Oman retail banking market and competitive landscape.
* Knowledge of Islamic Banking and Sharia principles.
* Good understanding of CBO regulations and Oman banking environment.

**General Competencies**

* Strong leadership and team management capabilities.
* Excellent strategic planning and execution skills.
* Strong communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills.
* Customer-centric and performance-driven mindset.
* High standards of integrity, governance, and compliance.

data.title: Director - Wholesale Banking
data.raw_snippet:
**JOB PURPOSE:**

To originate, manage, and grow a high‑quality corporate banking portfolio by developing deep client relationships, delivering strategic financial solutions, and coordinating with product partners across FAB. The role ensures strong risk management, portfolio quality, revenue growth
data.jd_text:
**JOB PURPOSE:**

To originate, manage, and grow a high‑quality corporate banking portfolio by developing deep client relationships, delivering strategic financial solutions, and coordinating with product partners across FAB. The role ensures strong risk management, portfolio quality, revenue growth, and adherence to CBO regulatory frameworks i.e., BM 1108, BM 1170 and all other regulatory circulars issued by CBO. The Director acts as a primary client advisor and portfolio owner, responsible for end‑to‑end execution on credit, onboarding, cross‑sell, and service delivery.

**KEY ACCOUNTABILITIES:**

* **Client Relationship & Portfolio Management:**
* Lead coverage for corporates and Business Banking clients, in country and across FAB network.
* Develop Account Plans, grow wallet share, enhance cross‑sell.
* Ensure portfolio monitoring, early‑warning identification, compliance with FAB’s credit risk appetite.
* Maintain credit quality and ensure all reviews, renewals, and covenants are completed.
* Examine & resolve credit, market and operational risk aspects of the transactions in collaboration with products and enablement units.
* Prepare Key Account Plans for clients.

* **Origination & Deal Execution:**
* Identify, structure, and originate opportunities aligned with client needs.
* Prepare CIMs, term sheets, pricing proposals.
* Lead end‑to‑end execution with Credit, Risk, Legal, Ops, and product partners.
* Manage P&L responsibility of the assigned portfolio, achieving targets within defined budget levels.

* **Risk Management & Compliance:**
* Maintain strong credit discipline and covenant monitoring.
* Ensure AML/KYC compliance, periodic reviews, and regulatory adherence.
* Support internal/external audits, CBO examination, ORM, BCP, and internal compliance.
* Manage and ensure effective implementation of the business functional policies, procedures and controls covering all areas of assigned department activity so that all relevant procedural/legislative requirements, fulfilled while delivering a quality, cost-effective service.

* **Collaboration with Product Partners/Sector Heads:**
* Work closely with GTx, Trade, Markets, Treasury, Corporate Finance, etc and all other product partners and sector heads/team.
* Drive cross‑sell revenue and support NTB onboarding.
* Promote digital adoption across FAB corporate channels.

* **Market & Sector Intelligence:**
* Conduct sector analysis and provide insights into management.
* Track economic, sovereign, GRE, and market developments.

* **Operational Excellence:**
* Ensure documentation, KFS, account plans, and pipeline accuracy.
* Adhere to governance frameworks and DOA.

* **Day‑to‑Day Activities:**
* Manage daily client engagement and transactions end‑to‑end.
* Update CRM, MIS, LH pipeline trackers regularly.
* Assist in the preparation of timely and accurate statements and reports to meet the unit’s requirements, policies, and standards.
* Learning & Development – Attend appropriate on and off-the-job training programs and ensure development and skill upgradation of team members.
* Support ED/Coverage Head with portfolio and governance reports.

**QUALIFICATIONS & EXPERIENCE:**

**Minimum Qualification:**

* Bachelor’s degree in finance, Banking, Economics, Business, or similar
* MBA/Finance preferred.

**Minimum Experience:**

* 5+ years of experience in Corporate Banking or a similar area preferably managing client relationships.

**Knowledge, Skills, and Attributes:**

* Strong understanding of corporate banking products and credit structuring.
* Familiarity with CBO frameworks including BM1108, BM1170, KYC/AML, KFS.

data.title: Senior Conference Producer - Education Conference & Exhibition
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose:**

The Senior Conference Producer will be involved in the development and execution of their own events, to ensure each Strategic and Technical agenda meets dmg’s market leading global standards.

Working as part of the global dmg Education team, which comprises of conferences, exhibi
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose:**

The Senior Conference Producer will be involved in the development and execution of their own events, to ensure each Strategic and Technical agenda meets dmg’s market leading global standards.

Working as part of the global dmg Education team, which comprises of conferences, exhibitions and online products, you will be involved in all aspects of the strategy and execution of your conferences, including support on commercial structure, identifying sponsors, partners, potential hosts, as well as programme creation and development, on-site management and speaker liaison to ensure the successful smooth running of the conferences, and that exceptional service is delivered to our customers and clients.

This role is key to the success of the growth and development of our business, it is heavily focussed on year-round content and the programme development of our global conferences but also covers other areas of conference management. Working alongside commercial, marketing, PR, data & digital, operations teams, you will report directly to the VP for Asia, working on a major new business launch that will become an international large-scale event.

This is an exciting and highly varied role that will demand intellectual autonomy, creativity and an ability to think beyond the standard commercial conference ‘conveyor belt’ production cycle. The primary aim will be to help dmg create a long-term reputation for excellence in the Asian Education market, driving forwards our ambitions to be the most respected provider of Education conferences in the world.

**Key Accountabilities:**

**Conference Production and Content Strategy**

* Support and manage the strategic conference, from research through to onsite delivery.
* Conduct in-depth research with senior global public and private sector stakeholders to create compelling programmes at the highest level of commercial viability for both sponsorship and delegate sales.
* Source, qualify and liaise with the Conference Chair/s, Knowledge Partners and Steering Committee members to determine a strategic plan for conference themes, topics, session chairs, and optimum speakers.
* Recruit highly esteemed leading experts, industry representatives, regulators, government representatives, and other relevant speakers to the programme faculty.
* Manage the technical call for papers process, creating topics and managing the execution and delivery of targets with technical committee members and internal teams.
* Work closely with the Marketing team to develop digital content-marketing campaign ideas.
* Support the VP with content strategy.
* Work with the Event Director to target key industry stakeholders, including Ministers, IOCs, IECs, NOCs, Global Leaders, to positively influence them regarding the value / positioning of our events.
* Assist in the development of effective mailing lists by contacting people both inside and outside the company who have access to the names of potential delegates, and ensure such information is communicated to the marketing team.

**Conference Project Management**

* Establish key relationships with partners and industry stakeholders, develop content strategies in accordance which our partners’ objectives.
* Develop current and prospective customer insights and relationships as part of the overall account management strategy for each event.
* Key account management and customer relationship development, to grow and establish each event as a leading brand.
* Use your industry expertise, industry relationships and Steering Committees to shape our marketing content messaging, brand marketing & positioning and generate press releases.
* Maintain close links with management to ensure that they are constantly aware of the status of events through weekly reports.

**Product Delivery and Management**

* Conduct telephone and in-person research with potential attendees within the target market for each event to develop programme agendas.
* Join sales calls and meetings with existing and potential clients to commercially contribute to the growth of the portfolio and find new market opportunities for speakers, moderators, partners.
* Recruit highly esteemed leading experts, industry representatives, regulators, government representatives, and other relevant speakers to your programme faculty.
* Assist in the maintenance of constant, correct and timely liaison with speakers throughout the duration of the event - onsite conference fulfilment.
* Research and provide strategic information required to market/promote each conference.
* Assist with queries from potential delegates and assist in adopting positive actions to help sell delegate places and sponsorship.
* Work closely with the operations team to ensure delivery of a first-class onsite conference experience for attendees.

**dmg Asia Portfolio Support**

* Ensure content and associated narrative alignment between Asia’s portfolio and dmg’s flagship events.
* Create a playbook for managing the technical call for papers process across the portfolio, creating topics and managing the execution and delivery of targets with technical committee members and internal teams.
* Prepare speaker liaison playbook to ensure all speaker preparation and requirements are taken care of.
* Work closely with the operations team to ensure delivery of a first-class onsite conference experience for attendees for all shows.
* Attend conferences to promote Asia’s portfolio, gather market intelligence, as well as network with potential speakers and delegates to establish and maintain relationships pre- and post- conference.

**Job Context:**

**Relationships - Internal:**

• Will report to the senior management on day-to-day issues.

• Senior management – contact with VP and Event Director to ensure content strategies are fully integrated and all respective staff are aware of processes.

• All internal functions Commercial, Data & Digital, Marketing & PR, HR, Finance and Operations.

**Relationships - External:**

• Education value chain.

• Event hosts when applicable.

• Senior individuals/C-suite professionals on Governing Bodies.

• Associations - Industry and Sector specific.

• Knowledge Partners.

• Steering Committees.

• International government representatives.

• Trade ambassadors.

**Qualifications, Experience, & Skills:**

• Passionate, dedicated, and knowledgeable about developing smart, profitable, and industry-leading conferences and with a proven and comprehensive experience of applying efficient and effective processes to your own successful conference portfolio.

• You will demonstrate the ability to simultaneously manage a portfolio of international event products.

• You will show how you are able to create leading-edge marketing and sales campaigns.

**Skills and Behavioural Competencies**

• Minimum 5 - 7 years conference production experience.

• Excellent networking and information gathering abilities.

• Engaging, professional and diplomatic demeanour.

• Comfortable conducting regular phone calls and meetings with a range of senior industry figures.

• Strong teamwork skills to ensure the efficient running of content team.

• Self-disciplined and able to work both independently and as part of a team.

• Problem solver with the ability to break down complex concepts, make logical comparisons, and identify underlying patterns and connections.

• Agile learner with the ability to develop in-depth technical knowledge on diverse topics and an understanding of key commercial drivers underlying your products.

• Resilient, with a strong desire to succeed.

• Experience in the Education industry is a strong asset.

You should be open to international travel, as required by the job role.

**dmg events is an equal opportunity employer. If you have not had feedback from us within 14 days, please consider your application as unsuccessful for this round.**

data.title: Human Resources Director
data.raw_snippet:
**JOB SUMMARY:**

Directs and provides leadership and operational oversight of all People Innovation and Impact’s functions at American Hospital Dubai. Ensures the development, implementation, and continuous improvement of People Innovation and Impact’s policies, programs, systems, and services that
data.jd_text:
**JOB SUMMARY:**

Directs and provides leadership and operational oversight of all People Innovation and Impact’s functions at American Hospital Dubai. Ensures the development, implementation, and continuous improvement of People Innovation and Impact’s policies, programs, systems, and services that support organisational effectiveness, regulatory compliance, and employee engagement. Oversees workforce planning, talent acquisition, compensation and benefits, employee relations, performance management, learning and development, HR operations, HR systems, and government relations. Works in close collaboration with the Chief Human Resources Officer (CHRO) and Senior Management Team to foster a high-performance culture, support organisational transformation, and uphold the hospital’s mission, vision, and values.

We are looking for an immediate joiner.

**RESPONSIBILITIES:**

**Human Resources Administration and Compliance**

* Ensures accurate, complete, and legally compliant employee records, including employment contracts, academic and professional qualifications, licenses, visas, health certificates, leave records, and performance documentation.
* Maintains compliance with UAE Labour Law, Joint Commission International Accreditation (JCIA) standards, and other applicable healthcare regulatory requirements.
* Oversees the development, implementation, and periodic review of People Innovation and Impact’s policies, procedures, and the Employee Handbook.
* Ensures high standards of HR data accuracy, integrity, confidentiality, and compliance with internal controls, data privacy regulations, and information security requirements.

**Strategic Workforce Planning and Budgeting**

* Leads the preparation and management of annual People Innovation and Impact’s operational and capital budgets, ensuring efficient and cost-effective use of resources.
* Drives workforce planning initiatives, including manpower forecasting, organisational design, and succession planning aligned with current and future hospital needs.
* Develops and presents workforce analytics, dashboards, and reports to support evidence-based decision-making by senior leadership.

**HR Operations, HRIS, and Workforce Analytics**

* Leads and optimises day-to-day HR operations to ensure effective HR service delivery, payroll coordination, and seamless end-to-end employee lifecycle management.
* Drives the implementation, enhancement, and continuous improvement of HRIS platforms (e.g., Oracle), translating HR strategy into scalable, user-centric digital solutions.
* Reviews and analyses HR processes, tools, and systems to identify opportunities for automation, standardisation, efficiency gains, and improved employee experience.
* Develops, monitors, and delivers workforce analytics, dashboards, and KPIs that enable data-driven talent, productivity, and operational decisions.
* Ensures HR systems data accuracy, reporting reliability, and compliance with governance, privacy, and information security standards.
* Partners closely with the Chief Human Resources Officer and HR leadership team to operationalise strategic priorities and support enterprise-wide transformation initiatives.

**Talent Acquisition and Onboarding**

* Develops and oversees local and international recruitment strategies to attract, select, and retain qualified professionals in line with organisational requirements and budgetary constraints.
* Implements competency-based recruitment and selection processes to ensure fair, consistent, and effective hiring practices.
* Oversees onboarding and orientation programs to ensure new employees are effectively integrated into the hospital’s culture, policies, and patient care standards.

**Compensation, Benefits, and Rewards Management**

* Oversees job evaluation, grading, and classification frameworks to ensure internal equity and external market competitiveness.
* Administers compensation structures, salary reviews, and employee benefits programs in accordance with organisational policies and benchmarks.
* Leads the design and implementation of performance-based incentive schemes and employee recognition programs.
* Manages staff housing assignments and related policies in a fair, equitable, and cost-effective manner.

**Performance Management and Development**

* Leads the implementation and monitoring of the hospital’s performance management system, ensuring alignment between job descriptions, departmental objectives, and organisational goals.
* Partners with department heads to support performance reviews, development planning, and performance improvement initiatives.
* Utilises performance data and workforce metrics to support continuous improvement and organisational effectiveness.
* Oversees succession planning frameworks to strengthen leadership pipelines and ensure continuity in critical roles.

**Learning and Leadership Development**

* Oversees employee orientation, learning, training, and competency development programs in line with accreditation, clinical, and professional standards.
* Supports leadership development initiatives to enhance management capability and prepare high-potential employees for future roles.
* Collaborates with Learning and Development teams to align training programs with organisational strategy and clinical excellence priorities.

**Employee Relations and Engagement**

* Fosters a positive organisational culture through transparent communication and effective engagement across all staff levels.
* Leads employee engagement, wellness, and recognition initiatives to enhance morale, retention, and job satisfaction.
* Oversees employee grievance management, ensuring issues are addressed fairly, confidentially, and in compliance with legal and organisational requirements.
* Supports staff welfare initiatives, including employee committees and engagement forums.

**Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion**

* Promotes a culture of fairness, respect, inclusion, and equal opportunity across the organisation.
* Ensures equitable practices in recruitment, promotion, compensation, and recognition.
* Drives Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion initiatives aligned with organisational values and international HR best practices.

**Government Relations and Licensing**

* Ensures timely processing of employee-related government requirements, including visas, Emirates ID, and professional licensing.
* Maintains effective working relationships with regulatory bodies such as the Dubai Health Authority (DHA) and other relevant authorities.

**QUALIFICATIONS:**

* Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources Management, Business Administration, or related field.
* Master’s Degree in Human Resources Management or a related field is preferred.
* Professional HR certifications
  *(e.g., CIPD, SHRM, or HRCI)*
  preferred

**PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE:**

* Minimum of twelve (12) years of progressive HR experience, with at least five (5) years in a senior HR leadership role within Healthcare.
* Knowledge of Human Resources Management principles, practices, and regulations, including compliance with UAE labour laws, employment regulations, and healthcare accreditation standards (e.g., JCIA).
* Knowledge of strategic workforce planning, organisational development, job evaluation systems, and change management frameworks.
* Knowledge of healthcare-specific Human Resources requirements, including employee credentialing, professional licensing, and compliance with DHA and MOH regulations.
* Knowledge of Human Resources Information Systems (HRIS), HR digital enablement, workforce analytics, and data governance principles.
* Skills in leadership, people management, and the development of high-performing HR teams.
* Skills in stakeholder engagement, influencing, and professional written and verbal communication at the senior leadership level.
* Skills in HR data analysis, workforce analytics, HRIS reporting, and the use of metrics to support evidence-based decision-making.
* Skills in policy development, process improvement, and continuous quality management within regulated environments.
* Skills in talent acquisition, retention strategies, employee engagement, and workforce planning execution.
* Skills in conflict resolution, problem-solving, and effective employee relations management.
* Ability to manage complex HR operations within a large, regulated healthcare organisation.
* Ability to align HR execution with organisational strategy and support cultural, operational, and digital transformation initiatives.
* Ability to design, implement, and monitor performance management systems and incentive frameworks.
* Ability to build strong interpersonal relationships and influence stakeholders at all organisational levels.
* Ability to administer staff housing and employee programs in a fair, equitable, and cost-effective manner.

data.title: Program Management Officer (PMO) – Binance Card
data.raw_snippet: Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an
data.jd_text:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300+ million people in 100+ countries for our industry-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.
  
  
We are seeking a highly analytical and execution-driven PMO to support the launch, scaling, and optimization of the Binance Card program within Binance.
  
  
This role will play a critical part in vendor evaluation, financial planning, lifecycle management, and strategic growth. You will work cross-functionally with Product, Finance, Compliance, Marketing, and external partners to ensure the card program is commercially viable, operationally efficient, and positioned for long-term growth.
  
  
**Responsibilities**
**Card Vendor Assessment & Management**

* Identify, evaluate, and onboard card program vendors (issuers, processors, program managers)
* Lead RFP/RFI processes, commercial negotiations, and contract structuring
* Assess vendors across capabilities, pricing, compliance readiness, and scalability
* Define and monitor vendor KPIs and SLAs
* Manage ongoing vendor performance and optimization

**Financial Planning & P&L Ownership**

* Build and maintain detailed financial models for the Binance Card program
* Partner with Finance to develop and manage end-to-end P&L
* Forecast revenues (interchange, FX spreads, fees, partnerships)
* Analyze cost drivers (scheme fees, processing, fraud losses, rewards)
* Track actuals vs forecast and drive cost optimization initiatives
* Support pricing, incentives, and rewards strategy

**Growth Strategy & Commercial Expansion**

* Define and execute growth strategies in collaboration with internal stakeholders such as Marketing, Product, and Data teams to own and optimize the \*\*end-to-end card lifecycle

**Card Scheme Relationship Management**

* Manage strategic relationships with global card networks such as Visa and Mastercard
* Ensure compliance with scheme rules, regulations, and program requirements
* Negotiate commercial terms (incentives, rebates)
* Coordinate scheme approvals, certifications, and audits
* Collaborate on joint initiatives (marketing campaigns, product enhancements)

**Program Management & Governance**

* Drive end-to-end program execution, timelines, and milestones
* Maintain program roadmap and governance framework
* Identify risks and implement mitigation strategies
* Ensure alignment across Product, Tech, Compliance, Legal, and Operations
* Provide regular reporting and insights to senior leadership

**Strategic Analysis & Market Intelligence**

* Conduct market benchmarking for crypto and fintech card programs
* Analyze competitor products, pricing, and rewards structures
* Evaluate new business models and partnership opportunities

**Requirements**

* Proven enterprise-level business development experience with the ability to engage and negotiate with C-suite stakeholders and manage complex, multi-party partnerships.
* Strong existing network within PSPs, acquirers, payment processors, or financial institutions in the target region.
* Demonstrated ability to operate in regulated environments and navigate compliance and reputational considerations when structuring partnerships.
* Commercially mature, resilient, and execution-driven, with the ability to build momentum in high-growth, expansion-focused environments rather than relying on established infrastructure.
* Strong analytical mindset with the ability to interpret merchant performance data and translate insights into scalable partnership strategies.
* Fluency in English and Spanish is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage.

**Why Binance**

* Shape the future with the world’s leading blockchain ecosystem
* Collaborate with world-class talent in a user-centric global organization with a flat structure
* Tackle unique, fast-paced projects with autonomy in an innovative environment
* Thrive in a results-driven workplace with opportunities for career growth and continuous learning
* Competitive salary and company benefits
* Work-from-home arrangement (the arrangement may vary depending on the work nature of the business team)

Binance is committed to being an equal opportunity employer. We believe that having a diverse workforce is fundamental to our success.
  
  
*By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our*
***Candidate Privacy Notice***
*.*
We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

data.title: Director, Strategic Projects
data.raw_snippet:
**Our business landscape**

We’re an award-winning global communications company operating in nine countries across the Middle East, North Africa, and Southeast Asia. Our strategy is to become the region’s leading digital infrastructure provider. Ooredoo Group’s strategic vision is guided by five ke
data.jd_text:
**Our business landscape**

We’re an award-winning global communications company operating in nine countries across the Middle East, North Africa, and Southeast Asia. Our strategy is to become the region’s leading digital infrastructure provider. Ooredoo Group’s strategic vision is guided by five key pillars:

* **Value-Focused Portfolio:**
  Boosting asset returns by focusing on telco operations, towers, data centres, the sea cable business and fintech.

* **Strengthen the Core:**
  Optimally using deployed capital and maintain an appropriate cost structure.

* **Evolve the Core:**
  Monetising opportunities to generate new revenue streams via programmes focusing on analytics, digitalisation of operations, and partnerships with digital service providers.

* **People:**
  Building an engaged and empowered workforce through integrated learning programs and coaching and mentoring.

* **Excellence in Customer Experience:**
  Creating superior customer experiences.

From day one, every employee who joins our team becomes an integral part of our success journey. We offer you the chance to enhance your skills, advance your career, and maintain a healthy work-life balance. Empowering you to catapult your personal and professional growth. If you’re looking to challenge your growth potential, Ooredoo is the employer for you.

**Job overview**

* The Director, Strategic projects is responsible for leading the planning, execution, and governance of the strategy’s most critical cross-functional initiatives
* This role ensures that high-impact projects are delivered on time, within scope, and in alignment with the
* Group’s strategic and financial objectives. The position combines leadership in corporate development, strategic execution, and stakeholder management across business units, regions, and external partners
* The role ensures end-to-end ownership of strategic projects, from origination to execution and value realization, aligning with the Group’s growth, digital transformation, and shareholder objectives.
* The role together with the team member reporting to the role holder will oversee a wide range of projects and programs.
* One of the initial focus will be the key strategic initiative related to the expansions in scope, and territories of Ooredoo’s push into Data Centers as well AI? GPU as a service.
* While Syntys team is responsible for the day-to-day operation of these assets, the role holder will drive the expansion into new territories which is a key part of the strategy
* It will also include new strategic projects as approved as part of the updated strategy.

The role holder acts not only as a PMO or project manager but as the project owner, driving the actual content and delivery of the project and providing content expertise in the relevant field.

**Your impact on our goals**

**Strategic Program Leadership**

* Lead the planning, structuring, and delivery of complex, multi-stakeholder projects, including joint ventures, market entries, and major transformations.
* Define strategic objectives, milestones, and performance indicators in coordination with the
* Establish project governance frameworks, steering committees, and reporting standards.
* Drive decision-making through data-driven insights, structured analysis, and scenario planning.

**Provide direct support to the CEO and Board during major transaction and strategic processes**
.

**Drive the portfolio of strategic projects, partnerships JV and transactions related to Data Center, Ai infrastructure and GPU as a service and AI infrastructure including**

* Drive expansion in this area in particular expansion outside Ooredoo Group and its affiliates current footprint
* Drive the design, execution and implementation of relevant strategic initiatives related to this area.
* Negotiate strategic agreements and partnerships

**Cross-Functional Program Management**

* Coordinate workstreams across Finance, Legal, HR, Operations, IT, and Business Units.
* Identify interdependencies, risks, and bottlenecks, and implement mitigation strategies.
* Manage cross-border teams, consultants, and advisors to deliver outcomes efficiently.
* Ensure alignment of initiatives with budget, resource allocation, and strategic KPIs.
* Coordinate engagement across all operating companies

**Executive & Communication Board**

* Prepare executive-level presentations, Board papers, and investor communications related to strategic projects.
* Translate complex analyses into clear recommendations and progress updates.
* Lead stakeholder management with theCEO and Group Strategy in stakeholder engagement with shareholders, regulators, and partners.

**Team Leadership & Capability Building**

* Lead and mentor project managers and analysts
* Foster a culture of accountability, analytical excellence, and collaboration.
* Institutionalize best practices in project management and performance tracking.

**Experience and Qualifications**

* Prior experience of transformation and transaction planning and execution within Ooredoo
* Experience driving large scale transformation projects
* Experience at a Senior Level in a telecom operator in strategy or M&A team at a senior level (CXO or CX-1)
* 15 / 20 years of experience preferable in the Telco industry (not just technical)
* Knowledge and prior experience relating to DC and AI
* Experience in managing large scale transformation projects
* Experience in managing top management escalations and creating buy-in with stakeholders
* Multi disciplinary cross border program management
* Finance – business planning, valuation, accounting, tax, budgeting, AOP impact assessment, accounting separation
* Employee transfer requirements
* Organisation planning
* Scope specification for transaction advisors
* Contract drafting and negotiation
* Corporate Governance
* Transitional services arrangements
* Bachelor or Master degree – finance or business preferred

data.raw_snippet:
**Role –**
Lead Consultant
  
  
**Technology**
– ERP Finance Fusion
  
  
**Location**
– Muscat, Oman

– ORC

Competitive (including bonus)
  
  
**Job Description**
We are seeking a highly experienced Oracle Fusion Finance Lead/Principal Consultant to
data.jd_text:
**Role –**
Lead Consultant
  
  
**Technology**
– ERP Finance Fusion
  
  
**Location**
– Muscat, Oman
  
  
**Business Unit**
– ORC
  
  
**Compensation –**
Competitive (including bonus)
  
  
**Job Description**
We are seeking a highly experienced Oracle Fusion Finance Lead/Principal Consultant to oversee and drive end ‑ to ‑ end implementation and support of key Fusion Financials modules, including General Ledger (GL), Accounts Payable (AP), Accounts Receivable (AR), Fixed Assets (FA), Cash Management (CM), Expense Management, Tax, Revenue Management Cloud Services (RMCS), Projects and Advanced Collections. The consultant will work closely with Finance leadership, business SMEs, and cross ‑ functional teams to define solution architecture, lead workshops, guide functional consultants, ensure seamless module integration, and provide expert oversight for project execution. This role requires strong command over financial processes, statutory and compliance requirements, and the ability to independently lead discussions with the customer.
  
  
**Your role**
In the role of a Lead or Principal consultant, you will serve to facilitate Finance Functional role with below responsibilities as followed.
  
  

* Lead end-to-end delivery of Oracle Fusion Finance modules: GL, AP, AR, FA, CM, Expense Management, Tax, Revenue Management Cloud Services (RMCS), Projects and Advanced Collections (if applicable).
* Conduct requirements workshops with customer business users and senior office, Finance Controllers, AP/AR teams, Treasury, and Audit teams.
* Translate business processes into future-state Fusion Finance architecture.
* Prepare solution designs, BRDs/MD50s, test scripts, and configuration documents

**Responsibilities**

* Module Configuration & Functional Expertise

+ Configure Fusion Financial modules based on global design principles and local statutory needs.
+ Manage Chart of Accounts (CoA), ledgers, legal entities, accounting rules, subledger configurations, and tax setups.
+ Support period close processes, reconciliations, journals, allocations, and intercompany flows.
+ Drive setup for bank accounts, cash pooling, payment formats, and treasury workflows.

* Finance Integrations & Reporting

+ Provide functional leadership for integrations with Payroll, Procurement & SCM, Treasury systems, Banking interfaces, and third-party invoicing platforms.
+ Collaborate with technical teams on FBDI/HDL-based loads, OIC/REST API integrations, and OTBI/BI Publisher reports.
+ Lead financial data validation, reconciliation, and cutover activities.

* Project Governance & Customer Engagement

+ Independently handle client discussions, workshops, and solution walkthroughs.
+ Partner with PMO on planning, RAIDs (Risks, Assumptions, Issues, Dependencies), and status reporting.
+ Manage functional consultants working across different finance modules.
+ Ensure compliance with audit, internal controls, and statutory requirements .

* Testing, Rollout & Support

+ Lead SIT, UAT, regression testing, and hypercare support.
+ Drive quarter-end and year-end support readiness.
+ Own issue triaging, resolution management, and continuous improvements.
+ Guide business users on new features and quarterly Fusion Cloud updates .

* Required Skills & Experience

+ 10–15 years of experience in Oracle ERP implementations; 6+ years in Oracle Fusion Cloud.
+ Strong expertise in at least 4–5 Finance modules (GL, AP, AR, FA, CM, Taxes, Revenue Management Cloud Services (RMCS), Projects, Expenses).
+ Deep knowledge of Subledger Accounting (SLA), multi-ledger architecture, and cross-module flows.
+ Hands-on experience in finance data migration (FBDI uploads, opening balances, historical data, EBS to Cloud).
+ Experience with Oracle Cloud implementation methodologies
+ Experience in Telecommunications sector
+ Strong understanding of statutory reporting, localization, and period close processes.
+ Ability to lead functional teams and coordinate with technical architects.
+ Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.

**Preferred**

* Should be excellent planner when it comes to perform release planning and other delivery planning.
* Should have excellent problem-solving skills
* Experience in GCC/Middle East finance regulatory environments.
* Exposure to enterprise multi-company, multi-country rollouts.
* Familiarity with integrations involving banks, treasury systems, and procurement.
* Experience in onsite–offshore delivery models.

**Personal**
Besides the professional qualifications of the candidates, we place great importance in addition to various forms personality profile. These include:
  
  

* Strong analytical ability and business acumen.
* Excellent leadership, communication, and consulting presence.
* Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
* High accountability and delivery focus.

**Why Infosys**
Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in more than 50 countries to navigate their digital transformation.
  
  
With over four decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly steer our clients through their digital journey. We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI-powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change. We also empower the business with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer delight. Our always-on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills, expertise, and ideas from our innovation ecosystem.
  
  
“All aspects of employment at Infosys are based on merit, competence and performance. We are committed to embracing diversity and creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Infosys is proud to be an equal opportunity employer.”

**Why Infosys**

Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in more than 50 countries to navigate their digital transformation.

With over four decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly steer our clients through their digital journey. We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI-powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change. We also empower the business with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer delight. Our always-on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills, expertise, and ideas from our innovation ecosystem.

“All aspects of employment at Infosys are based on merit, competence and performance. We are committed to embracing diversity and creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Infosys is proud to be an equal opportunity employer.”

data.search_title: "Fakeeh Care" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Description**
**Job Purpose:**
Managing and overseeing all outpatient pharmacies and their related tasks that include without limitation: dispensing, receiving, ordering items from store and inventory management. In addition to managing all other services covered by the outpatient pharmacies
  
  
**Key Responsibilities And Duties**

* Supervises and directs the staff to provide professional, safe and timely pharmaceutical services to the patients.
* Develops, coordinates, implements and ensures compliance with all Fakeeh Care and pharmacy services policies and procedures and ensures compliance of staff with accreditations standards.
* Schedules staff as required to be sure of the smooth of work especially during peak hours.
* Evaluates, develops and implements at all times best practice recommendations related to medication safety.
* Ensures that medication verification and medication dispensing in outpatient pharmacy meets set time frames.
* Conducts periodic performance evaluation of the outpatient pharmacy staff and gives the staff constructive feedback.
* Reports the nearly expired medicines (within 6 months) to medical stockroom, ensures return when applicable and subtracts from the inventory.
* Trouble shoots variations and problems that could arise from day to day work.
* Reviews on monthly basis outpatient pharmacy indicators and addresses variations by developing performance improvement projects.
* Ensures that inventory of narcotic and controlled drugs is done every shift and re-checked.
* Ensures that pharmacists do the inventory of medicines and re-checks the inventory.
* Works on self-development by enrolling in continuous education program regarding medication management practices, high risk medications, medication errors and others.
* Evaluates, develops and implements best practice recommendations related to medication safety.
* Provides training and detailed orientation for newly hired staff.
* Promotes, encourages and assists pharmacy personnel in their self-development.
* Outpatient Pharmacy Automation related functions if applicable:
* Understand clinical, technical, and business workflows to achieve planned outcomes of the smart solution.
* Oversee clinical management of the Robotic Solution, such as determining override standards, implementing Clinical Data Categories and developing policies and procedures.
* Assimilates information from variety of sources, able to analyze data and make recommendations and executes a course of action.
* Design quality assurance and process improvement studies to monitor and utilize the Robotic Solution.
* Develop training checklists and competency for pharmacy staff.
* Researches and trends information from reports or data files from multiple divisions and service centers.
* Manages all requests for Robotic Solution design or drug dictionary changes to the enterprise system standards and strategy.
* Review interface design and ongoing activity.
* Participate in policy and procedure development and review.
* Redesign and monitor workflow pertaining to Robotic Solution activities, including override activities.
* Manage the Robotic Solution formulary for new medications.
* Assist in resolving Robotic Solution issues as a member of a multidisciplinary team.
* Manage the Robotic Solution user database.
* Assures appropriate testing of all integrated applications.
* Provides supports to Pharmacy staff and all other stakeholders to increase adoption, improve and enhance Pharmacy information solutions for high quality safe patient care, education and research.
* Ensures prompt and timely calling of patients to dispensing windows and aims at reducing patients waiting time to the minimum possible.
* Follows all medication safe procedures when dispensing medications.
* Enters on OVR any encountered medication error or ADR.
* Attends continuing education programs to maintain expertise in Pharmacy and required licensure.
* Ensures Enrollment in continuous education program regarding medication management practices, high-risk medications, medication errors and others.
* Ensure the staff training and implement CIBAHI & JCI requirement to be in place by providing a trace activities with a timeframe and action plan adding to that he/she shall submit monthly report with the progress.
* Ensures that all plans, policies and procedures, protocols, clinical practice guidelines and scope of services for the pharmaceutical services are up-to-date, uploaded, and communicated to the quality team to upload to the system.
* Educates patients and their families about health conditions, treatments and preventative measures if applicable.

**All Fakeeh Care employees are responsible for continuous improvement, including:**

* Performing all duties and tasks in a manner that supports Fakeeh’s Person-Centered care values.
* Actively contributing to continuous improvement initiatives, within the scope of the role.
* Adherence to safety protocols and proactively seeking to address any job-related safety concerns.
* Maintaining strict confidentiality of all sensitive information accessed or encountered during work.
* Complying with cybersecurity policies and standards to protect Fakeeh’s systems and participating in awareness training and initiatives to prevent cyber threats.
* Adhering to and upholding Fakeeh Care’s code of conduct, policies and ethical standards.
* Completion of mandatory education as per the requirement, at least one month prior to expiration.

**Requirements**
**Skills and Abilities:**

* Actively strive to upgrade professional skills through engaging in appropriate professional training and experience.
* Competent computer skills with software applications to include Microsoft Word, Excel.

**Experience**
5 - 7 years of experience in pharmaceutical field with at least 2 years in managerial role
  
  
**Education**
Pharm-D
  
  
**Language**
Arabic & English
  
  
**Licenses / Certifications**
License for practice as per the regional health regulatory authority e.g. (SCFHS / DHA).

data.jd_text:
**Description**
Key Responsibilities and Duties: 1. Oversees personnel within the Safety Unit, ensuring alignment with Fakeeh Care policies, safety objectives, and performance expectations. 2. Reviews, updates, and develops safety policies, procedures, and manuals to ensure compliance with Ministry of Interior (MOI) regulations, other relevant safety standards, and to proactively address safety risks, including emergency procedures and the Emergency Disaster Manual. 3. Conducts regular inspections and audits Fakeeh Healthcare facility, documenting findings and ensuring that corrective actions are implemented to address any non-compliance. 4. Investigates and analyzes safety-related incidents, provides recommendations for preventive measures, and implements corrective actions to mitigate future risks. 5. Ensures the facility adheres to all relevant regulations, codes, and standards, including compliance with local Civil Defense and health & safety requirements. 6. Prepares and delivers regular safety presentations and reports to line manager, ensuring clear communication of safety concerns, incidents, and compliance status. 7. Plans, executes, and evaluates emergency drills. Develops action plans to address any findings, ensuring ongoing preparedness for any emergency scenario. 8. Develops and delivers safety awareness lectures and training programs for staff, residents, and visitors to maintain a high level of safety consciousness. 9. Trains new staff on safety protocols and procedures, ensuring they are well-prepared to follow established safety guidelines. 10. Actively participates in safety-related meetings and committees, collaborating with interdisciplinary teams to integrate safety into daily operations. 11. Conducts comprehensive risk assessments for Fakeeh Healthcare facility, identifying potential hazards and preparing action plans to mitigate risks and ensure a safe environment. 12. Leads safety-related projects, ensuring compliance with Civil Defense regulations and accreditation standards.13. Manages the Safety Unit’s budget and staffing needs, ensuring that resources are allocated efficiently to support all safety operations and initiatives. 14. Other duties as assigned within the scope of the job.
  
  
**Requirements**
Skills and Abilities: - Excellent analytical and problem-solving abilities. - Strong organizational skills and attention to detail. - In-depth knowledge of local regulations, SASO standards, and compliance requirements. - Strong leadership and interpersonal skills, with the ability to train and motivate staff.

Education: Bachelor’s degree in engineering
  
  
Language: Proficiency in both Arabic and English for effective communication
  
  
Licenses / Certifications: NEBOSH and / or IOSH

data.raw_snippet:
**About the Company**

data.jd_text:
**About the Company**
Careem is building the Everything App for the greater Middle East — making it easy to move around, order food and groceries, manage payments, and more. Our purpose is simple: to simplify and improve people’s lives and build an awesome organisation that inspires.
  
  
Since 2012, Careem has enabled earnings for over 2.5 million Captains, simplified the lives of more than 70 million customers, and built a platform where the region’s best talent and entrepreneurs thrive. We operate in 70+ cities across 10 countries, from Morocco to Pakistan.
  
  
***We’re now entering our next chapter — one powered by AI. We’re looking for AI talent: curious problem-solvers who know how to apply AI to build tools, automate workflows, and create real impact. Whether it’s streamlining operations, enhancing customer experience, or reimagining internal systems — we want people who can make Careem work smarter and move faster.***
**About The Team**
The Food team at Careem is at the forefront of transforming how people experience food delivery across the UAE. As part of one of the fastest-growing verticals, we are a dynamic group of professionals driven by innovation, data, and our mission to simplify and improve lives. We work closely with partners, operations, and product teams to ensure seamless, delightful food delivery experiences for our customers.
  
  
**About The Role**
We are looking for an Account Manager to join our Food - UAE team in Dubai. This role is responsible for owning and nurturing relationships with our restaurant partners to help them grow and succeed on the Careem platform. You will play a critical role in optimizing partner performance, improving operational metrics, and driving strategic initiatives that benefit both Careem and our partners.
  
  
**What You'll Do**

* Manage a portfolio of restaurant partners, ensuring strong relationships and satisfaction.
* Drive partners' performance through business reviews, data insights, and strategic recommendations.
* Collaborate cross-functionally with Operations, Marketing, and Product teams to execute growth initiatives.
* Identify and resolve partner concerns swiftly to ensure a high-quality experience.
* Monitor and analyze partner performance metrics, identifying areas for improvement.
* Support onboarding and training of new partners to set them up for success.
* Advocate internally for partner needs and work with relevant teams to drive platform improvements.

**What You'll Need**

* 2-4 years of experience in account management, partner success, business development, or similar roles, preferably in tech, e-commerce, or F&B sectors.
* Candidate must be fluent in Arabic
* Proven track record of managing external stakeholders and influencing decision-making.
* Strong analytical skills with proficiency in Excel/Google Sheets and data interpretation.
* Excellent interpersonal, communication, and negotiation skills.
* A problem-solving mindset with a bias for action and continuous improvement.
* Ability to work cross-functionally in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.
* Bachelor's degree in Business, Economics, or a related field.

**What We’ll Provide You**
We offer colleagues the opportunity to drive impact in the region while they learn and grow. As a full time Careem colleague, you will be able to:
  
  

* Work and learn from great minds by joining a community of inspiring colleagues.
* Put your passion to work in a purposeful organisation dedicated to creating impact in a region with a lot of untapped potential.
* Explore new opportunities to learn and grow every day.
* Work 4 days a week in office & 1 day from home, and remotely from any country in the world for 30 days a year with unlimited vacation days per year. (If you are in an individual contributor role in tech, you will have 2 office days a week and 3 to work from home.)
* Access to healthcare benefits and fitness reimbursements for health activities including gym, health club, and training classes.

data.title: Founding Forward Deployed Engineer - WorkOS - Enterprise Agentic AI
data.raw_snippet:
**About the Company**
Careem is building the Everything App for the greater Middle East — making it easy to move around, order food and groceries, manage payments, and more. Our purpose is simple: to simplify and improve people’s lives and build an awesome organisation that inspires.
  
  
Since 201
data.search_title: "Careem" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**About the Company**
Careem is building the Everything App for the greater Middle East — making it easy to move around, order food and groceries, manage payments, and more. Our purpose is simple: to simplify and improve people’s lives and build an awesome organisation that inspires.
  
  
Since 2012, Careem has enabled earnings for over 2.5 million Captains, simplified the lives of more than 70 million customers, and built a platform where the region’s best talent and entrepreneurs thrive. We operate in 70+ cities across 10 countries, from Morocco to Pakistan.
  
  
***We’re now entering our next chapter — one powered by AI. We’re looking for AI talent: curious problem-solvers who know how to apply AI to build tools, automate workflows, and create real impact. Whether it’s streamlining operations, enhancing customer experience, or reimagining internal systems — we want people who can make Careem work smarter and move faster.***
**The mission**
We believe the transformative potential of AI is significantly under-realised in our region. To bridge this gap, we are incubating a new division within Careem dedicated to Enterprise AI Transformation.
  
  
We are reimagining and building the future of work to simplify and improve how businesses function in the era of GenAI with WorkOS: a next-generation ‘operating system’ designed to deploy, orchestrate, and improve AI agents across every customer and operational journey (and increasingly autonomously). This isn’t just automation; it’s about creating a hybrid workforce where self-learning AI agents handle the heavy lifting, empowering our people to focus on the highest-value, most creative work.
  
  
**The team**
This group operates as a
**startup within Careem**
with a distinct mandate: move fast, build boldly, and deliver production-grade AI systems that fundamentally change how the region leverages technology.
  
  
**The opportunity**
We are looking for a
**Founding Forward Deployed Engineer - WorkOS - Enterprise Agentic AI**
to be the vanguard of the WorkOS mission. This is a role for a "heretic": someone who cares more about solving the problem and delivering value than following a rigid spec. You will be the bridge between our core AI engine and the messy, high-stakes reality of our customers’ operations.
  
  
As an FDE, you aren't sitting in the back office; you are on the front lines, embedded with internal Careem verticals and external enterprise partners. In partnership with your implementation squad, consisting also of business transformation consultants, you will identify their deepest friction points and build the "special ops" code that proves the power of WorkOS. Your work is the proof of concept that will redefine how the region works.
  
  
**What You’ll Do**

* Tip of the Spear: Lead the deployment of WorkOS in the field. You will be responsible for understanding a customer's operational "chaos" and architecting an AI-driven solution that fixes it in weeks, not months.
* Rapid-Fire Execution: Build, iterate, and ship. You will write high-quality, full-stack code to create bespoke integrations and augment our platform’s core capabilities and create custom agents. This goes beyond context engineering; you’ll build the connective tissue - integrating bespoke APIs, setting up RAGs and Evals, tuning the E2E system and performance, and architecting multi-agent handoffs.
* Feedback Loop Mastery: You are the eyes and ears of the product team. You will translate field-tested insights into core product requirements, ensuring WorkOS remains grounded in real-world utility.
* Winning Stakeholders: Act as the technical face of WorkOS. You’ll need to win the trust of stakeholders, navigate complex enterprise hierarchies, and persuade skeptics by shipping results that speak for themselves.
* Technical Versatility: One day you’re setting up a RAG pipeline; the next, you’re debugging a legacy enterprise API or designing a custom dashboard. You do whatever is necessary to make the solution land.

**What You’ll Need**

* 5–8+ years of high-octane engineering experience. You are likely a senior-level engineer who is "hungrier" than your peers and bored by traditional, slow-moving dev cycles.
* The FDE Pedigree: Experience in forward-deployed, mission-driven environments (e.g., Palantir, high-growth startups, or specialized consultancy) where you worked directly with customers.
* Full-Stack Polyglot: Mastery of the modern stack (React/TS, Python/Node) with the ability to jump into any codebase and be productive on day one.
* AI Fluidity: Strong working knowledge of LLMs, prompt engineering, and agentic frameworks. You don't just know the theory; you know how to make AI work in production.
* Excellent Communication: You are a "social engineer." You can explain complex AI logic to a CEO and then pivot to a deep-dive session with an infrastructure lead without missing a beat.
* Relentless Bias for Action: You are a builder who values shipping over perfection. You have a "founder-level" sense of ownership and aren't afraid to get your hands dirty.
* Willingness to work on-site full time in UAE, with occasional travel to be embedded with regional partners.

**What You’ll Receive**

* A Blank Canvas and Live Ammunition: The rare opportunity to build a "0-to-1" product while immediately deploying it into the real-world operations of a regional giant. No "sandbox" projects here, you’ll be shipping code that moves people and goods on day one. This is a huge opportunity to create impact in our region.
* A Special Ops Mission: We’re a lean, impact-obsessed team operating with total autonomy. You’ll be free from corporate bureaucracy and legacy baggage, focused entirely on winning the customer and solving "unsolvable" problems.
* Direct Collaboration with Leadership: Direct engagement with Careem and enterprise client leadership, in addition to working side-by-side with the WorkOS founding team including Magnus Olsson (Careem’s original Co-founder).

**Competitive Compensation**
: Including direct equity in this new division. Our philosophy is meritocratic: we want you to own a meaningful stake in the value you create.

data.jd_text:
**About the Company**
Careem is building the Everything App for the greater Middle East — making it easy to move around, order food and groceries, manage payments, and more. Our purpose is simple: to simplify and improve people’s lives and build an awesome organisation that inspires.
  
  
Since 2012, Careem has enabled earnings for over 2.5 million Captains, simplified the lives of more than 70 million customers, and built a platform where the region’s best talent and entrepreneurs thrive. We operate in 70+ cities across 10 countries, from Morocco to Pakistan.
  
  
***We’re now entering our next chapter — one powered by AI. We’re looking for AI talent: curious problem-solvers who know how to apply AI to build tools, automate workflows, and create real impact. Whether it’s streamlining operations, enhancing customer experience, or reimagining internal systems — we want people who can make Careem work smarter and move faster.***
****About the role****
Careem’s mission includes simplifying and improving the lives of people across our region — and Care plays a vital role in making that mission real. As part of the Care Analytics, Automation, and Project Management team, you’ll use data and technology to enhance how we serve our customers, captains, and partners. From supporting building automation that reduces effort, to driving analytics that uncover experience gaps, you’ll help shape systems that create impact across the region.
  
  
This is a hands-on role within Care where you’ll program manage automation solutions , deliver data-driven insights, and manage impactful projects. In this hands-on position you’ll manage data-led and AI-powered initiatives in Care, support in automating workflows, optimizing performance, getting in-depth data analytics and managing projects that transform how we serve our users, alongside a talented team that’s driving meaningful change.
  
  
****What you’ll do****

* Program manage the end-to-end automation program roadmap for Careem Care: including but not limited to self-service flows, AI-driven triage, proactive notifications, and escalation automation
* Partner with business and care leads across verticals (Food, Quik, Pay, etc.) to analyze contact drivers, disposition trends, and pain points to identify automation and process improvement opportunities.
* Collaborate with Care and org-wide Engineering, Product, verticals, data science, and Operations to program manage and support roll out AI-enabled solutions that enhance care efficiency and quality of delivery
* Drive change management to ensure successful adoption of automation tools across Careem’s regional care teams.
* Support building care strategy across verticals , closely liaising with functional teams
* Lead cross-functional projects, managing dependencies, timelines, and risks while maintaining strong stakeholder communication.
* Localize and roll out solutions tailored and compliant to each market (UAE, Jordan, KSA)
* Explore and pilot emerging AI/ML technologies (e.g., NLP, conversational AI, RPA) to enhance Careem’s automation capabilities.
* Build clear documentation of systems, workflows, and success metrics to support scalability and transparency.
* Work with real-world data and translate it into features, signals, and insights
* Improve the way we serve and monitor machine learning models
* Contribute to a strong team culture of learning, iteration, and accountability
* Track performance metrics (contact rate, deflection rate, NPS/CSAT, automation accuracy, FCR) and provide insights and recommendations for continuous improvement
* Translate insights into data-backed actions in coordination with the respective teams
* Champion a “Care-First Automation” culture — leveraging technology to elevate the customer experience, not just reduce costs.

****What you need****
**Must-haves**

* Bachelor’s or Master’s in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, or a related technical field
* 6+ years of experience working with machine learning program management, analytics in any form- ideally in tech, e-commerce, or service excellence organizations.
* Solid Python skills, especially with libraries like pandas, NumPy, and scikit-learn
* A strong grasp of ML fundamentals like classification, regression, cross-validation, and evaluation metrics
* Familiarity with at least one ML framework such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or XGBoost
* Advanced analytical capability: proficiency in SQL, Excel, Power BI / Tableau, or other BI tools.
* Proven track record of translating data insights into business strategy and measurable impact.
* Advanced analytical capability: proficiency in SQL, Excel, Power BI / Tableau, or other BI tools - ability to translate complex data into simple narratives.
* Familiarity with CRM and Care platforms (Zendesk, Salesforce, or equivalent) and workflow automation tools.

**Nice-to-haves**

* Exposure to deep learning techniques in call center
* Experience working with large datasets using Spark, Hive, and cloud tools
* Familiarity with model deployment and monitoring workflows (Airflow, MLflow, etc.)
* Interest in solving real operational challenges for customers, captains and partners
* A GitHub profile or project portfolio that shows what you’ve built.

**What You’ll Get**

* A chance to work on AI problems, data-analytics at regional scale that improve lives and drive real business outcomes
* A smart, motivated team that values learning and practical impact
* Flexibility to work remotely, with strong support for collaboration and ownership
* A front-row seat to how AI is transforming mobility, delivery, and digital services in emerging markets

**What We’ll Provide You**
We offer colleagues the opportunity to drive impact in the region while they learn and grow. As a full time Careem colleague, you will be able to:
  
  

* Work and learn from great minds by joining a community of inspiring colleagues.
* Put your passion to work in a purposeful organisation dedicated to creating impact in a region with a lot of untapped potential.
* Explore new opportunities to learn and grow every day.
* Work 4 days a week in office & 1 day from home, and remotely from any country in the world for 30 days a year with unlimited vacation days per year. (If you are in an individual contributor role in tech, you will have 2 office days a week and 3 to work from home.)
* Access to healthcare benefits and fitness reimbursements for health activities including gym, health club, and training classes.

Whether it’s streamlining operations, enhancing customer experience, or reimagining internal systems — we want people who can make Careem work smarter and move faster.***
Careem “Tenants” is on a mission to make the “Everything App” become reality by expanding the breadth of services that Careem offers to its customers, with an initial focus on Car Rental and Home Services, through partnering with external partners and offering their services on the Everything App. We’re in the early stages of scaling up third-parties’ operated services in Dubai, and we look to solve problems while collaborating with our partners in order to achieve our ambitious growth goals in this burgeoning space.
  
  
As a
*Senior Commercial Executive*
, you’ll be responsible for bringing data orientation into decision-making across functions and topics within Tenants. This is a unique role with the opportunity to create genuine impact for the lives of everyday people in our region.
  
  
*Our ideal candidate is someone that excels at working and analyzing data, makes data-driven recommendations and that relentlessly focuses on customers and desires to understand their current & future needs and behaviors. Moreover, our candidate will be able to build a fast-paced understanding of both the online car rental market, as well as online on demand home services.*
**What You’ll Do**

* Business Growth: develop and implement plans to drive revenue growth and identify upsell and cross-sell opportunities to maximize verticals’ value.
* Business Operations: coordinate with partners’ Ops team to ensure smooth daily activities and bookings fulfillment; monitor and manage partners’ performance, addressing any issues proactively.
* Be the custodian of the key business metrics and analyses that powers business decisions
* Structure the analyses needed to answer key business questions, and perform analyses and derive commercial insights
* Drive business growth through supporting product funnel, business performance analysis
* Translate data into insights in clear, concise and actionable presentations/reports to support interaction with partners and guide business decision
* Designing, optimize & automate dashboards and reports to serve day-to-day data and analytics requests, and support monitoring business-impacting KPIs which support the decision-making process
* Be the custodian of data health-checks and data-sanitization

**What You Will Need**

* Strong presentation skills and an ability to communicate complex findings to various audiences in a clear manner both written and verbally
* Stakeholder management as well as tasks organizational skills, to navigate complex priorities across multiple services served
* Proficient in SQL and Tableau or equivalent visualization tool
* Hands on experience with Python
* Excellent attention to details, and organization skills.
* Ability to create and maintain relationships with partners
* Strong problem solving skills with good hands on analyzing data

**What We’ll Provide You**
We offer colleagues the opportunity to drive impact in the region while they learn and grow. As a full time Careem colleague, you will be able to:
  
  

* Work and learn from great minds by joining a community of inspiring colleagues.
* Put your passion to work in a purposeful organisation dedicated to creating impact in a region with a lot of untapped potential.
* Explore new opportunities to learn and grow every day.
* Work 4 days a week in office & 1 day from home, and remotely from any country in the world for 30 days a year with unlimited vacation days per year. (If you are in an individual contributor role in tech, you will have 2 office days a week and 3 to work from home.)
* Access to healthcare benefits and fitness reimbursements for health activities including gym, health club, and training classes.
